name: Ben Samuels
subject: Fwd: Voters deserve fair maps
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS
body:
My friends,
I am writing to make sure you saw the campaign email from Saturday. Career politicians have ground the state legislature to a halt in order to draw new districts that disenfranchise Missouri voters.
When politicians get to choose who their voters will be, Missourians get the short end of the stick. When we fail to draw fair maps, we fail to give voters the voice they are guaranteed in the United States of America.
Despite all of the attempts to cheat and gerrymander, we know that we will win this race no matter what happens. Can you contribute any amount today and help me win this race and protect voting rights at the federal level? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2203-q1-bs?refcode=220307-email]
Kind Regards,
Ben Samuels
------Original Message------
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2203-q1-bs?refcode=220307-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2203-q1-bs?refcode=220307-email]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2203-q1-bs?refcode=220307-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2203-q1-bs?refcode=220307-email]
Dear Friend,
We believe in democracy. That means voters should choose leaders and both sides should accept those decisions. But here in Missouri, the state government is fighting to make sure elected officials can determine who their voters are. The proposed map creates SEVEN conservative districts and ONLY ONE that is not.
This is not a question of partisan politics. This is a question of fair democratic representation. Every Missourian deserves to have their voice heard on EVERY level.
Donate now to Ben Samuels for Congress and elect someone who believes in fairness. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2203-q1-bs?refcode=220307-email]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2203-q1-bs?refcode=220307-email&express_lane=true&amount=10] DONATE $25 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2203-q1-bs?refcode=220307-email&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2203-q1-bs?refcode=220307-email&express_lane=true&amount=50] DONATE $100 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2203-q1-bs?refcode=220307-email&express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE $250 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2203-q1-bs?refcode=220307-email&express_lane=true&amount=250] DONATE ANY AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2203-q1-bs?refcode=220307-email]
Partisan gerrymandering has been a problem across our country for a long time. Neither party is innocent in exploiting it, but we are now seeing a coordinated effort to rig the system for the next DECADE against working people, voters in urban areas, and voters of color.
We know that Trump and his Big Lie conspiracy theory is hurting our democracy, but the combination of voter suppression and gerrymandering could set us on a dangerous plan.
Our democracy is in danger. Ben knows that Americans prefer freedom and choice to suppression and lies. We need leaders like that. Rush in $15 now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2203-q1-bs?refcode=220307-email&amount=15]
Never forget we are in this together.
Team Samuels
Ben Samuels is a businessperson, an economic policy expert, and a bipartisan problem-solver running for Congress in Missouri’s 2nd Congressional District to bring jobs and opportunities back to the St. Louis area.
CONTRIBUTE $25 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2203-q1-bs?refcode=220307-email&amount=25] CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2203-q1-bs?refcode=220307-email&recurring=true]PAID FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS

Peter Willis,
After the 2020 election, we all lost trust in our electoral process. Gov. Wolf and the Harrisburg insiders allowed an unconstitutional mail-in balloting system that destroyed voter confidence. It was wrong and should have NEVER been allowed to happen in the first place.
While on the campaign trail, Lou continues to hear from people in Potter County to Philadelphia that election integrity is their TOP issue and they feel the cards are stacked against them.
And rightfully so!
The truth is: Act 77 was unconstitutional and it injected chaos and confusion into our election system. Lou is the only candidate for governor with a backbone who has demonstrated his ability to stand up and fight for what’s right. He did it as mayor with illegal immigration and he’ll do it again as governor so people can have faith that their vote counts.
---

clean_body: | | | | Sign our Petition. | Peter Willis, After the 2020 election, we all lost trust in our electoral process. Gov. Wolf and the Harrisburg insiders allowed an unconstitutional mail-in balloting system that destroyed voter confidence. It was wrong and should have NEVER been allowed to happen in the first place. While on the campaign trail, Lou continues to hear from people in Potter County to Philadelphia that election integrity is their TOP issue and they feel the cards are stacked against them. And rightfully so! The truth is: Act 77 was unconstitutional and it injected chaos and confusion into our election system. Lou is the only candidate for governor with a backbone who has demonstrated his ability to stand up and fight for what’s right. He did it as mayor with illegal immigration and he’ll do it again as governor so people can have faith that their vote counts. Team Barletta | | | | To contribute by mail, please make payable to “Lou Barletta for Governor” and mail to: Lou Barletta for Governor PO Box 128 Hazleton, PA 18201 ==

body:

No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=6c305857cd374f4096b9b25ddc341639&_t=x-V-HWtC_WZC5tU13UOoKgiTZ_xeCrWTg2Nbkg0yTUZ1hWp31EjvniInLcjQ6GLP7X3q1xrVYOdjkpMOmcNa9IhjKZNbN7QdVOrw9_IQWonlOtWPYtv-3lJfGp2K47CIlP8K3Kpn6a4VxavAO5QbP6NnFlbGv1CZO0qcsx8C1dI%3D).

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6c305857cd374f4096b9b25ddc341639&_e=4Fpo4ckkR4iWVv-qxZ5soLw5XZq5QkMsJb6ZoT_QFCx9PO-bSYL1VATDCtlFXu1tPcyYjCmddcvDJUzoS-pos-3dVfOnZLPOvOGsUtfZsWZunMO9YV3DqPmCoJPqdWvI6BCOn8xhhkZCFZnpCd_e-WZ13Mp_H3pCURVvPG3F4UR53QMlEeYyB1DMDtqS2KT-Z9auWb783QR5jBq8hrCwldL4SdP9iV_FsNlwgJttH1FMfP6-8dUtdUTOe5Tg3Dv6OyecAuNVyR7Jzu5eMxd5P2T5nIaw8J_HJf5WrNkNHsSB3MqixMMSZGUPL5F39CthXrLu_MpdQFt39W-lfgbZvsfGw1TAMgYfL_uVXgzcBTsD5lh1aKc3JcCWQkTfwsKjBYZTAys_wRBiOAmALpNEctjtPUNSLUh0p7RdV2vY_N4Shi_xURkJjgdcws718Kgo-VlAztKYMkt9qcfJ5wUdNtASAe5QHX7B7xnr-wG1JMA%3D)

Fellow American,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6c305857cd374f4096b9b25ddc341639&_e=4Fpo4ckkR4iWVv-qxZ5soLw5XZq5QkMsJb6ZoT_QFCx9PO-bSYL1VATDCtlFXu1tPcyYjCmddcvDJUzoS-pos-3dVfOnZLPOvOGsUtfZsWZunMO9YV3DqPmCoJPqdWvI6BCOn8xhhkZCFZnpCd_e-WZ13Mp_H3pCURVvPG3F4UR53QMlEeYyB1DMDtqS2KT-Z9auWb783QR5jBq8hrCwldL4SdP9iV_FsNlwgJttH1FMfP6-8dUtdUTOe5Tg3Dv6OyecAuNVyR7Jzu5eMxd5Px33uzo8Ztfiv1CXJhcENOp40pwyFICR8eo7m_8nq6Irz1wdwuiCPZ3jFE4KgQBgTxDVymyz9bgmhq--35BVO7ngMVOwyRWuZga76BXRa7NIl_kmQoqcQ1fAHsAtVSYZux3RlmWCCMj7wHuUstmQFX6-edeYMZ3TVPcXtbrUp90-G3aFzi0m9jCCxG5dLBzf97GyG5Vr2xweKrbkrZHweEs%3D)
My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today.
* I’m a military veteran (**I joined at 17**),
* I’m a lawyer (**I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school**)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ _**freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction**_.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6c305857cd374f4096b9b25ddc341639&_e=4Fpo4ckkR4iWVv-qxZ5soLw5XZq5QkMsJb6ZoT_QFCx9PO-bSYL1VATDCtlFXu1tPcyYjCmddcvDJUzoS-pos-3dVfOnZLPOvOGsUtfZsWZunMO9YV3DqPmCoJPqdWvI6BCOn8xhhkZCFZnpCd_e-WZ13Mp_H3pCURVvPG3F4UR53QMlEeYyB1DMDtqS2KT-Z9auWb783QR5jBq8hrCwldL4SdP9iV_FsNlwgJttH1FMfP6-8dUtdUTOe5Tg3Dv6OyecAuNVyR7Jzu5eMxd5Px0SbkenxsGt0Gaf6ljAdFWJRTjM4AJt-ciJ0afipxxgNZwnQ98-5x0kvD9JL-1OfodyaE8JL3wJiKpoMpWw65sUbaKMWX9DgPrghTD8K-M3YWci_JkuUaisU_zN_VP6JvktUgkAnJq9oo5ksbGQLguVyZZ5J1Beuo8UN66f4Q7OgHPxRRTsy2lXWHLXrqliU8oS9g4QBh8ShNZCLYy1IQM%3D)
I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, **[please consider chipping in whatever you can spare to my campaign today](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6c305857cd374f4096b9b25ddc341639&_e=4Fpo4ckkR4iWVv-qxZ5soLw5XZq5QkMsJb6ZoT_QFCx9PO-bSYL1VATDCtlFXu1tPcyYjCmddcvDJUzoS-pos-3dVfOnZLPOvOGsUtfZsWZunMO9YV3DqPmCoJPqdWvI6BCOn8xhhkZCFZnpCd_e-WZ13Mp_H3pCURVvPG3F4UR53QMlEeYyB1DMDtqS2KT-Z9auWb783QR5jBq8hrCwldL4SdP9iV_FsNlwgJttH1FMfP6-8dUtdUTOe5Tg3Dv6OyecAuNVyR7Jzu5eMxd5P0UmeqYY_G0cYOZ430yaOiqrCB6Lslu8WFxkas42lru6pKD_F8jndbKeRcl-Pf1z61HHlqLZ1p9OxaMoCZj4B9WHTkqF3Ozb_hqFzLs2QJlftMUmdLlUepfbdh3DxtFeV10zhhIvVMXmq1eeZUuY6Nsv0l-Xcebw3rWzkVHFfg4QeFC5Uuv4kYE85Ngy-M66o-G2876QfSItgmtrntEC-gQ%3D)**. I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for.

[** PLEASE TAKE A CHANCE ON ME

Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts.

I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. **I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice**. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6c305857cd374f4096b9b25ddc341639&_e=4Fpo4ckkR4iWVv-qxZ5soLw5XZq5QkMsJb6ZoT_QFCx9PO-bSYL1VATDCtlFXu1tPcyYjCmddcvDJUzoS-pos-3dVfOnZLPOvOGsUtfZsWZunMO9YV3DqPmCoJPqdWvI6BCOn8xhhkZCFZnpCd_e-WZ13Mp_H3pCURVvPG3F4UR53QMlEeYyB1DMDtqS2KT-Z9auWb783QR5jBq8hrCwldL4SdP9iV_FsNlwgJttH1FMfP6-8dUtdUTOe5Tg3Dv6OyecAuNVyR7Jzu5eMxd5P4II_oVAyQylJ2KZOkkF0wPjK37dY9SwL4U0F6bipeWUI-x1bhC2hDR-Kurws57e4FMKodgxbq8Rl9YcI55DcA7ONA8W5D6Ju4JYAsn4ExiQUBro2JPJVy_tTQQzoAGQBj9l3IE6BF48Pc2r17GZ9420qE1-INb79pZ6zfz9VsmjwlMDj-ZXFuGuxVEeLhiTh9mZFxipCIC4XVzX-B3rhwc%3D)
**I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. **

Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but _**what is worth having in life that is easy?**_ I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts.

Rod Dorilas

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

clean_body: | | | | Who will you vote for? | Peter, In 2016 & 2020 Kelly was proud to cast her vote for President Trump and we know you were, too! He received the most votes for any Republican candidate...EVER! There is no question that he was one of America’s best presidents. And now we see that the people who voted for Biden regret it and wish they could go back and vote for Trump. But with 2024 rapidly approaching, Kelly wanted us to reach out and see who you would cast your vote for? We will display final results once we receive yours. We can’t wait to see who might be America’s next Republican Presidential Nominee. Thank you, Team Tshibaka | | | | =

name: Team Ken
subject: The manatees are back in the news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ken Russell for Florida

name: Paul Gazelka
subject: Tim Walz is California dreaming...
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Provided by
body:
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=2cfa84e5bb6340d09b3ac86a5048e1b6&_e=HiaMB_sNbGvCrGw7IwCImY9IVsTMOqO0GcQ_3g45i-5pJkCEulPxRrcVhebcIr1VvxRv6sjycu1Q0SdnQJgGIWqPK94De0BUL6xRz0M4Gism1Txx14QVeyaCABoBCacU4QfrQ6Zm9TJIyDhU-JRQHV5tFZpck35JrXnp16zExDpx0Dvw_sj78DguzzZwOGLCblRYCJMFBciPEI2kXFnFrxasMD40BYhrIGolZsjAObyqujIwQGte-Erd_bzVUy1RhtYehCVlSGaACoYG9cFCLV7x-qRclEgNDiiarLBNe45JUegPFSuyyMBMU7NA1D6DoGyFzbzJhWlLg-najXkoZjyIp32YMjYeM_imqBEmJRteXV4SaKuZsXsgdym4LrFK) My friend, Tim Walz is dreaming if he thinks I'm going to let him turn Minnesota into a far-left dumpster fire like California, where mandates and burdensome regulations are rampant. [**As Majority Leader of the Minnesota Senate I was on the frontline in stopping Walz and his radical allies from passing their destructive agenda.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=2cfa84e5bb6340d09b3ac86a5048e1b6&_e=HiaMB_sNbGvCrGw7IwCImY9IVsTMOqO0GcQ_3g45i-5pJkCEulPxRrcVhebcIr1VvxRv6sjycu1Q0SdnQJgGIWqPK94De0BUL6xRz0M4Gism1Txx14QVeyaCABoBCacU4QfrQ6Zm9TJIyDhU-JRQHR5YaNj36D_9qBrZEgscBiPcRJoqabNc8HLRCmnSjixE3q_uPKTYzLjDjY3iCdMSEHO-fnM37VaKYvcVIGYBVt_NbTALdEx6UHesubTU7wIOz6it7DjoAHORpuD0aRnK9lB8ZiqXkDfexy_FAV8L0GiYdFv-Izhj1OKRkOXgA_boZRJr6EdCOvtuTNp1nGz3QuX7GnqooSIuZ5nUlVKiw0rMtztnpyu9FfUzz2Jq8d-z) With my leadership we stopped:
* More than a billion dollars of tax increases, including higher income taxes, capital gains taxes, and corporate tax increases
* A gas tax of $350 million over four years
* Driver’s licenses for illegal immigrants
* Automatic voter registration at age 16
* Anti-police reform including:
* Citizen oversight councils with activists, not experts, to decide law enforcement disciplinary policies
* Early release of bodycam footage that puts thorough investigations at risk
* Prohibitions on traffic stops
* Two-year delay in implementation of new education standards, including the controversial anti-American social studies standards
* Extreme climate change mandates and Green New Deal proposals
* Efforts to move Minnesota to single-payer healthcare

...and that's not even everything! [**Support a Proven Fighter for Minnesota >> Chip in!
**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=2cfa84e5bb6340d09b3ac86a5048e1b6&_e=HiaMB_sNbGvCrGw7IwCImY9IVsTMOqO0GcQ_3g45i-5pJkCEulPxRrcVhebcIr1VvxRv6sjycu1Q0SdnQJgGIWqPK94De0BUL6xRz0M4Gism1Txx14QVeyaCABoBCacU4QfrQ6Zm9TJIyDhU-JRQHeadzcElQ3pT1zhwyl0KQqkTJ0CQoE0aKNR2JvNFe9uA0tPqJ_NWii8I9dmDNzGxHzshGmeHP3kXZzB9OA60OanUpnOaHZx9ktY-VMYLyQ8_XexeVUS78lXsBQJZBFB3xiw6R1EKIDgr8ppEM7F9X-OXiyMIn2a-7CgniRLtT9gEeyvPt35bV_XNdGWBUj7syp2CrOIg676UlhsNcDxCmPGqD0MPdbuW-ZDudL7KRB_f) At the end of the day, California Tim can hide from his policies in the comfort of the Governor's Mansion and behind his security team. I mean, how deluded is that? Like you, I live in reality, and the reality is that the California model doesn't work. I'm a common-sense Minnesotan with common-sense solutions, and I'm ready to bring those solutions to the Governor's office. Minnesota is at a crossroads. We can continue down the dangerous path that Walz has set us on, or we can choose safety, prosperity, and a Minnesota that works for EVERYONE. [_**Let's do this, clean_body: My friend, Tim Walz is dreaming if he thinks I'm going to let him turn Minnesota into a far-left dumpster fire like California, where mandates and burdensome regulations are rampant. With my leadership we stopped: More than a billion dollars of tax increases, including higher income taxes, capital gains taxes, and corporate tax increases A gas tax of $350 million over four years Driver’s licenses for illegal immigrants Automatic voter registration at age 16 Anti-police reform including: Citizen oversight councils with activists, not experts, to decide law enforcement disciplinary policies Early release of bodycam footage that puts thorough investigations at risk Prohibitions on traffic stops Two-year delay in implementation of new education standards, including the controversial anti-American social studies standards Extreme climate change mandates and Green New Deal proposals Efforts to move Minnesota to single-payer healthcare ...and that's not even everything! At the end of the day, California Tim can hide from his policies in the comfort of the Governor's Mansion and behind his security team. I mean, how deluded is that? Like you, I live in reality, and the reality is that the California model doesn't work. I'm a common-sense Minnesotan with common-sense solutions, and I'm ready to bring those solutions to the Governor's office. Minnesota is at a crossroads. We can continue down the dangerous path that Walz has set us on, or we can choose safety, prosperity, and a Minnesota that works for EVERYONE. Thank you, Senator Paul Gazelka** Candidate for Governor | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for and Provided by Gazelka for Governor P.O. Box 175 Little Falls, MN 56345

name: Hillary Scholten (D)
subject: Help me flip this toss-up district blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
This race just shifted:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6786?t=6&akid=1431%2E878179%2EhyshjZ) Friend, my name is Hillary Scholten, and I’m the Democrat running to represent Michigan’s newly drawn 3rd district.

**My district just shifted from Trump +3 to Biden +8!** Momentum is on our side, but Republicans are desperate to hold Michigan’s 3rd – so I need your help. [**I’m asking you to split $5 between my campaign and Voter Protection Project. With your help, I can flip this district blue and bring real leadership to the people of West Michigan! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6786?t=7&akid=1431%2E878179%2EhyshjZ) | [$10,000 GOAL: CHIP IN TO ELECT HILLARY SCHOLTEN AND FLIP MICHIGAN’S 3RD DISTRICT BLUE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6786?t=8&akid=1431%2E878179%2EhyshjZ)
---
**Frankly, the other side has proven time and time again that they’re out of touch.**

My Republican opponent voted against improving infrastructure and against protecting voting rights – and his even more extreme primary opponent even threatened to **jail** members of the January 6th commission.

As a former Department of Justice attorney and a mother of two, I know I have what it takes to win this ultra-competitive race.

But my opponent has backing from National Republicans, wealthy mega-donors, and corporate PACs. _So I need your help to compete, Friend!_
[**If you’re ready to elect leaders who will fight for working families instead of against them, I’m asking you to chip in $5 today »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6786?t=9&akid=1431%2E878179%2EhyshjZ)
[$10,000 GOAL: CHIP IN TO ELECT HILLARY SCHOLTEN AND FLIP MICHIGAN’S 3RD DISTRICT BLUE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6786?t=10&akid=1431%2E878179%2EhyshjZ)
---
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6787?t=11&akid=1431%2E878179%2EhyshjZ)

Thank you so much for your support, Team. I know that we can win this race together!

_– Hillary_

Hillary Scholten,
Democratic Candidate for MI-03
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1431%2E878179%2EhyshjZ). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1431%2E878179%2EhyshjZ).**

name: Rachel Vindman
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
This morning, Marjorie Taylor Greene attacked my husband, Alex Vindman.
#
Derek —
This morning, Marjorie Taylor Greene attacked my husband, Alex Vindman. She said he wanted to drag the US into war with Russia through his “tough tweets.” She said that he should go fight himself since he is from Ukraine.
Let me tell you the difference between Alex and Marjorie Taylor Greene.
Alex Vindman served this country, Marjorie Taylor Greene supports and defends the people who attacked it on January 6.
Alex Vindman called out Donald Trump when he extorted President Zelensky, threatening to withhold weapons unless he gave up dirt on Hunter Biden. Marjorie Taylor Green defended Trump.
Alex Vindman continues to serve his country out of uniform. Marjorie Taylor Greene serves Putin’s interests.
We have to get rid of Marjorie Taylor Greene.
[**Please split a $3 contribution between VoteVets and Marcus Flowers - an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-pac-em-flowers-split?refcode=em220307-1-tb2&t=1&refcode2=4546_3013755_bFsiMd&akid=4546%2E3013755%2EbFsiMd)

subject: I selected you to represent Pennsylvania...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| [](https://go.dscc.org/go/4520?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220307-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220307-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&akid=3253%2E9716520%2EcHCHfe)
---
Hi Friend -- I'm Christie Roberts and I'm the Executive Director of the DSCC. **That means it's my job to develop the Democratic Party's strategy to protect and expand our Senate majority.**

As you know, our majority is perilously thin and we can't afford to make _any_ mistakes. So I am inviting a few trusted Democrats from each state to join my personal Focus Group to help _perfect_ our strategy **\-- and I chose you specifically!**

[**I'm standing by to review your responses, so please click here to enter my focus group immediately >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/4520?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220307-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220307-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&akid=3253%2E9716520%2EcHCHfe)

_*Note: I need to review your responses by tomorrow morning, so please don't wait!_

I helped guide Raphael Warnock's campaign and I cannot overstate how crucial this community's support and input were to our victories in Georgia. That's why I chose you for this exclusive opportunity -- I'm _100%_ confident your insights will drastically improve our strategy.

[**So please, will you accept this invitation to join my personal focus group before tonight's deadline?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/4520?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220307-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220307-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&akid=3253%2E9716520%2EcHCHfe)

| **DPWILLIS67@GMAIL.COM**
**Focus Group Status: OPEN**
---

Thanks for all you do! I am eagerly awaiting your responses.

Christie Roberts
Executive Director, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
* * *

March 8th, 2022

[https://www.firearmman.com/]

This is horrible news,

It’s regarding your credit card purchase records.

They’ve been exposed.

As of March 8th, 2022, over 13 government agencies have full access to your entire credit card purchase history.

Here’s why this is very bad for you,

Even if you think you have nothing to hide...

All it takes is for them to find ANY purchases they deem as “suspicious”... and they could easily:

Investigate you for “extremist activity”

Freeze your assets

Even throw you in jail!

So if you’ve purchased any guns, ammo, survival supplies, or anything like that in the past 10 years...

You need to know 3 simple steps to become invisible to this disgusting surveillance of your finances.

You can see exactly what they are in the new and FREE book “Avoiding the Eye” by Richard Marshall.

[http://c4network.go2cloud.org/aff_c?offer_id=275&aff_id=1072&aff_sub=ILMG_1634]

But your Free copy of this shocking book doesn’t just help you protect your purchase records...

Inside, you’ll also discover:

Which part of your car talks to Big Brother... and how to shut it up.

How common appliances spy on you

- and how to blindfold them for good.

Even though they can listen to your phone... you can do this simple thing to block them.

And more!

The CIA openly admitted before Congress all of this is happening.

And that’s why the author of “Avoiding the Eye”, Richard Marshall, wants you to have his new book for Free

[http://c4network.go2cloud.org/aff_c?offer_id=275&aff_id=1072&aff_sub=ILMG_1634]

!

Marshall is one of the top survivalists in the nation and claims to have extensive government connections – wants to keep Americans informed and protected.

So he’s decided to give a few copies of his incredible book away for Free.

And while Richard's nice... he ain’t rich. Which means supplies are limited to just 200 copies - and a ton have already been claimed.

To keep the government’s nose out of your business click here and get your Free copy before the rest are gone.

[http://c4network.go2cloud.org/aff_c?offer_id=275&aff_id=1072&aff_sub=ILMG_1634]

Thank You.

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlpr0jh7ofhj6cpl6q7p8j99tetbqj9g6chi4s28_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onnm9im4t76e5oe4crk6dp60t5mckon1ob5m3j60oj7mdim4thhcti69cpmmpim0puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb0mmqjfchgcor61cr4cuobapbi46h22sh2s8i66ob3ctgm0o72c3h2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1dc5jn84gjp8ec1favo5utviocp0j73aqf4411g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3ctgm0o72c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zp355r09b6igoj4caed9aehv1shb84lh1k4pjf90_rp22sh2s8i66ob3ctgm0o72c3h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsu8sjf5tljtka1trqfmpo23dpqo5ksegmffe0v0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3ctgm0o72c3h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Friend,

It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule by my Radical Socialist Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana as we start 2022.

I’ll be blunt: **If I don’t catch up and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven.** I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself.

I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. **Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars.**

**I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.

WITHOUT YOU I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT.**

name: Mike Crispi
subject: Crispi for Congress - ICYMI - Tuesday, March 8, 2022
body:
Welcome to this week's edition of the Crispi for Congress newsletter!

----------

It’s clear the people of NJ-4 demand better representation in Congress. Tremendous momentum is building and the excitement from constituents has been unbelievable. Below are recent announcements, endorsements, and upcoming events to keep you in-the-know on the campaign.

AMERICA POPULIST UNION ENDORSEMENT: MIKE CRISPI FOR NEW JERSEY'S 4TH CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT

----------

|

|

|

( https://sable.godaddy.com/c/433724?id=157.25.1.636087165f86c1761bca46524353c155 )

|

|

|

MIKE IN THE NEWS

----------

Mike appeared on the Nader Narrative, hosted by Elizabeth Nader, on Jersey1st TV last week to discuss the campaign, what he’s been hearing from constituents, and how and why NJ-4 needs a congressman who will FIGHT FOR AMERICA FIRST VALUES now more than ever. Check out the interview below!

|

|

|

( https://sable.godaddy.com/c/433724?id=157.26.1.c5be7b09b9c145ce46ff7399042e5657 )

|

|

|

CRISPI CALLS ON SMITH TO RELEASE HIS TAX RETURNS

----------

Constituents around the district have been asking, “Why won’t Chris Smith release his tax returns?” Two weeks ago, Crispi took the initiative, calling for incumbent congressman to answer the calls of the people of NJ-4 for more transparency.

Call Congressman Smith's office at (732) 780-3035 and tell him you demand he release his tax returns!

----------

|

|

|

|

|

|

Thank you for reading the newsletter and stay tuned for more. And as always, thank you, thank you, thank you for your support!

Please share, donate, and spread the word.

America needs YOU!

|

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Study the Roman Republic
body:
Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius, Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus? While many Americans today woul
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zp2qel8980qbms7b5i71c33jt54lekpsjiev1kq0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3ctgm2ob4cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf2sr7mdhb0obh68p7aobmmir62c9l62qm0p34ehhb4stjcthjed9n62or6p3161jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8r6ccbn6mp6fchhcoo71cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z57af9rg0tltidksja89t89ri6843tpu280ud9t0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3ctgm2ob4cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius, Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus? While many Americans today wouldn’t recognize these names, our Founding Fathers admired and studied these heroes of the Roman Republic. If you’ve ever read _The Federalist Papers_ or visited Cincinnati, Ohio, they may ring a bell.
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbgufptmvr4kbg7bj0jasjadmqb794jh539tta08_rp22sh2s8i66ob3ctgm2ob4cph2bs)
---
| | That’s because many of our Founders looked at the heroes of the Roman Republic as models of civic virtue to emulate. Likewise, they viewed the descent of Rome into tyranny and discord as a cautionary tale their new republican form of government was designed to address. These are a few of the reasons we’re releasing our newest free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** next month. Our Founders knew that the Roman Republic provided an essential study for every person interested in free government, military strategy, political theory, and the perennial questions of human nature. ** **Now you can learn these same lessons with Hillsdale College...for free!** Remember, courses like **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** are free and supported entirely by the generosity of friends like you. We rely on the generous funding provided by so many. I want you to know that a donation is NOT required to experience the full course—it’s truly free and open to all who wish to learn as part of the College’s mission. **So please, pre-register today, even if you can’t make a gift to support the course or our other educational outreach.** [_**You can watch the trailer and pre-register now for “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic” at this secure page »**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znl80iv3qem2scbsv1jmvvj368i46n8e1fga4v8g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3ctgm2ob4cph2bs) __ Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

Join Matthew Dernoga , Carlo Sanchez , & Jimmy Spiropolous
for a reception with
Delegate Jazz Lewis
in support of his campaign for Congress in Maryland's 4th Congressional District
Monday, March 14, 2022
6:00 - 7:30 p.m.
Town Center Market
4705 Queensbury Rd
Riverdale, MD 20737
Host $500 | Supporter $250 | Friend $100 | Ticket $35
RSVP via ActBlue » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/qNqsOAias0-0N10Q7kTrWA2?contactdata=Rw%2BOyeM5lrmSxmRMaDHKDyRS0gmorDLgBYB%2Br45lxa634r0uF9LB265ZGdHTD7O7H6ag5uA%2F1sCJckYmSB5xa8LuxGwai79EzWOQJPUolNqTxpJ1tZEGyJZNH%2Fo59gT9F5FirWNRpOiD%2BvRLKJ7%2BYHmMLMeSVoX%2FhFKuWoJyEjI%3D&refcode2=button_link1]
If you have any questions, please contact Megan at megan@skybp.com or (240) 283-4899.
Jazz Lewis [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Jazz-Lewis-Portrait.png]
Jazz Lewis is an effective progressive leader running for the Democratic nomination in Maryland’s 4th Congressional District. A champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to health care access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to represent Maryland in Congress. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.

name: Laura Neuman
subject: Why I’m running for Governor
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42706688/334007650/-1623135755?refcode=neu_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDg5NjQwYS1lODllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0zUalc0tLcKlIdDu1zOXRVHyrOqFq6fCzxgz2Pwe_6Q=)

| | Hi Peter, My name is Laura Neuman – I’m the only woman running for Governor of Maryland in a crowded Democratic primary. **[I’m about to ask you to become one of the 5,000 donors I need to strengthen my campaign before the primary election,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42706691/334007655/2042683516?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220308_FR_Launch1MarResend_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDg5NjQwYS1lODllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0zUalc0tLcKlIdDu1zOXRVHyrOqFq6fCzxgz2Pwe_6Q=)** but first I want to tell you a little bit about myself. _My story might be triggering for some folks, so if you want to skip directly to my website to learn about my platform and the issues I care about, click**[here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42706693/334007659/1714714663?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDg5NjQwYS1lODllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0zUalc0tLcKlIdDu1zOXRVHyrOqFq6fCzxgz2Pwe_6Q=&emci=f880cdde-399b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=4089640a-e89e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=8520911)**_ I was 18 when I left an abusive home with everything I owned in a trash bag. For six months, I lived out of my car – a beat up, old Pontiac. I slept on floors and sofas until I could afford the security deposit on an apartment. Just two weeks after moving in, I was raped at gunpoint. I now know I’m lucky to be alive – _two months earlier, the same man murdered a woman who fought back._ The police came, but they never investigated my case. They didn’t believe me. No one believed me. Not even my own mother. Over the next 12 years, I lived in 19 places. I had five jobs in waitressing and six in customer service. It took years, and I wanted to give up more times than I can count, but I kept going. Without finishing high school or college, I got a master’s degree in business from Loyola University in Maryland. I created a path to opportunity where none existed. I became an entrepreneur, I turned around struggling startups, I ran an economic development agency, and became county executive for one of the largest counties in Maryland. **My path wasn’t easy, and I’m proud of my accomplishments, especially in my career. But what I’m _most_ proud of, other than being a mom, is helping people.** That’s why I’m running for Governor – to help folks that are struggling in my community; to show people that how their story begins is not how it has to end. I succeeded _in spite_ of structural failures in my state, and I want to alleviate those failures so more people can succeed. **[Will you become a supporter of my campaign by chipping in $25 or more today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42706695/334007661/2042683516?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220308_FR_Launch1MarResend_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDg5NjQwYS1lODllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0zUalc0tLcKlIdDu1zOXRVHyrOqFq6fCzxgz2Pwe_6Q=)** | | | [Chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42706697/334007663/-197178546?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220308_FR_Launch1MarResend_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDg5NjQwYS1lODllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0zUalc0tLcKlIdDu1zOXRVHyrOqFq6fCzxgz2Pwe_6Q=)
---
19 years after my assault, I finally found a detective willing to take on my case. The decision to tell my story led to the police solving dozens of cases – _the person who raped me was the worst serial offender in Maryland history._
And while some people might be tempted to acknowledge this as progress, **there are still 1,800 untested rape kits dating back to 1977 in a Baltimore County hospital, and more than 6,000 kits that haven't been submitted in police labs across the state.**
This issue isn’t solved until every rape kit is tested and treated like evidence.
I’m running for Governor to be a voice for those still waiting for justice. To fight for the people who grew up without resources and without opportunities; for everyone who just needed a little bit of help to get themselves on the right track and were denied time and time again.
**[If you’re with me, I’m asking you to become a supporter of my campaign by chipping in $25 or more – I need as many grassroots supporters to chip in as possible.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42706700/334007665/2042683516?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220308_FR_Launch1MarResend_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDg5NjQwYS1lODllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0zUalc0tLcKlIdDu1zOXRVHyrOqFq6fCzxgz2Pwe_6Q=)**

This is serious, friend. Right-wing, billionaire donors are preparing to spend **_whatever it takes_** to prop up Gov. DeSantis.

Why? Because they want to ensure he wins reelection, immediately pivots to running for president, and wins — all so he can pass policies that benefit _them._

That’s wrong, _wrong,**wRONg.**_

**[The governor of Florida should be focused on _Floridians_ (not rich donors). I’ve spent the past year talking and listening to voters across our beautiful state, and I know folks are ready for change. If that’s you — if you’re ready to throw Gov. name: Shontel Brown
subject: Happy International Women’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Join me in honoring the hard work of women around the world!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42709446/334018397/918102368?refcode=EM_C_220308WHM_H_SB_90DO_4_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGY3YTMyMi1lYTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=62gnDvY4Hwz_7UCEDz4r8rCZ6xSd5BSM2uMm4G8L5Cs=) It’s International Women’s Day, Peter!

**Today and throughout March, we pause to celebrate the sacrifices of women worldwide, reflecting on our progress and taking action in a more representative future.**

Today couldn't be more critical as one of a small group of Black women serving in our nation's Congress. Having the pleasure of serving in this office alone is monumental and a testament to women's hard work and sacrifices throughout our history. Leaders like Patsy Takemoto Mink and Shirley Chisholm paved the way for women like myself, challenging the status quo and creating a seat at the table for diversity where there once was none.

I have devoted my life to championing inclusivity in honor of their legacy, and today I restore my commitment to the fight for intersectional equality.

Thank you and happy Women’s History Month,

Shontel Brown

[**_P.S. I’m in a tough primary, and I need your help. Can you donate just $5 today to help my re-election campaign?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42709447/334018399/918102368?refcode=EM_C_220308WHM_H_SB_90DO_4_NG_N_l1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGY3YTMyMi1lYTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=62gnDvY4Hwz_7UCEDz4r8rCZ6xSd5BSM2uMm4G8L5Cs=) | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42709448/334018400/328230923?refcode=EM_C_220308WHM_H_SB_90DO_4_NG_N_biobox&recurring=1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGY3YTMyMi1lYTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=62gnDvY4Hwz_7UCEDz4r8rCZ6xSd5BSM2uMm4G8L5Cs=)

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: They're scared, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz_
body:
Peter:

Adam Schiff, Liz Cheney and the rest of the January 6 witch hunt committee revealed in court **they want to arrest President Trump and throw him in jail!** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59763829:sMeGxZHNe:m:1:2365227053:58EED9FDFB0D9346DFB182E7C8242961:r) **But Donald Trump is just the first name on Nancy Pelosi's enemies list.**

Schiff, Cheney, and the rest of the Trump-haters on this sham committee revealed they want to slap criminal charges on anyone that stood with Donald Trump and called out the fraud in the 2020 election.

Pelosi, Schiff, and the Never Trumpers put a plan in motion to steal the 2022 and 2024 elections by kicking America First conservatives off the ballot. [_**STAND WITH MATT GAETZ AND TRUMP
TO FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE
JANUARY 6 WITCH HUNT - CHIP IN TODAY**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59763829:sMeGxZHNe:m:1:2365227053:58EED9FDFB0D9346DFB182E7C8242961:r) **Polls show Republicans on the verge of red wave and that Donald Trump will defeat Joe Biden.**

Now I'm under attack for leading the fight for the pro-Trump America First movement that will retake Congress and the White House.

I'm already facing challenges by Ivy league law professors and paid liberal activists to kick me off the ballot based on lies about being an "insurrectionist."

Now Pelosi's committee put me square in their sights.

**_But I know this means they are scared._**

Scared because when I help elect an America First Majority next year my first vote will to be fire Nancy Pelosi.

And my second vote will be for Donald J. Trump as Speaker of the House.

But I need your help to fight back.

**[So please chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, or $100 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59763829:sMeGxZHNe:m:1:2365227053:58EED9FDFB0D9346DFB182E7C8242961:r).** [_**STAND WITH MATT GAETZ AND TRUMP
TO FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE
JANUARY 6 WITCH HUNT - CHIP IN TODAY**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59763829:sMeGxZHNe:m:1:2365227053:58EED9FDFB0D9346DFB182E7C8242961:r) **The real insurrection was Hillary Clinton treasonously spying on Donald Trump during the 2016 election.**

The Deep State faked the Russian collusion hoax to stage a coup against Donald Trump.

And the FBI carried out a "FEDSURRECTION" on January 6 with informants in the crowd.

You and I still don't know how many undercover operatives the FBI deployed that day or if they were involved in inciting any acts of violence.

**I'm proud to fight for Trump.**

And I will never apologize for objecting to the results of the 2020 election.

But because I told some inconvenient truths, the January 6 witch hunt committee is threatening to arrest Donald Trump and file criminal charges against his supporters.

I'm only taking fire because I'm over the target.

**I pledged to vote for Donald Trump as Speaker of the House to lead a new America First majority.**

That terrifies the swamp.

The January 6 witch hunt committee struck back by threatening criminal charges against Donald Trump and his supporters to kick America First conservatives off the ballot.

I will not stand for this underhanded scheme to steal the elections.

**[And I hope you will stand with me in this fight against the January 6 witch hunt committee by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or $2,900 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59763829:sMeGxZHNe:m:1:2365227053:58EED9FDFB0D9346DFB182E7C8242961:r).** [_**HELP MATT GAETZ FIGHT BACK
CHIP IN $17.76 TODAY!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59763829:sMeGxZHNe:m:1:2365227053:58EED9FDFB0D9346DFB182E7C8242961:r)

Sincerely,

Matt Gaetz
Congresman (R-FL)

Now Pelosi's committee put me square in their sights. But I know this means they are scared. Scared because when I help elect an America First Majority next year my first vote will to be fire Nancy Pelosi. And my second vote will be for Donald J. Trump as Speaker of the House. But I need your help to fight back. . The real insurrection was Hillary Clinton treasonously spying on Donald Trump during the 2016 election. The Deep State faked the Russian collusion hoax to stage a coup against Donald Trump. And the FBI carried out a "FEDSURRECTION" on January 6 with informants in the crowd. You and I still don't know how many undercover operatives the FBI deployed that day or if they were involved in inciting any acts of violence. I'm proud to fight for Trump. And I will never apologize for objecting to the results of the 2020 election. But because I told some inconvenient truths, the January 6 witch hunt committee is threatening to arrest Donald Trump and file criminal charges against his supporters. I'm only taking fire because I'm over the target. I pledged to vote for Donald Trump as Speaker of the House to lead a new America First majority. That terrifies the swamp. The January 6 witch hunt committee struck back by threatening criminal charges against Donald Trump and his supporters to kick America First conservatives off the ballot. I will not stand for this underhanded scheme to steal the elections. . name: me, DASS (2)
subject: did you see this must-read update from earlier?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
Hey Team –
Did you see this update from our team yesterday? If not, we’re bumping it to the top of your inbox.
Mitch McConnell, Trump, and the Supreme Court are closing in fast on their plot to destroy voting rights across the country. The one thing standing in their way? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030822_B1_AC_30D]
Our Democratic Secretaries of State. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030822_B1_AC_30D]
That’s why the GOP is going all-in to defeat them in November – last month, our opponents at the RSLC announced a record-breaking fundraising haul of $33 MILLION!
We need your help to fight back – give our note below a read, and then rush $20 ASAP to help elect Democratic Secretaries who will stand up to the Supreme Court’s plan to destroy voting rights >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030822_B1_AC_30D]
RUSH $20 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030822_B1_AC_30D]
Team, you NEED to see this alert from CNN:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030822_B1_AC_30D [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030822_B1_AC_30D]
Trump and Mitch McConnell’s packed Supreme Court is set to eviscerate one of the fundamental pillars of our democracy ahead of Trump’s return in 2024.
That leaves our Democratic Secretaries of State as the last line of defense for voting rights. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030822_B1_AC_30D]
Rush a donation of $20 ASAP to help our Secretaries hold the line against Trump’s plot to destroy our democracy >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030822_B1_AC_30D]
RUSH $20 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030822_B1_AC_30D]
Here’s Mitch and Trump’s plan:
Step one (done): [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030822_B1_AC_30D] pack the Supreme Court with far-right partisans ready to gut voting rights.
Step two (done): [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030822_B1_AC_30D] filibuster any and all voting rights legislation in the Senate.
Step three (planned for November): [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030822_B1_AC_30D] defeat Democratic Secretaries of State across the country, paving the way for voter suppression and overturning elections in 2024 – ensuring Trump wins even if he loses. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030822_B1_AC_30D]
This is going to be an uphill battle, but we can’t afford to lose hope – our Secretaries are the last line of defense, and if we can re-elect them and defeat the far-right in November, we can save our democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030822_B1_AC_30D]
It’s going to take all of us working together to win – will you rush $20 right now to elect Democratic Secretaries who will stand up to the unelected Supreme Court’s push to destroy our voting rights? >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030822_B1_AC_30D]
RUSH $5 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=5&refcode=EM_FR_030822_B1_AC_30D]
RUSH $20 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_030822_B1_AC_30D]

DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections.
Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today!

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Happy International Women's Day!
body:
We are happy to report that our Women for Diehl coalition kick-off event this weekend was a success!
| | | |
---
|
---
| Thank you so much to everyone who came out to support Geoff Diehl at our Women for Diehl coalition kick-off event this weekend. We had a fantastic time!
Special thanks to our host, Geoff's wife KathyJo, and to our other featured speakers: Summer Schmaling, Heather Roberts, and Kari MacRae. You are true inspirations and proof that women can do it all. Thanks also to West on Centre for hosting our event.
Moms, wives, business owners, non-profit executives -- on Saturday we were reminded once again that the Commonwealth of Massachusetts would not be where it is today without women.
Today, on International Women's Day, we are proud to reaffirm that with Geoff as your Governor, you can be sure your voice will be heard even more loudly.
Please stay informed about upcoming events at [www.geoffdiehl.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DVlAW6zehcUSuBhdc9gkn8EwmIrjnqXOICAGXGyRMDUod7RWNvNO-ecbsrvjjO_DL4mKIQvWgcWoDICHxS-vWwGZGituiTZxJHjJsNpQEqmqIitYRuf14dmi8mPUmUi73tfWCZpr76Jsm5dVi6Ku8w==&c=tkd6OjMsWLrEpe20lPyK4IYXxh-pEKnONklfwx710wvmaXsmOytqXw==&ch=SkjKN76QTen5nvtD9VZSp1enXkFkhwtiRk0VdCCcRRq6zkBqSSIB-w==).

name: Wes Moore
subject: Reflecting on International Women’s Day
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42713644/334037132/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220308iwd_wm_60da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWQ4OWI3NS1mMDllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Ae_4DQxNcpmvzsu-VaQGPlmVpEmxG9Z9D8jlM79b_E=)
---
Happy International Women's Day, friends! Today is an opportunity I take to reflect on the countless impacts women have made in my own life, our communities, and throughout history. Though I worked hard to get where I am today, I know I wouldn’t be here without the support, strength, and guidance of my mom (who raised my sisters and I as a working single mother) my grandmother (Mama Win), my sisters, my aunts, and multiple teachers who believed in me when I didn’t believe in myself. And of course, my wife Dawn inspires and motivates me every day. Through their courage and compassion, women lift all of us up. So many women leaders both past and present are trailblazers and changemakers in our communities, state, and country. Aruna Miller is one of them. **Aruna is a true partner, an experienced and principled legislator, a civil and transportation engineer, and a leader who puts people first.** She was the first Indian American woman elected to our legislature, and with your support, _she’ll be the first woman of color lieutenant governor in Maryland’s history._ Together, Aruna and I will get to work on Day 1 to build a future where every Marylander can thrive. Our administration will fight for gender equality and address the challenges women face, ensuring they have support and equal access to opportunity. **Our plans include support for paid family leave, enshrining the reproductive rights granted by _Roe v. Wade_ into our state constitution, establishing equal pay, ensuring every family has access to quality, affordable child care, and more.** **[It’s not enough to simply say we support women: we must do so through our actions and policies, and that’s exactly what Aruna and I plan to do together in office. clean_body: | = Happy International Women's Day, friends! Today is an opportunity I take to reflect on the countless impacts women have made in my own life, our communities, and throughout history. Though I worked hard to get where I am today, I know I wouldn’t be here without the support, strength, and guidance of my mom (who raised my sisters and I as a working single mother) my grandmother (Mama Win), my sisters, my aunts, and multiple teachers who believed in me when I didn’t believe in myself. And of course, my wife Dawn inspires and motivates me every day. Through their courage and compassion, women lift all of us up. So many women leaders both past and present are trailblazers and changemakers in our communities, state, and country. Aruna Miller is one of them. Aruna is a true partner, an experienced and principled legislator, a civil and transportation engineer, and a leader who puts people first. She was the first Indian American woman elected to our legislature, and with your support, she’ll be the first woman of color lieutenant governor in Maryland’s history. Together, Aruna and I will get to work on Day 1 to build a future where every Marylander can thrive. name: Marcus Flowers
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene’s embarrassing display at the State of the Union
body:
NBC: GOP Reps. Greene, Boebert heckle Biden throughout State of the Union address

Derek,
Team, I'll get straight to the point: last week, my opponent, Marjorie Taylor Greene, made a further embarrassment of herself by heckling the President throughout his speech including when he was talking about the tragic death of his son Beau Biden.
But here’s the silver lining in all of this: at this time next year, Marjorie Taylor Greene won't be able to heckle President Biden, because I will have taken her job in Congress.
The people of Georgia are sick and tired of being embarrassed by Marjorie Taylor Greene - and now it’s up to us to flip this seat into Democratic hands.
Marjorie Taylor Greene is a bully - and it’s time we stand up to her. Will you split a donation between my campaign and CommonGood to help us stand up to the radical right? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mf?refcode=20220308_CGVA_MF]

It's time to stand up for decency and democracy and DEFEAT Marjorie Taylor Greene.
Please, split a donation today between my campaign and Seth Moulton to make sure that was her LAST State of the Union.
Talk soon,
Marcus Flowers

name: Aadland For Congress
subject: Honoring women
body:
Showing gratitude on International Women's Day
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SMNxCEHasKCM_-c8uGmdW8U1kBzeO0ive7YDWyaMQqcB6xX7-Qb7pO5xLG0954SmgPeogqvDm8gdxopzGOw-hy11EYhsu7davou7yP1ijwUkZfMSso9hmvRjOYnLhEOPBVDLHNItji8lNxJeikbJOYFNuWLIxmbS&c=ef2yq8YdZalGdJVSF5KxZbk3eS5ugIIguOyea2BWjCCEarfSCJ-v1Q==&ch=1jirwrvoyh8o9Bm8dF70eOReX7K5DDCODCucW63Cp2G5OQ2assgKdA==)
---
|
---
| Honoring the women in our lives
---
Today we honor the many contributions women have made to our lives, our community, and our nation. As a son, a brother, a husband, and the father of daughters I have a deep appreciation for the contributions of women--I wouldn't be the person I am today without my mother, my wife, my sisters, and my children. Today, International Women's Day, is a worthy time to show them, and all women, gratitude.
Often on this occasion we think of the women who are headliners in history: Amelia Earhart, Anne Frank, Abigail Adams, Susan B. Anthony, Queen Elizabeth, Rosa Parks, and others. But today also think of the women in your life, what they have done to make it better, and how you can show them appreciation. Please join me in wishing everyone, whether in the same room, or around the world, Happy International Women's Day!
---

clean_body: Showing gratitude on International Women's Day | | | | == | | Honoring the women in our lives Today we honor the many contributions women have made to our lives, our community, and our nation. As a son, a brother, a husband, and the father of daughters I have a deep appreciation for the contributions of women--I wouldn't be the person I am today without my mother, my wife, my sisters, and my children. Today, International Women's Day, is a worthy time to show them, and all women, gratitude. Often on this occasion we think of the women who are headliners in history: Amelia Earhart, Anne Frank, Abigail Adams, Susan B. Anthony, Queen Elizabeth, Rosa Parks, and others. But today also think of the women in your life, what they have done to make it better, and how you can show them appreciation. Please join me in wishing everyone, whether in the same room, or around the world, Happy International Women's Day! | | | | == | | | PO Box 630552 Littleton, CO 80163 (720) 464 4488 | == == == | | | | | | | Aadland For Congress | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | Sent by mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com in collaboration with |

| | |

I wanted to share the latest out of Florida, friend:

With Senate control on the line and tonight's deadline quickly approaching, I'm still falling short of my midnight fundraising goal. **Let me explain why closing this gap is so critical:**
**Just 0.12% – only 10,033 votes** – decided Florida's last Senate race, and this race is bound to be just as close.
Polls show me neck and neck with Marco Rubio – with me **trailing by just ****2 points**.
With the Senate split 50-50, **Democrats are just 1 vote away** from securing voting rights protections, climate legislation and other crucial progress for working families.
My midnight fundraising deadline is just hours away, but I'm on track to fall short of my $20,000 goal without an immediate surge in grassroots support.
As Marco Rubio runs deceitful attack ads to smear my reputation and attack my career as a law enforcement officer, national Republicans are pouring $10 million into Florida to organize on the ground and flip the state red permanently. We want to take a quick moment to note that today is a special day here at Team Hayes. We are marking International Women’s Day AND.....fittingly, Jahana’s birthday! | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42720885/334050783/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjAxYzk2ZC1mNzllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IrKgHIGa4XDKd8wdIv4TfMtQTYrHicP0yQxByhIAZJ4=&emci=cf9ef0b5-639e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=d601c96d-f79e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15529135) | We want to take a quick moment to note that today is a special day here at Team Hayes. **We are marking International Women’s Day AND....._fittingly, Jahana’s birthday!_** On this International Women’s Day – a day on which we celebrate the strong, resilient women in our lives – we also celebrate our historic female leader. We are reminded that in order to stand for any woman, we must stand for ALL women, particularly at a moment when global conflicts demand the lived experiences of women be heard and accounted for in policymaking. Current world events are certainly making a strong case for more women in leadership. We have come a long way towards centering the experiences of women in public policy and there’s so much more to do. **If there aren’t diverse voices at the table, how can we expect those missing perspectives as part of the outcome?** As a birthday gift, we want to give the Congresswoman a fresh list of supporters who will help her through this year and beyond, so we can keep Jahana at the table fighting for YOU! There is a lot of work to do to get our message out above the noise – but with supporters like you we can keep fighting for our values, our country and our future. – Team Hayes = * Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you need to update your contact information, . body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42721545/334052399/-74008005?refcode=20220307_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmMxNDM3My1mODllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=82vNpoURIpSrNM7F4Z1Q2fy80sxi98zJEOlVEcneVJA=) Friend, This is urgent, friend: I'm just 2 points behind Marco Rubio in a race that experts are saying will decide Senate control – but I'm falling short of my end-of-quarter fundraising goal at the worst possible moment. With your help, this team is closing the polling gap with Rubio – but unfortunately, we still don't have enough to compete with the GOP's deep pockets. I know our grassroots movement has what it takes to pull ahead and flip Florida blue, but I need to meet my ambitious end-of-quarter fundraising goal to have a shot. [**Please, split a $25 donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton right now to help me stay on track.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42721546/334052400/-74008005?refcode=20220307_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmMxNDM3My1mODllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=82vNpoURIpSrNM7F4Z1Q2fy80sxi98zJEOlVEcneVJA=) Florida's last Senate election was decided by just 0.12 points – only 10,033 votes – and this race is bound to be just as close. Do you know what that means, friend? Every single dollar is going to make a huge impact on our efforts to win in Florida. I can't afford to cut a single hour of canvassing or phone banking, because every voter I fail to reach could cost me this election. It's urgent, friend: Marco Rubio is breaking fundraising records – and national Republicans have already poured $10 million into this race to keep Democrats like me from winning in Florida again. This is a make-or-break moment for my campaign, so I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me close this fundraising gap, pull ahead in the polls and defeat Marco Rubio. It's the only way to defend the Senate majority and defend our democracy from the GOP. [**Please, friend, split a donation of $25 or more right now to help me close this critical end-of-quarter fundraising gap before the end of March. In a race this close, every dollar counts, so I need you to contribute whatever you can to help me defeat
