clean_body: | | | = Friend, This is urgent, friend: I'm just 2 points behind Marco Rubio in a race that experts are saying will decide Senate control – but I'm falling short of my end-of-quarter fundraising goal at the worst possible moment. With your help, this team is closing the polling gap with Rubio – but unfortunately, we still don't have enough to compete with the GOP's deep pockets. I know our grassroots movement has what it takes to pull ahead and flip Florida blue, but I need to meet my ambitious end-of-quarter fundraising goal to have a shot. = Florida's last Senate election was decided by just 0.12 points – only 10,033 votes – and this race is bound to be just as close. Do you know what that means, friend? Every single dollar is going to make a huge impact on our efforts to win in Florida. I can't afford to cut a single hour of canvassing or phone banking, because every voter I fail to reach could cost me this election. It's urgent, friend: Marco Rubio is breaking fundraising records – and national Republicans have already poured $10 million into this race to keep Democrats like me from winning in Florida again. This is a make-or-break moment for my campaign, so I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me close this fundraising gap, pull ahead in the polls and defeat Marco Rubio. It's the only way to defend the Senate majority and defend our democracy from the GOP. = = Thank you, Val Demings = | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: Harriet Hageman
subject: It's time to FIRE Liz Cheney, are you with me?
body:
Will you help me FIRE Liz Cheney and take back our conservative movement from the elitist establishment that is working arm-in-arm with Joe Biden?... |
Dear Peter,

Will you help me **FIRE Liz Cheney** and take back our conservative movement from the elitist establishment that is working arm-in-arm with Joe Biden?

No sooner had President Trump endorsed my primary challenge to Liz Cheney did she shoot back with her usual arrogance to _" bring it."_

[**Well, I'm counting on you to help me bring it by chipping in with an emergency donation to my campaign.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59774896:67zuxOENm:m:1:3298722022:B86FBEDF03B2D2D7E42C7AA01AEA5CFB:r)
[DONATE NOW TO FIRE LIZ CHENEY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59774896:67zuxOENm:m:1:3298722022:B86FBEDF03B2D2D7E42C7AA01AEA5CFB:r)
You and I don't have a moment to lose...

That's because establishment elitists, like George W. Bush, headline ritzy fundraisers in other states to raise _millions_ for Cheney.

That was even after Cheney admitted in a _60 Minutes_ interview that her record-breaking fundraising haul was helped out by Democrats.

If there was ever a time for conservative Americans to stand up to the elitist establishment, it's now. And it's against Liz Cheney. [**Will you help me with an urgent donation today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59774896:67zuxOENm:m:1:3298722022:B86FBEDF03B2D2D7E42C7AA01AEA5CFB:r)

I'm getting ahead of myself.

Before you decide to give to my campaign to FIRE establishment-anointed Liz Cheney from Congress, **let me tell you a little about who I am, why President Trump endorsed my primary challenge, and why we need your immediate help.**

My name is Harriet Hageman, and Wyoming is my home.

Growing up on a ranch outside Ft. Laramie, I learned the value of hard work, integrity, self-sufficiency, and honesty from an early age.

They're not just the values that Joe Biden and his socialists hate - they run absolutely counter to the establishment elites who have for too long controlled our Republican Party...and sold out our country to the highest bidder.

**I should know - like many in my state, and many more around the country, I was dupped by these same "Republicans."**

**And as a constitutional lawyer who fought against Bill Clinton's EPA regulations, I watched in disgust as establishment elites like Liz Cheney embraced big government and abandoned our conservative values.**

Unfortunately, it's only gotten worse since President Trump left office.

And now, backed by their friends on the left and the media, Cheney and the establishment are waging a full-blown war on Americans like you and me!

[**No more. Will you support my campaign to defeat Liz Cheney by making an emergency donation today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59774896:67zuxOENm:m:1:3298722022:B86FBEDF03B2D2D7E42C7AA01AEA5CFB:r)
[DONATE NOW TO FIRE LIZ CHENEY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59774896:67zuxOENm:m:1:3298722022:B86FBEDF03B2D2D7E42C7AA01AEA5CFB:r)
As I said at the start of this email, **President Trump is 100% behind me.**

He knows the people of Wyoming - and the American people - deserve better than Cheney, and he knows I'll never abandon our conservative values once elected to Congress.

In Wyoming, we have a long and proud history of standing up against an overbearing government.

In Washington, I promise to do the same...

...unlike Cheney, who spends more time fist-bumping Joe Biden and complimenting Nancy Pelosi than she does fighting back against big government bureaucrats who _waste our tax dollars_ , _fling open our borders_ , and _silence, censor, and even lock up conservatives_ who disagree!

**But even though I have President Trump's complete and total endorsement, there's one endorsement I still need:_yours_.**

[**Will you make an emergency campaign donation to let me know I have it?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59774896:67zuxOENm:m:1:3298722022:B86FBEDF03B2D2D7E42C7AA01AEA5CFB:r)
[DONATE NOW TO FIRE LIZ CHENEY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59774896:67zuxOENm:m:1:3298722022:B86FBEDF03B2D2D7E42C7AA01AEA5CFB:r)
You should know that, even though polls show Cheney is grossly unpopular in Wyoming, she still thinks she can win re-election.

**In fact, when liberal _60 Minutes_ asked her if she could beat me in the primary, she said "absolutely...this is going to be the most important House race in the country."**

Well, she was right about something - this will be the most important race in the entire country - but only because it will be the first step in saving America from the big government elites who enable Joe Biden.

Again, I'll need your help to beat her.

As I said, Cheney can count on the deep pocketbooks of the entire establishment.

That's not even saying anything for her left-wing supporters, who see this as their chance to weaken our Republican Party for good.

**But with your help, I know we can beat them. And I know we can send the disastrous Cheney political dynasty packing _for good_.**

[**So please, won't you make an emergency campaign donation to FIRE Liz Cheney right away?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59774896:67zuxOENm:m:1:3298722022:B86FBEDF03B2D2D7E42C7AA01AEA5CFB:r)
[DONATE NOW TO FIRE LIZ CHENEY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59774896:67zuxOENm:m:1:3298722022:B86FBEDF03B2D2D7E42C7AA01AEA5CFB:r)
Liz Cheney represents everything the left stands for, and everything we must fight against.

Will you help me make sure we win that fight?

Respectfully,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59774896:67zuxOENm:m:1:3298722022:B86FBEDF03B2D2D7E42C7AA01AEA5CFB:r)
Harriet Hageman
America First Conservative for Congress (WY)

PS: It's disgusting to see Liz Cheney teaming up with George Bush to demonize conservatives and raise millions to back Nancy Pelosi's unconstitutional power grabs in Congress.

It's even more disgusting to watch her claim she speaks for the people of Wyoming and America.

[**No more - will you make an urgent donation to my campaign to defeat her in the Republican primary?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59774896:67zuxOENm:m:1:3298722022:B86FBEDF03B2D2D7E42C7AA01AEA5CFB:r)

[DONATE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59774896:67zuxOENm:m:1:3298722022:B86FBEDF03B2D2D7E42C7AA01AEA5CFB:r)

---

| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59774896:67zuxOENm:m:1:3298722022:B86FBEDF03B2D2D7E42C7AA01AEA5CFB:r)
---

| Paid for by:
HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING
P.O. Box 4157
Cheyenne, WY 82003
---

# Peter,

The lamestream Fake News media – based on their own merits – has declared that there was _no evidence of widespread fraud_ in Oklahoma's 2020 election... without ever conducting a forensic audit first. There are still lingering questions and concerns regarding the integrity of the 2020 election. While the corrupt political establishment refuses to take action, I have introduced legislation in the Oklahoma Senate to ensure fair and free elections. [Election integrity should be an important issue for all elected officials, Peter. Make an URGENT donation to my campaign today to support a proven conservative leader who takes action >>>](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Ctc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/MVDqgzz7-tKW4m_j3p2mlmvWW6WXg814GpDrWN7TcW293lLBmV1-WJV7CgKfvW2qb1FY3wx28yW3_nmrH1CFW92W4bRk0K5-d_ktW6q77zz7TksdVW3wvv9y8g4xkRW59J5sG5rtzRDW1sVjCk2kTtgYW4B0xJg90snDlV2lB5Q5FVgjTW7X-ZdR4L7Vf7W74pXr-6qN_WcW5yj7Zt2w1wl4W7qF-_g4gPJnXW2shmlW20VDT-W1Sj-cP6TyhgcW1_wl1h4mgJBNW8bVYx26g4_dbW4rR63G488CzwW507zwW1CjSbWW225-QJ2JRL6sW62dLFy4zKSN4W1TpzdB4T5Wn239Z11)

Washington needs leaders who take action. Conservatives claim to support full forensic audits of the 2020 election, but what steps are they taking to ensure fair and free elections? I have introduced four bills to the Oklahoma Senate to protect our electoral process from the people who are willing to commit fraud: SB 1690 \- Calls for a forensic audit of the 2020 election SB 1748 \- Specifies valid reasons that individuals may ask for an absentee ballot SB 1805 \- Creates a system of perforated ballots, allowing voters to tear off a numbered section of the ballot to review online later. ALL ballots would be accessible to the public, but only the individual would be able to match their identifier to their ballot SB 1820 \- Requires every notary in the state to submit a copy of their receipt book for the 90 days preceding the election. Copies must be provided within 30 days of the election If passed, each bill will be implemented prior to the November 2022 election, ensuring a fair and free election in Oklahoma. [The American people have lost faith in our electoral process. Make a donation to my campaign today and I will restore that faith when elected to the US Senate >>> ](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Ctc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/MVDqgzz7-tKW4m_j3p2mlmvWW6WXg814GpDrWN7TcW293lLBmV1-WJV7CgWk8W4G4YVw5V7md2W3Y2lqw7b9_rgN57Kq1lsN7g9VYdxjx2fZHnlW2cczK52rWvhzN5SJMPD3KgBjW5qNRkv9fC5RdW2MKlLW8-Gxm2W7rR3Hs1DwXzwVhKhVD2SD1kYW7d8KFz6LBRb0W12BfKl8zKV5ZW1lkXr_3L16jyN70wvMCwV91dW7HLZPR3syDwzW49RTZg92NqMXW4fKFkX8_T3m7VBtH3p2y-KqNW95nn_Q2mrGq8W7Jp2pt6v80r3W7Fmmn_7FSvM5W92B_TB5_C7Ny36VM1) For Liberty,

name: Vernon Jones for Congress
subject: Patrick Witt exits Georgia’s 10th Congressional District Race; endorses Vernon Jones
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jones for Georgia JonesforGeorgia
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
Trump-endorsed Congressional candidate (GA-10) and former State Rep. Vernon Jones (R) receives endorsement from Patrick Witt.
---
| |
---
|
---
| Morgan County, GA (March 8, 2022): Today, Patrick Witt, lifelong conservative and election integrity advocate, announced his departure from the race for Georgia's 10th Congressional District.
"Like me, Vernon has been a steadfast ally of President Trump, and I know he is committed to fighting for our great state in Congress," Witt said in a statement announcing his candidacy for Georgia Insurance Commissioner.
"I couldn't be more humbled to have the support of such a tried and true conservative like Patrick Witt. He served our country admirably in the Trump White House, fought tirelessly to secure the integrity of our elections, and has been on the frontlines of the America First movement for as long as I've known him," said Rep. Vernon Jones
Since being endorsed by President Trump, the MAGA movement has begun to coalesce around the candidacy of America First candidate Vernon Jones. Recent polling, [conducted by Fabrizio Lee](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QQ36c8O76XSoTIkUWvLNLjOJalrVDgl_BTtdm9lbSYMrCrHVA55duod7cgD2uxkgMHKBWUm3yKYOtWvfHdvK_doNyc0ZD1LKmxOvBxy3Lv_ICJymfrc3IM_8hTcm4cZFmyiP-VXVTHiKjqmrMsAcf7o3Rfo4is18hY65-yMfkRsS1WcpQBekxYc2gqccewb9esSjvsYhF_xciTkO3HU2yQ==&c=yNTyfTij5n4hjlKxq-ETIcry1aLHeRWuNFYpOZV2JkAwv7exhowIuw==&ch=l1sPCxsrTP1WCQwD83dNT1Auvl67bQfcwUc3FPqN1J_TFeRB3B5hUQ==), shows Jones 18 points ahead of his nearest competitor, making him the clear front runner in the race to be the next Congressman from Georgia's 10th Congressional District.
Next week, President Trump will host a fundraiser for Rep. Jones at his private Mar-a-Lago golf club.

The press may email vernonjonespress@jonesforgeorgia.com to confirm press time for an interview on the event.
---
| |
---
About Vernon Jones
---
| |
---
Vernon Jones is running for Georgia's 10th Congressional District. He is a former member of the GA House of Representatives (1993-2001, 2017-2021) and former Chief Executive Officer of DeKalb County, GA. A former Democrat, Jones officially switched parties in January 2021 after endorsing Donald J. Trump for President and speaking at the 2020 Republican National Convention. The proud Republican is now running in GA10, as a Pro-Trump candidate who will fight for free and fair elections, and always put Georgia and America First.
---
|
---

name: Clay Aiken
subject: I want to know what you care about
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clay Aiken for North Carolina
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94965/images/Clay%20Logo%20Light.png]
March Madness is coming up and a bunch of us here at HQ are getting excited to fill out our brackets this weekend. I actually won my friendly bracket pool last season (totally by luck) so we at the campaign office thought it would be fun to have a little tournament of our own.
I know the Triangle well, and I know many of you... but I still have a lot to learn. I wanna take every opportunity to listen, learn, and make a real impact. And on the big decisions facing our community, your voice matters the most to me. So we’ve created an issues survey for y’all to fill out — because I want to know what your priorities are.
To add a bit of fun, we’ve made it a bracket! To be clear, all these issues are serious and need to be addressed by our elected leaders. There are some tough head-to-head matchups below... eager to see your thoughts on what you feel is a top priority facing our community.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/_bvtU1pG40OKf5LAlx5XIQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/_bvtU1pG40OKf5LAlx5XIQ2]
Take this short survey to tell us which political issue is YOUR top priority... and let’s see which one wins! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/_bvtU1pG40OKf5LAlx5XIQ2]
take survey [https://secure.ngpvan.com/_bvtU1pG40OKf5LAlx5XIQ2]
These are serious issues — all of which absolutely must be addressed. But I hope you’ll join us in turning hard conversations into some community-building. If we wanna bring compassion and civility back to North Carolina politics, we’re gonna need to find some joy along the way.
So Happy March Madness from Team Clay to you! Please take a couple minutes to fill out our issues survey, and when it comes to 🏀, whether you're rooting for the Blue Devils, the Tar Heels, a Cinderella team, or just hoping your bracket doesn’t get busted, I hope you have some fun this month. — And maybe we’ll see a North Carolina team take home the title again!🤞🏻🤞🏻🤞🏻🤞🏻
Clay
Clay is running for Congress in the North Carolina 6th. He was born, raised, and is currently raising his son in the Triangle. He's running to use his voice to speak up and stop the loudest voices on the far ends of the political spectrum from sucking up all the oxygen in our political discourse.
Donate now to join the chorus and help send Clay to Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]
Paid for by Clay Aiken for North Carolina
Clay Aiken for North Carolina
PO Box 13274
Durham, NC 27709
United States

body:

---
| For immediate release March 8, 2022 Jake Evans Qualifies to lead the Great American Comeback Constitutional Warrior ready to lead the Great American Comeback in Congress Constitutional Warrior Jake Evans today qualified to run for Georgia's 6th Congressional District as the only true America First conservative in the race. "By replacing a liberal Democrat with an America First conservative, Georgia can lead the way for the Great American Comeback that voters will deliver this year," Jake said. "We're suffering the disastrous results of Far Left policies: inflation caused by out of control spending, the loss of energy independence and autocrats emboldened by American weakness. In Congress, I will fight to stop the Biden agenda and restore the policies that brought peace and prosperity to our country. "I'm honored by the support that our campaign has earned, and we now begin the final stretch that will lead us to victory - and to taking back our country."

name: Rushern Baker
subject: State of emergency
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

Friend,
Last week this campaign held a press conference pledging to declare a state of emergency in Baltimore City to address the gun violence crisis.
More than 2000 mostly young, Black men have been killed in Baltimore over the past eight years, and if that’s not an emergency, then I don’t know what is. You can guarantee that if this was happening in Howard or Anne Arundel County, we would have taken action a long time ago.
I will not stand idly by or take the politically easy route while thousands of families in our state’s largest city continue to be uprooted by violence. The continued increase of violent crime in Baltimore may be the single greatest challenge for Maryland’s next governor.
That’s why Nancy and I have put together a series of immediate steps we can take to address this crisis from multiple angles. The people of Baltimore have been neglected for far too long.
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Thank you,
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Rushern L. Baker, III
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
**P.S. because of Maryland’s Public Finance program, your donation will be eligible for a matching program explained here [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
By Authority, Baker and Navarro for Maryland, Calvin Brown, Treasurer
Baker & Navarro for Maryland
9646 Marlboro Pike
Upper Marlboro , MD 20772
United States

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42724585/334067398/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTYwNWNmYi0wMDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xbIr0Sb_ng-rY5gC5nrykudbUnXaOwYSGmmbmz0Dje8=&emci=5a069608-fa9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=31605cfb-009f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Regular delivery and pickup of mail here in Virginia and all over the United States has become increasingly unreliable in recent years. And that is unacceptable. Getting your mail in a timely manner shouldn’t be too much to ask. For a while now I’ve been asking the hard questions on why USPS has been having so much trouble. And now, I’m happy to report that the Senate is actively considering a bill that will help with some of these issues. [_**The Postal Service Reform Act is currently being considered in the Senate – our opportunity to spur the kind of changes folks in Virginia and across the country want to see. Add your name to the petition now if you support much-need postal service reform.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42724586/334067399/1632826283?ms=mw_em_220308_1&refcode=mw_em_220308_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTYwNWNmYi0wMDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xbIr0Sb_ng-rY5gC5nrykudbUnXaOwYSGmmbmz0Dje8=&emci=5a069608-fa9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=31605cfb-009f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4568237) This bipartisan boost to the United States Postal Service will save $50 billion over the next ten years. It also includes much needed accountability and transparency. USPS would be required to have data on national and local level service performance available online. **And most importantly, it mandates postal service at least six days per week.** [_**The benefits of this bill are clear for anyone who has experienced recent issues with the postal service. Sign our petition now to urge the Senate to quickly pass this bill.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42724587/334067401/1632826283?ms=mw_em_220308_1&refcode=mw_em_220308_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTYwNWNmYi0wMDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xbIr0Sb_ng-rY5gC5nrykudbUnXaOwYSGmmbmz0Dje8=&emci=5a069608-fa9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=31605cfb-009f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4568237) Thank you, Mark **[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42724588/334067402/1632826283?ms=mw_em_220308_1&refcode=mw_em_220308_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTYwNWNmYi0wMDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xbIr0Sb_ng-rY5gC5nrykudbUnXaOwYSGmmbmz0Dje8=&emci=5a069608-fa9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=31605cfb-009f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4568237)**

name: Marjorie K. Eastman
subject: I’m sick of hearing this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marjorie K
body:
Career politicians want us to believe they’re the ones responsible for keeping America safe and protecting our freedoms. Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this [link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=833f5ce1190843e29ec81dee2685dc18&_e=uNhodMOW5n72HG56idj1U1kKoDzWonrrWwnU5rDUZzXPyBWb6ZoDjlJgsvq7UAFVwu1MwVGarQoCNHWceHHClt-9jKbELePdwikc1xllMmP3dnnrtF2AxrfQdqHSRxqVPVwlZNzCP2cFJeye-VFnIDgn8jLrbSOsn_zBV1nZhrOEjKu8SzAIOUhZR5mXAqH5osyZu8tzCIMo1g_vJEkVj6Ru-97k2ijG0-IMCHQxIj3gh-Mr6BF8ef_LjWArj4LIhFpasJTFBXtbR9nakg-RHcBrSOdTcJuM756bYnVX2uw4dS8q0C4KiGj-ODkKo2fUXo-2R5jsv3Q1_oVOm5ASHXUR57xKWKSUfpYgUp10ICVVcNdeUeioLJpDRKuiwIx_BCzTEcEo78Fl-L2-KF8zfO6UZtWjz3nCjGU99orJmYzzytWPp5zp-7UkaBX_2t-qgrCMvoucA0Vl4iO0XaWJK_wf0078XLfrR_BdNi5PjAQ%3D) [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=833f5ce1190843e29ec81dee2685dc18&_e=vyIfQPN5IIyuED0BwW-gT3T2paYtP_vXeMdOvQcXoqtz8DxZSKqqPmczL3fXek1d71EBuV3Zk-w0SW67EoUrhzRQlZxXGZx_-jFcknDp9TaELykvJQA1wBWWSiyR4PSmI3erOVPYSb024vsj1PiHKUXZ6-pfOgNKjDRXABdg_D8uQwX10yFobPfblv708XL0fv10Li548w5NfJuedljVsL3ZWzWGx1T2QcIVSeOTlGPpcAYVyWCrpD6VathOTx_Qz2YUlCJWILJapSRcGZofZpTll1rftzYs64Gf9MxN3Wq_F2fIoy7BcyxJbgXWZ3HHBfPlOAIK83YRWrC79kyV_ZR62Kb6q411CnjOub96euVPLxood-PUbxM13VGxIvnJI16wbO3-e2loQRfv3lnYkEuh9Xa51RLDIWIa6Wz-24AhWsah5n-8SWKq1ZO_jZK-XKWgka8YbswEW5wNhh7Qb_tu2iCHFbAQjZ1dcCYTCa3e-QSdraiLliA-O80VQx_7v4tLrDluObeJ2A-AoPpzyg%3D%3D) Peter, Career politicians want us to believe they’re the ones responsible for keeping America safe and protecting our freedoms. _Let’s set the record straight._ **That credit belongs to our men and women in uniform who make unimaginable sacrifices to serve and defend our country every. single. day.** _Here’s what career politicians ARE responsible for, though:_
* The inflation wrecking our economy
* The disastrous and deadly withdrawal from Afghanistan
* The chaos at our southern border

**My name is Marjorie K. Eastman. I’m a veteran, military spouse, mother, and business leader – and I’m running to represent North Carolina in the U.S. Senate.** Career politicians got our country into this mess and they have no idea how to get us out. **[That was my message on the debate stage the other night which you can see for yourself clean_body: Career politicians want us to believe they’re the ones responsible for keeping America safe and protecting our freedoms. Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this Peter, Career politicians want us to believe they’re the ones responsible for keeping America safe and protecting our freedoms. Let’s set the record straight. That credit belongs to our men and women in uniform who make unimaginable sacrifices to serve and defend our country every. single. day. Here’s what career politicians ARE responsible for, though: The inflation wrecking our economy The disastrous and deadly withdrawal from Afghanistan The chaos at our southern border My name is Marjorie K. Eastman. I’m a veteran, military spouse, mother, and business leader – and I’m running to represent North Carolina in the U.S. Senate. Career politicians got our country into this mess and they have no idea how to get us out. While I was on the frontlines in Afghanistan, the career politicians I’m running against were attending fundraisers, shipping jobs overseas, and getting rich off your taxpayer dollars. They spent their careers going after you , your livelihood, and your freedom. Now, these same career politicians are attacking me because they’re terrified of losing** theirjobs. Peter, I’m the ONLY combat veteran and political outsider in this race. I haven’t spent decades raising money and taking donations from super PACs, which puts me at a fundraising disadvantage. When I joined the Army, I took an oath to protect and defend those freedoms. That’s what I’ve always done – and will continue to do in the U.S. Senate. I bring something unique to this race, Peter. I’m the only combat veteran and conservative outsider. I know what it means to go to war, to put your life on the line for your country. I’ve seen first-hand what freedom trulycosts – and that’s something that can’t be bought. In the days and weeks after 9/11, I was like so many other Americans. I felt compelled to serve my country, and I have – through 10 years of intelligence service and two deployments. When I returned home, I faced a personal battle: my son was diagnosed with cancer. I quickly transitioned back into mom mode. My husband and I prayed every day, and eventually, my son beat his diagnosis. I’ve stood by my husband and supported his military career while also working in the private and non-profit sector, all with their own unique challenges. All of these battles led me to this mission today. By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically. Our nation’s best days are ahead of us as long as our leaders are battle-tested and answer to the American people. Thank you, Marjorie K. Eastman | Use of Marjorie K. name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: the costs of war

Hello,
Russia launched an unprovoked, full-scale attack against Ukraine. And there is nothing “smart, “savvy,” or “genius” about it – no matter what Donald Trump says. We must stand with the people of Ukraine.
For 4 years, my opponent Chuck Grassley applauded as Mr. Trump tore up our treaties and eroded America’s reputation abroad by alienating our allies and capitulating to Vladimir Putin. The result is what we see now.
More than ever, we need people in leadership right now who understand the costs of war. As a retired three-star admiral with over 36 years of service in the U.S. Navy, I would be the most senior military person ever elected to the Senate.
**I’m running against Chuck Grassley because I defended democracy around the globe. You can be sure I’ll defend it every day in the United States Senate.**
All the polling shows we are in for a nail-biter of a race, and the stakes could not be higher. If we defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, Democrats are guaranteed to hold onto our Senate majority.
The only way to fight back against the millions of dollars Trump and McConnell’s Super PACs are going to spend against me is with your help now. **We need to raise $250,000 before our critical mid-month deadline, but we’re still falling short. If I’m going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now.**
[**I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important. Please, may I count on you to urgently give $5 or more right now – whatever you can spare before our critical mid-month deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42724988/334069471/-42398318?refcode=em20220308mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWU3MzU3MS0wMTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ck7cYrqZifDqYTEyk_FgynTUShCk55WAXk9S2iA49Go=)

Hey team — I have some unsettling news. **One of my GOP opponents, Assemblyman Kevin Kiley, recently announced he’s raised over $800,000.** How did he do it? Well, Kiley made a name for himself when he ran against Governor Newsom in the recall election. He headlined rallies with alt-right leaders and claimed to lead the charge against mask and vaccine policies. _We know his consultants are telling him to stockpile this money and use it on negative ads against me. We have to be ready to counter their lies if we want to flip CA-03._ [Friend, can you chip in any amount to help us counter Kiley’s huge influx of GOP cash?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42725674/334072249/-682417230?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220308KileyCash_PG_active_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Nzg4MWI1Mi0wMjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n3D9gpjLdhHV-IXaECL9m83nIDkPfA_KhCiIzHwbjzo=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Hey team — I have some unsettling news. One of my GOP opponents, Assemblyman Kevin Kiley, recently announced he’s raised over $800,000. How did he do it? Well, Kiley made a name for himself when he ran against Governor Newsom in the recall election. He headlined rallies with alt-right leaders and claimed to lead the charge against mask and vaccine policies. We know his consultants are telling him to stockpile this money and use it on negative ads against me. body:
Dear Peter ,
We are thrilled to have formally received the CA Democratic Party's endorsement of Mia's Re-election campaign!
We are grateful for this vote of confidence for the work Mia is doing in Sacramento to continue bringing opportunities to communities who have been left behind for too long.
On Thursday, April 14th from 5:30 pm - 7:00 pm we will host our first fundraiser for 2022 and we hope you will join us. We ask you to consider becoming a sponsor now and have your name added to the invitation which will be sent out next week, with other event details.
The timing of this event is critical as we have an April 23rd reporting deadline and want to show the strength of our campaign.
Sponsorship levels are: $4,900 • $2,500 • $1,500 • $750 • $500
Please contact Laurie Earp at 510-839-3100 or laurie@earpevents.com to add your name to our Sponsor list today.
We look forward to seeing you April 14th and having the opportunity to speak about the campaign, our goals and work towards June 7th.
Thank you for all you do!
Yours,
Team Bonta
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89949/images/reelection.jpg]
Mia Bonta

name: =?UTF-8?B?4piGQ0kgb24gYmVoYWxmIG9mIEhpbGxzZGFsZSBDb2xsZWdl?=
subject: Our Founders admired these heroes
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs_1ZqZHSN

Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius,
Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus? While many Americans today wouldn't
recognize these names
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os_1ZqZHSN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Greetings
Friend,

I have
something a little unusual for you today. It's about our upcoming
online course, and I'd like to share with you some of the reasons
why we produced it.

We
generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire,
powerful (and sometimes mad) emperors, and grand architecture.

But
obscured by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial
Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far
different form of government.

In fact,
Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from
the Roman Republic.

The story
of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes
in the middle of the Italian Peninsula to dominate the
Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a fascinating tale of
political achievement, military genius, and the perils of
success.

In March,
to help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we
will release our newest free online course, "The Rise and Fall of
the Roman Republic." And I wanted you to be one of the first to
know.

Because
you've helped make these free online courses possible, I'd like
to share an exclusive video from the new course with you.

You can
watch the video we've prepared for you and pre-register for the
new course right here:

Friend,
the history of the Roman Republic is full of moral exemplars and
cautionary tales.

In the
course, Hillsdale College professors Ken Calvert and Carl Young
also show how America's Founding Fathers looked to the republican
heroes of Rome to serve as models of statesmanship and virtue.

Learning
their history can show us the conditions necessary to preserve a
republic . . . and how a republic may lose its way.

That's
why we are releasing this new, free online course, "The Rise and
Fall of the Roman Republic," on the Ides of March-March 15.

You can
watch your exclusive video at the secure link below.

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/roman-republic-preregister/

After
watching the video, I hope you will pre-register to take the
full, free course. And after you pre-register for this important,
new course, will you also consider giving a special
tax-deductible gift?

Your
generous gift will help us reach our $150,000 funding goal to
promote this course and our other educational efforts nationwide.

And, for
a gift of any size, we'll send you a free color map of the Roman
world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper.
This map is a helpful companion to the course and will help you
locate many of the places and events discussed in the lectures.

Given the
state of our republic, we must get this new course in front of as
many Americans as possible. There's another reason your support
is vital...

As you
may know, Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government
funding-even indirectly in the form of federal or state student
loans and grants. That means that these courses, along with
everything else we do here, depend on the generous, private
support of friends like YOU, Friend.

Please
help us enroll as many Americans as possible in "The Rise and
Fall of the Roman Republic" so we can learn from Rome's history
and find hope where they failed.

Best
regards,

Kyle
Murnen, '09
Director
of Online Learning
Hillsdale
College

P.S. On
the Ides of March (March 15), we're releasing our newest free
online course, "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."

We've
produced the course because the history of the Roman Republic
provides one of the greatest stories of political and military
achievement in human history-and reveals the difficulties and
dangers presented by this kind of success.

You can
watch a video preview for the course and pre-register using this
secure link:

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/roman-republic-preregister/

Please
help us enroll as many Americans as possible in "The Rise and
Fall of the Roman Republic" so we can discover the lessons of the
greatest republic of the ancient world.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Team Never Again
subject: Today, on International Women's Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
The mission is simple. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42726421/334075582/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyNjVkMmQyLTA0OWYtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=V7o9Be636RVgaOynLlRxE9lfrNhZWrnKH79iDBvmKMs=&emci=fad986ec-f69e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=2265d2d2-049f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=16335001) Team,

A year ago, the United Nations Commission on the Status of Women concluded that **the status of a democracy depends fundamentally on the empowerment of women.**

We couldn't agree more and that's why today, on International Women's Day, we’re asking you to split a donation between us and EMILY's List so that our organizations can continue to elect Democratic women and defend our democracy.

name: Nikki Fried
subject: BREAKING - the “Don’t Say Gay” bill just passed the Senate
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,

DeSantis and his allies have done it again.

Today, the GOP’s infamous “Don’t Say Gay” bill passed through the Florida Senate and now, like their abortion ban, it’s headed to DeSantis’ desk.

We all know what this bill does — it silences and alienates LGBTQ youth. It takes away vital sources of support and guidance. And it puts children's lives at risk.

That’s why, no matter what happens next, we need to keep fighting back. We need to do everything we can to protect LGBTQ youth from the impact of this legislation.

So, once again, I’d like to invite you to join me in supporting Equality Florida and their work to protect LGBTQ children. Click here to make a contribution today.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/freetosaygay]

Support Equality Florida [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/freetosaygay]

This legislative session has shown us just how far our state has fallen under DeSantis’ authoritarian dictatorship.

Last week, they passed an abortion ban with no exceptions for rape, incest, and human trafficking. This week, they’re abusing the power of the state to prohibit discussions of gender identity and sexual orientation in schools.

One by one, DeSantis and his allies are taking away our fundamental freedoms. They’re actively targeting women and children in some of the most blatant displays of cruelty Florida’s seen in decades.

But, if we continue to stand together and demand better for our state, I know we can put a stop to this insanity. If you’re with me, click here to support Equality Florida and fight back against the GOP’s bigoted, anti-LGBTQ agenda. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/freetosaygay]

Thank you for standing with me.

— Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor

6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

I’m losing to this crazy, leftist opponent of mine, and I honestly need some help.

**_Without your support, there are a few things that are going to happen:_**

* Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate is going to represent Louisiana in the U.S. Senate

* The Socialist Left will have a Senate Majority and will take away our Second Amendment rights, destroy our borders, and create chaos in our communities

* Draconian nationwide mandates will be passed because there will be nobody in Washington Left to stand up to the Left and tell it how it is

| | Peter,

Tonight is the night! If you are able to make it, come to our campaign rally tonight! You have helped us build a movement that has rarely been seen in Minnesota. Let's continue the momentum!
**We will be joined by Vikings Legend and Pro-Life Champion Matt Birk!**
Come meet other FIRED UP Minnesotans, get pictures and make memories.

RSVP directly to [Barbara@DrScottJensen.com](mailto:Barbara@DrScottJensen.com?subject=RSVP%3A%20March%208th) OR click the flyer below. There is no obligation to donate, but we will have opportunities to give if you so choose!

---
| **The details for the event are as follows:**
_When: Tuesday, March 8th_
6:00-7:30 PM
Doors open at 5:30

_Where: Omni Viking Lakes Hotel_
2611 Nordic Way
Eagan, MN 55121

If you RSVP'd, also [click "GOING" on Facebook](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=286ce4ef81&e=33b11688c1) so other delegates and alternates can see!

_Cash bar will be available. Donations optional, but always welcome!_
If it's too late or too far away, do not worry! We will continue traveling the state and be near you soon. _This won't be the last opportunity --- NOT even close!_ YOU are the reason we will defeat Tim Walz in November.

In Freedom,
Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor

name: Jo Ann Davidson
subject: I am proud to endorse Matt Dolan for U.S. Senate
body:
March 8, 2022

One year ago, Senator Rob Portman announced that this term would be
his last in the U.S. Senate. Having known Rob as a man of integrity,
selflessness, and principle, I was disappointed in his decision. With the
challenges confronting our nation at the present moment, we need public
servants of conviction willing to put the needs of our state and nation above
politics and personal ambition. Rob is one of those leaders and Ohio has
benefited from his service.

Since Rob’s announcement a number of candidates have considered
and launched campaigns to take his place. It isn’t often that one of these
offices changes hands. There’s a gravity to this moment in that it will likely
mark a new direction for our state. I have been asked regularly about my
thoughts on the Republican Primary. Out of respect for the candidates, some of
whom I know personally, I have declined to share my opinions publicly. And yet,
in recent weeks, I have come to see the tone and tenor of the contest shift. In
these moments, like many Ohio Republicans, I ask myself what kind of public
servant this moment requires.I now say, without reservation, that I strongly
believe that leader to be Matt Dolan.

Our nation is on a calamitous path. One in which families are
struggling under the crushing weight of rising prices. The rule of law is
breaking down inside our local communities, and we lack a concrete policy
agenda and clear vision for moving the nation forward. Overseas, we find
America’s allies and interests under attack. We have abdicated leadership in
regions of the world that carry tremendous weight and influence in our own
affairs. It’s clear we need not only a change of direction, but also the
personification of skill and values sets capable of meeting these challenges.

Matt Dolan is a lifelong Ohioan who, from the moment he entered
this race, has carried the banner of the Republican Party with pride and honor.
He has run a campaign that is squarely focused on Ohio’s needs and has offered
conservative solutions to the multitude of challenges presently confronting our
businesses, families, farmers and workers. What’s perhaps most impressive about
Matt is his preparedness to serve. As a former prosecutor, Assistant Attorney
General, State Representative and current State Senator, Matt Dolan has worked
to make our state a better place for men and women to live, work and raise a
family. For Matt, this race is personal because he has a vested interest in
seeing Ohio grow and become stronger. This simple truth shines through in both
his campaign and conduct.

Some will say this endorsement is a slight on others. It’s nothing of
the sort. As has always been the case, I speak for myself and only myself. But
I must say that all Ohioans also have an inherent responsibility to ask
themselves what kind of person they want representing them in the U.S. Senate.
This was a seat once occupied by the names Taft, Glenn and Voinovich, yet it
has always and will forever belong to the people of Ohio. I have been around
politicians much of my life, far too many to count, and most often I have found
that how one acts in a campaign often closely resembles how they will govern.If
that’s the yardstick by which we will measure the next person who will become
Ohio’s next U.S. Senator, then I am proud to give my support and my vote to
Matt Dolan.

Signed,

Why do we need to rely on others? | [](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=3acdc2ff505a4e06b74f0f510d025754&_e=1LJZyZjVBglv32PPv4C04ahphndOKfu_dNXXhbHdu6Vmw36_AdDiZordAFhZ0kBeb6iFAO4qVXYDvyzgmSRktxxCeYs3iwAWBv9wesKZ0wMHlDtsFxWIvQc4chKjDv19mJfJIn9cUQyiKzapYsXn-l5Sg3-5QcoAQ6O_2swY_xD7uYXtjdNeMMDHoGto6SEfAgqYNjfYFUoo48Hyqy7JrLWhzk9ruFh_fVzduDfYTWvmy7p3U8LvUvmQGr-M0aInxZhpaHUtHKX1LzSjhlvCNvujuOqq4PqzEou-rji76uGo4J_VvR74qgerAK3fK-16z5DvNQp_MFXRMQ_cP46IAlxOqTfcq3URm7WgD5E2uSSK91Zqu2LG_GfxBSybsbFEJO0Zh6ANhMy7dXGcnsgjqn23vgQcDe9NPlOXKyo1ySJ8VJvcjHVbGLVrpSVI3XT8yS-mrCpIawhg5SLUTn_TrA%3D%3D)

Peter -

It's been rumored that the Biden administration has asked for a private meeting with the King of Saudi Arabia to convince the kingdom to pump out more oil!

I have an idea that will save Biden and his advisors millions in taxpayer dollars and keep them from having to take an 18+ hour flight.

Jump on an 8 hour Alaska Airlines flight to Anchorage and restart American oil production now!

[** ****UNLEASH AMERICAN ENERGY**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=3acdc2ff505a4e06b74f0f510d025754&_e=1LJZyZjVBglv32PPv4C04ahphndOKfu_dNXXhbHdu6Vmw36_AdDiZordAFhZ0kBeb6iFAO4qVXYDvyzgmSRktxxCeYs3iwAWBv9wesKZ0wMHlDtsFxWIvQc4chKjDv19mJfJIn9cUQyiKzapYsXn-l5Sg3-5QcoAQ6O_2swY_xD7uYXtjdNeMMDHoGto6SEfAgqYNjfYFUoo48Hyqy7JrLWhzk9ruFh_fVzduDfYTWvmy7p3U8LvUvmQGr-M0aIn1-K-yiZm14TvoLMfxWZ116euv2sP9lugodvQE3a_yuxB9dFXAsgo1gvlDo_NwYcFs8fiCvGsRbYCNxCwycOqSci9u9w2R4Gwh4NSEch39aEQN5JF02yr_uCJZD1Paz6bAQxC-2NYxz_ivHAYV5FztRpHEVxzOW53D87fsy_kQwdd5H6bNtG7WINupsMKvDrOldZo2CE9RRghTO0s1aI64Q%3D%3D)
We are already too reliant on our questionable relationship with Russia; **why push for another toxic partnership to buy something we can source right here at home?**

We have oil in our county, we have the resources and the labor to pull it out of the ground, and before Joe Biden took office, we had a pipeline in progress to efficiently transport the oil all around the country. But on day one of his Presidency, Biden revoked the Keystone XL Pipeline permit.

**Now we are dependent on foreign oil, facing escalating costs, and helping to fund Putin's war in Ukraine.**

Russian, Venezuelan, Saudi, or Iranian oil isn't cleaner or safer than American oil. So why are we relying on them to bring us what we already have?

I support American energy independence and will make restoring American energy production one of my top priorities when I make it to Congress. [**But I need your help to make sure Republicans take back the House majority.**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=3acdc2ff505a4e06b74f0f510d025754&_e=1LJZyZjVBglv32PPv4C04ahphndOKfu_dNXXhbHdu6Vmw36_AdDiZordAFhZ0kBeb6iFAO4qVXYDvyzgmSRktxxCeYs3iwAWBv9wesKZ0wMHlDtsFxWIvQc4chKjDv19mJfJIn9cUQyiKzapYsXn-l5Sg3-5QcoAQ6O_2swY_xD7uYXtjdNeMMDHoGto6SEfAgqYNjfYFUoo48Hyqy7JrLWhzk9ruFh_fVzduDfYTWvmy7p3U8LvUvmQGr-M0aInurSSN4I1FHGaaPUW-kuqpDX59TI2-iFdzC9yIet1FF8-1Tf2h2vg2lcrg2JRrAli7bRW1HKS8BZLbnHMUkphtPLx_ADq94FchgdD_gdh_gM_n2Y2OGT82LKEfSme6GCTKjdBjvv8hbVgUBvOE4ZYZuuu94FXxy9m8MJcZ6YDm2Huc6Zk9jnOofvT6Rlvdn9QlCt0Wvplxlq-X9dLFPRcVw%3D%3D)

All domestic oil-producing measures must be on the table, including reopening the Keystone XL to restore America's energy independence! [**If you think we shouldn't be reliant on toxic, hostile regimes for energy, can you chip in $5 to help me restore the conservative House majority and unleash American energy?**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=3acdc2ff505a4e06b74f0f510d025754&_e=1LJZyZjVBglv32PPv4C04ahphndOKfu_dNXXhbHdu6Vmw36_AdDiZordAFhZ0kBeb6iFAO4qVXYDvyzgmSRktxxCeYs3iwAWBv9wesKZ0wMHlDtsFxWIvQc4chKjDv19mJfJIn9cUQyiKzapYsXn-l5Sg3-5QcoAQ6O_2swY_xD7uYXtjdNeMMDHoGto6SEfAgqYNjfYFUoo48Hyqy7JrLWhzk9ruFh_fVzduDfYTWvmy7p3U8LvUvmQGr-M0aInY4d_xcerwi59KxRCqWlAZcI6xW0CrRtjiDvTgHzeFSVh0_jt4R4qKbLm-oytW-DGZ6WRl7lBk6tggq_fBFJJQ9OcdadwA5g4qwJdKPWFXubYulMa8Vl43_OOrXfoCyqsjTHknEBbRNt3XRa7q2C__OPG1W9MVHPkMWZZNE4asmw3H0giYEb0CN82hgnfnU8KsXVZ_BF4NTUXUWZhMRpEWQ%3D%3D)

body:

---

Friend,

I’m losing to this crazy, leftist opponent of mine, and I honestly need some help.

**_Without your support, there are a few things that are going to happen:_**

* Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate is going to represent Louisiana in the U.S. Senate

* The Socialist Left will have a Senate Majority and will take away our Second Amendment rights, destroy our borders, and create chaos in our communities

* Draconian nationwide mandates will be passed because there will be nobody in Washington Left to stand up to the Left and tell it how it is

These are just a few things that will happen if I don’t get the support I need to win re-election in 2022. The big question is: **[Can I count on your support?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25917%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=h5%2fAk%2b9eSL1AQC8cM5j9pg&sysid=1)**

| | | | | | Peter \-
Did you see my thoughts on what the sham January 6th Committee is really all about?
It was used to try to get my personal phone records... It was used to reportedly take away the rights of anyone near the Capitol that day...
But here's the ultimate goal, Peter: they're trying to block a Trump 2024 run.
Don't let them stop him! Rush in your support to the defense fund! -> [https://gaetzforcongress.revv.co/email-block-trump-fwd](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UcrkzWG-qpQLMRgUHICclKop1uHFgOInVh0TZ4kyHXC3S-nzS1Ng19iaZfK15pgquQhREr0VjsDRJFUKjvWngiYmVKFGAluzS32Jh4a6eD2GpT-ggrkC51LpLG-u53MDHUqMhNvun9-vGMqunBzizDY65fTY02WRcYpmFvH2qUsH9Fhi0Kalzw==&c=1D0eylS8FB8HdZKI8NBRNyABsCPRkJROfx5tY5ao0I4FGX9-VafE6Q==&ch=20P-gicm12NjQ1bnU9t3JCvjIzWl903nIIHffbK5_0IipZoseUCVUg==)

The CNN propaganda didn't work - so now they're getting desperate!
This fight is going to play out in the courts, and it's time for our movement to prepare.

-Matt Gaetz

I need you to Comment | | |

---
| | Hi Friends,

I need your full support today - please make a positive comment about me and my race on the below link. There are 120 comments, let's set a goal to have 100 positive comments about the best Candidate Centurion for Congress.

https://www.breitbart.com/politics/2022/03/07/poll-katie-arrington-leads-nancy-mace-when-informed-of-trump-endorsement/

Here are some facts about me:
* I saved 3K at 16 and I became a pilot at 17 years old, I was a commercial pilot at 20 years old.
* I served as the Science and Technology Officer for the South Western Border.
* I am a Small Business Instructor with extensive advanced technology experience.
* I served 22 years on active duty in Army Aviation, I flew Hueys, Blackhawks and RC-12P fixed wing aircraft. I had a top secret clearance and was an Instructor pilot and Maintenance Test Pilot.

This is what I am going to do for the People:
* Oppose all vaccine and mask mandates
* Improve education and infrastructure in the District
* Eliminate the H1-B Program and bad trade deals, getting Americans back to work
* Fight for Election Integrity/Security restoring faith into the voting process

1\. Communicate with the Campaign. We need to know if you're showing up.
2\. Host a House Party.
3\. Sign up for Campaign Training/Appreciation Meetings.

Thank you all!
Ingrid Centurion

name: Angela Valvano,  Keystone Progress
subject: We're going to lose our right to abortion in the U.S.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

The Women’s Health Protection Act finally made it to the Senate floor last week. And, again, Republicans and Sen. Joe Manchin let us down.

This potentially historic rights legislation would have codified Roe V Wade, made our right to abortion federal law; and would have blocked states' efforts to erode abortion access.

The Supreme Court is ready to overturn Roe v. Wade this summer with a Mississippi 15-week abortion ban case. Once that happens, 26 states will likely make abortion illegal, leaving people who already have the least resources and access to health care with no way of accessing an abortion.

And speaking of 15-week abortion bans, Florida’s Gov. DeSantis is about to sign one into law there. Pennsylvania is next if we don’t vote for progressive candidates.

We NEED to vote for Senators and state lawmakers who will PROTECT US. We know where our politicians stand on our bodily rights.

Keystone Progress is mobilizing voters in PA ahead of the midterm elections and organizing around civil rights issues — like abortion liberation. Stand with us now with a donation.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=030822&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=030822&amount=10]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=030822&amount=20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=030822&amount=20]

Anything you can afford... [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=030822]

We can protect and advance our rights, but we must work together NOW.

Thank you for your support.

Angela Valvano
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

name: Protect Freedom PAC
subject: RELEASE: Senator Rand Paul Releases Strong Testimonial for Harriet Hageman for Wyoming
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: March 8, 2022
---
| Contact: Michael Biundo michael@ascent-strategic.com, 202-809-6014
---
| |
---
| Senator Rand Paul Releases Strong Testimonial for Harriet Hageman for Wyoming
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001G5vKcDS9Yq1yqhA_bM9vuAH9k0Fzc5momlE3egYx7LIx0K7PpGNujbD4omgxQycMsfX01eIgtS0whhP9TVUmiBmfwNHvFcwhH2TjbsOD_BQLk9iMpQGMKOYxhnPvbAMRTeH8P68G_vtDjnFWRJl2chlk5UQb8gxVCyYxOx09pQ33nkHoT7WfP4QjNouw3BTZJqVBMn1XG1Y=&c=2rSSL5sCxHILOeGCdDNqf67vZ97EoOYjGZpxxFILj5z2PIcM7xCwYA==&ch=6rfKpOwGpxcwSUEF1CiJIvs18hRAayrlycfkcvCkltWoC9gLq_STlg==)
---
| Athens, GA - Yesterday, America's top liberty defender, Senator Rand Paul, lent his support with this strong testimonial on why Harriet Hageman is the right candidate for Wyoming's At-Large Congressional District. This news comes shortly after Protect Freedom PAC, an independent organization dedicated to supporting pro-liberty and freedom-minded candidates, endorsed Hageman.
Protect Freedom PAC has had independent expenditure campaigns totaling $11.5 million since 2018.
Senator Paul stated: "I've stood strong against the mandates of Dr. Fauci, but I need help. That's why I'm endorsing Harriet Hageman for Congress. I know Harriet will join me in demanding that Fauci is immediately fired and removed from office. Harriet represents the spirit of Wyoming, which is full of people who want to live their lives without the oppressive weight of the federal government on their backs. Harriet isn't afraid to speak up, and I know she has the courage to stand with me to defeat the Washington machine."
Protect Freedom PAC spokesman Michael Biundo stated:
"Senator Rand Paul has been a champion of liberty and freedom, and he knows that Harriet Hageman is the only pro-freedom, liberty-minded candidate in this race. The people of the great state of Wyoming deserve better than RINO Liz Cheney. Harriet Hageman is a proven leader with a solid record of fighting for liberty and freedom. She's ready to join Rand Paul and take the fight to Washington to stand firm for the people of Wyoming."
Protect Freedom PAC endorsed and supported candidates for statewide and federal offices in 2018 and 2020 and looks to expand its reach for the 2022 cycle. The organization was founded by a team of veterans of the Donald Trump, Ron Paul, and Rand Paul campaigns for President.
---
| | |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC was founded for the purpose of supporting pro-freedom and liberty-minded candidates using the tactics, technology, and strategy that best fits each race individually. PFP was founded by seasoned political veterans with decades of national campaign experience, which includes working on the campaigns of both Ron and Rand Paul.
---
| |
---
| ###
---
|
---
| | Protect Freedom PAC | 196 Alps Rd, Ste 2-244, Athens, GA 30606
---

subject: We’re joining the fight for reproductive rights >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
Introducing Reproductive Freedom for All... 🥁 | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42729231/334086880/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjdhODVjYy0wZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b1xeajTnncVs6N1z5Rl3_D__3I96OMU0VL3dCDf_N5Q=&emci=dd90958f-029f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=667a85cc-0d9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=561582) | Team, **Today we are THRILLED to announce that our team at the Fairness Project is expanding our 2022 campaign slate to include the fight to protect reproductive rights. ** _Introducing Reproductive Freedom for ALL:_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42729232/334086881/143350260?refcode=E14404-20220308-MILaunchEM1-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjdhODVjYy0wZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b1xeajTnncVs6N1z5Rl3_D__3I96OMU0VL3dCDf_N5Q=) **Here’s the situation:** Because of the pending case _Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization_ , the Supreme Court could _**overturn** or **restrict** Roe v. Wade this summer. _ By design, a weakened precedent would undo many existing protections for reproductive rights — _NINE states had abortion bans on the books in 1973, when the Supreme Court ruled in Roe v. Wade that abortion is a legal right!_ After the court’s decision is handed down in June, _all reproductive care_ might be harder to access, including contraception, prenatal care, and STD testing. Given the Senate’s failure to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act, and with SCOTUS poised to undo decades of precedent, it’s become clear **we are our own _last chance_ to secure reproductive rights. So we’re supporting the charge to protect these freedoms directly at the ballot box — starting with Michigan. ** By employing a ballot measure, Michiganders will be able to vote for protections to their reproductive rights, and **no one** gets steamrolled by SCOTUS or Congress.**That’s right: no politicians, no justices,_just you, your ballot, and a chance to secure reproductive freedom once and for all. _** [_**So what do you say, team? Will you join our movement with a donation today so that we can put reproductive rights on the ballot?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42729233/334086882/143350260?refcode=E14404-20220308-MILaunchEM1-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjdhODVjYy0wZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b1xeajTnncVs6N1z5Rl3_D__3I96OMU0VL3dCDf_N5Q=) [FIGHT FOR MICHIGAN](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42729235/334086884/143350260?refcode=E14404-20220308-MILaunchEM1-SB-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjdhODVjYy0wZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b1xeajTnncVs6N1z5Rl3_D__3I96OMU0VL3dCDf_N5Q=) We hope you’ll seize this opportunity to act and join us. Thanks, team.
— Fairness Project Campaigns Team
---
* * *
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42729236/334086885/1041002375?emci=e13538fc-af1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjdhODVjYy0wZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b1xeajTnncVs6N1z5Rl3_D__3I96OMU0VL3dCDf_N5Q=&ceid=561582) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42729239/334086886/-1451982884?emci=e13538fc-af1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjdhODVjYy0wZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b1xeajTnncVs6N1z5Rl3_D__3I96OMU0VL3dCDf_N5Q=) Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 23 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. **Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42729240/334086890/345878811?amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjdhODVjYy0wZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b1xeajTnncVs6N1z5Rl3_D__3I96OMU0VL3dCDf_N5Q=) clean_body: Introducing Reproductive Freedom for All... 🥁 | | Team, Today we are THRILLED to announce that our team at the Fairness Project is expanding our 2022 campaign slate to include the fight to protect reproductive rights. Introducing Reproductive Freedom for ALL: = Here’s the situation: Because of the pending case Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization , the Supreme Court could overturn or restrict Roe v. Wade this summer. By design, a weakened precedent would undo many existing protections for reproductive rights — NINE states had abortion bans on the books in 1973, when the Supreme Court ruled in Roe v. Wade that abortion is a legal right! After the court’s decision is handed down in June, all reproductive care might be harder to access, including contraception, prenatal care, and STD testing. Given the Senate’s failure to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act, and with SCOTUS poised to undo decades of precedent, it’s become clear we are our own last chance to secure reproductive rights. So we’re supporting the charge to protect these freedoms directly at the ballot box — starting with Michigan. By employing a ballot measure, Michiganders will be able to vote for protections to their reproductive rights, and no one gets steamrolled by SCOTUS or Congress.That’s right: no politicians, no justices,just you, your ballot, and a chance to secure reproductive freedom once and for all. = = We hope you’ll seize this opportunity to act and join us. Thanks, team. — Fairness Project Campaigns Team = Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 23 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to the Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at the Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. You can request to get only the most important emails from our team , or you can . name: Doug White
subject: International Women’s Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
Today is International Women’s Day, when we highlight the achievements of women around the world and commit ourselves to building a gender-equal world.

As Putin’s invasion of Ukraine continues to displace hundreds of thousands of families, I am particularly mindful of the Ukrainian women who are impacted by this violence and who need our support more than ever.

While thousands of women are fighting for their country against Russia’s military incursion, many more have been forced to evacuate the country with little to no resources or support systems in place.

[That’s why I’m asking you to donate today to the World Food Programme, which is working to distribute food and cash grants to the 1 million+ refugees – mostly women and children – expected from this conflict.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42729279/334086965/1412579162?refcode=DW_EM_FR_WL_220308_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2IzMDdjNi0wZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lHL87VC9YLwu9S1ClfvMX1TsQK8wCcQunscskRGWuAo=&emci=fe0652d7-fd9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=43b307c6-0d9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=7651992)

During his State of the Union address last week, President Biden said of the conflict in Ukraine, “Freedom will always triumph over tyranny.”

I couldn’t agree more – but while we work towards that triumph, we must reach out to the people whose lives are upended in the conflict.

Thank you for standing with the women and families of Ukraine,

Doug

| PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS

Friend – this week, Sen. Hassan announced an unprecedented ads investment of $13 million to get our message out, keep New Hampshire blue, and defend the Senate from GOP control.
Here's why this matters:
| | | | In 2016, New Hampshire's Senate race was the closest in the country – Maggie Hassan won by just 1,017 votes, and 2022 could be even closer. |
---|---|---|---
| | | | Extreme GOP groups have spent more against Maggie Hassan than any other Senate Democrat up for reelection – over $7.5 million and counting (and it’s only March!). If we don't respond to these attacks, it could tip the scales in the GOP's favor. |
---|---|---|---
| | | | In a purple state like New Hampshire, we need to place this reservation ASAP to reach crucial swing voters across the state. But the issue is, we don't have all of the resources necessary to make this investment. |
---|---|---|---
**That's why we came to you to raise another $20,000 to close our budget gap. As of 1 p.m., we're just $2,108 short of our goal. **

**[_Will you pitch in right now to close our budget gap, reelect Sen. Hassan, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42729409/334087532/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk734-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGRiNWM3YS0wZTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i-hTo7hSvvrN8-98gIOjF0QYgzn4OFEySPlzdlrlNzw=)**

And now, the latest polling is showing Sen. Hassan statistically tied with a GOP opponent, political experts just labeled this race a toss-up, and The Hill is saying that "the Senate majority will go through New Hampshire."

subject: $1,000,000 dropped on us

body:
We’re writing today because a far-right anti-choice group that seeks to end ALL access to women’s reproductive health care just started running two ads against Mark on television.
#

Friends —
We’re writing today because a far-right anti-choice group that seeks to end ALL access to women’s reproductive health care just started running two ads against Mark on television.
Their total spend against us is $1,000,000, and that’s probably not the end of it.
Now, Mark is ALWAYS going to stand up up for Arizonans’ ability to make their own health care decisions — including whether or not to have an abortion.
That may invite some attacks from the far-right, but that’s what happens when you lead with principle.
But we need YOUR help to defend against these attacks. The truth is, we can’t just let these kinds of groups spend against us without defending ourselves on the air as well. It’d be devastating if we did.
So, please:

clean_body: | | | | Let’s make it happen! | Peter, It’s no secret that Lisa Murkowski and Joe Biden are best buddies. That’s why she cast the tie-breaking vote in committee for Deb Haaland For United States Secretary of Interior, why she previously supported Biden’s nominee for SCOTUS, and why other Democrats like Joe Manchin support her for Senate. Kelly and President Trump know that you would never fall for Liberal Lisa’s act as a Republican. You have been on Team Tshibaka since DAY ONE, which is why we want to offer you an exclusive 200%-IMPACT on all donations in the NEXT HOUR! YOU could help us have our BEST FUNDRAISING DAY EVER Note: This offer is only valid for ONE HOUR Top Supporter:dpwillis67@gmail.com DEADLINE: ONE HOUR 200%-Impact: not used**** Thank you, Tshibaka Finance Team | | | | =

name: Derek Marshall
subject: BREAKING: The California Democratic Party endorses our race!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
It’s finally here, the moment we’ve all been waiting for: t**he California Democratic Party (CADEM) has officially endorsed our campaign for Congress in California’s 23rd district!** This endorsement is one the most influential endorsements we’ve received and just goes to show that we’re making big waves here in the High Desert.
**[If you want to show your support for THE leading Democrat in this race, start a monthly contribution to my campaign today. Help us flip this district blue–it all starts with you!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42730159/334091425/1232707546?refcode=3-8&amount=30&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWY4N2VmOS0xMTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qd9KA-_ArthkCsZyyYNkyb78mbYUtU7XGUKdjRjbjA0=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42730160/334091426/1232707546?refcode=3-8&amount=30&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWY4N2VmOS0xMTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qd9KA-_ArthkCsZyyYNkyb78mbYUtU7XGUKdjRjbjA0=)
**With the full support of the party, we have successfully maintained our standing as the frontrunner in this race.** We’ve by raised hundreds of thousands of dollars and worked tirelessly behind the scenes with delegates across the state to get to this moment. To say the least, this is huge!
I am so grateful to every donor, voter, and volunteer who has invested time and resources into this campaign. We are building the momentum we need to win and it WILL pay off! **This campaign is built on two very important components: people power and fundraising power.** That’s how we’ve gotten this far, and that’s our road to victory.
**[We are well on our way to flipping this district blue and winning a much-needed seat for the Democrats – help us make history by beginning a monthly recurring donation TODAY. Let’s show the Republicans exactly what we’re made of. Donate now>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42730177/334091427/1232707546?refcode=3-8&amount=30&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWY4N2VmOS0xMTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qd9KA-_ArthkCsZyyYNkyb78mbYUtU7XGUKdjRjbjA0=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42730178/334091447/1232707546?refcode=3-8&amount=30&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWY4N2VmOS0xMTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qd9KA-_ArthkCsZyyYNkyb78mbYUtU7XGUKdjRjbjA0=)

Republicans have held this seat in Congress for far too long. **It’s time to prove once and for all that Democrats have what it takes to engage our base and win over voters who are sick and tired of politicians who fail to make meaningful change for them.** Every single one of my policies is designed to put working people and families first, so we can all thrive.
**We have what it takes to win, now we need the money that drives our ability to do it all. None of this can happen without you.** Now is the time for courage and commitment. I know I will do whatever it takes to get us to victory. Will you?
**[If you’re ready for a Democratic victory in California’s 23rd, join the California Democratic Party in supporting my campaign. Help us for the long run by starting a monthly contribution RIGHT NOW!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42730180/334091448/1232707546?refcode=3-8&amount=30&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWY4N2VmOS0xMTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qd9KA-_ArthkCsZyyYNkyb78mbYUtU7XGUKdjRjbjA0=)**

In solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23

clean_body: Peter, It’s finally here, the moment we’ve all been waiting for: the California Democratic Party (CADEM) has officially endorsed our campaign for Congress in California’s 23rd district! This endorsement is one the most influential endorsements we’ve received and just goes to show that we’re making big waves here in the High Desert. = = With the full support of the party, we have successfully maintained our standing as the frontrunner in this race. We’ve by raised hundreds of thousands of dollars and worked tirelessly behind the scenes with delegates across the state to get to this moment. To say the least, this is huge! I am so grateful to every donor, voter, and volunteer who has invested time and resources into this campaign. We are building the momentum we need to win and it WILL pay off! This campaign is built on two very important components: people power and fundraising power. That’s how we’ve gotten this far, and that’s our road to victory. = = Republicans have held this seat in Congress for far too long. It’s time to prove once and for all that Democrats have what it takes to engage our base and win over voters who are sick and tired of politicians who fail to make meaningful change for them. Every single one of my policies is designed to put working people and families first, so we can all thrive. We have what it takes to win, now we need the money that drives our ability to do it all. None of this can happen without you. Now is the time for courage and commitment. I know I will do whatever it takes to get us to victory. Will you? = In solidarity, Derek Marshall Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23 * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • tel:\(760\ 486-2416)

Even though women were essential to winning and protecting our Democratic House Majority, women candidates still face institutional barriers and raise less money than their male counterparts.
Your support right now is crucial to defeating Republican Madison Cawthorn and electing Jasmine, a pro-choice champion and fierce advocate for women.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=087b759bc08f439b9a9f390a56e41de0&_e=aJOQHJVwgr6u2fwzfq-zKlU5R7UzAb3X1DUEQvm2lcXu6EZvS55_gL9vD9-utWDhagfIN_v355Qk5J4OqHh-2hNyLb2aeTSvxL_f4Sn5yCsIrqYbL1-2XMhVAeM825b-YLJQuMSqFl0GhX4qOyU_NhZrmwKEnCUblHaQ68ZIZXz0yRCYfgmD5Gkn-oQYoTHbZqLzv1biKUkwP1mhRWUshi4IdCPgFzA5AF57Fe1S9J0ulgbcMDmo5zXbTCKz_7YXKKXSfYojtzRaaTf8uHfJgz-VhoCH9vIQGDFNrGKrcSIWvPAKx6X8hML79hzi9hgRhG4MQYhbSAZsakH2w0BF0QXg5SwqV_zXef0quLcoGcQ38q0PntIn8oFmUDafOqU8z-_8Mj_jPmADc7DVndhR9j_c1NwoWYAhp75GkdJhKVODBBDQ4xAFlFOWKVRurxtaoIepJwECRj9fcnZx9S0cZg%3D%3D)

Peter,

One of the greatest honors of my life is running to represent the great state of Georgia in Washington.

**Yesterday, I officially qualified to be on the Republican ballot for the United States Senate. We are fighting every day to keep the American Dream alive!**

Yesterday's filing kicks off two and half months of around-the-clock work leading up to the GOP primary on May 24th. Every single person on our team is going to be putting in a lot of sweat equity over the next two months. We will take nothing for granted.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=087b759bc08f439b9a9f390a56e41de0&_e=aJOQHJVwgr6u2fwzfq-zKlU5R7UzAb3X1DUEQvm2lcXu6EZvS55_gL9vD9-utWDhagfIN_v355Qk5J4OqHh-2hNyLb2aeTSvxL_f4Sn5yCsIrqYbL1-2XMhVAeM825b-YLJQuMSqFl0GhX4qOyU_NhZrmwKEnCUblHaQ68ZIZXz0yRCYfgmD5Gkn-oQYoTHbZqLzv1biKUkwP1mhRWUshi4IdCPgFzA5AF57Fe1S9J0ulgbcMDmo5zXbTCKz_7YX843mj-VdQOeuTQ_8EbLO-tr0Z5dIYP7uWGOd0jKQYxGKf5W5hM9ADAWdrBdxr5erlqOCnstRhfmCFh0Vx577r8soM0DvvXKZ18guOARlx-pMfbL0WeG9cXdJ6_qQbGIw-Wux4uYa3eJLD_JSzsd5F_vQQzLjcUCFW4FvOmW24EOsNdPJK0VxJ-eD-x_TBlnuUn6C6uIjJzn33Swk232Lqw%3D%3D)

We need to know that we're going to be well positioned to win the Republican nomination and then immediately focus on defeating the Democrat incumbent in November, who is the #1 fundraising senator in the country.

We're excited about what's to come. Thanks for being on the team.

Sincerely,

| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/72ca72868d82c78b/009b239388270b2dc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
