# **Friend — Herschel Walker has spent decades telling anyone who’d listen that he loves competition... So why is he refusing to debate?**

---
Don’t take my word for it. See the headlines for yourself.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/72ca72868d82c78b/3bce5d4b3984c843c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/72ca72868d82c78b/77dbedf3c4402f7bc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
When Herschel announced he was running for Senate, he said "I can't sit on the sidelines anymore." **Well now, he's hiding out in the locker room.** Why is Herschel scared? What’s Herschel hiding? How does Herschel square saying he loves competition with hiding out in his Texas home and avoiding tough questions? **If you think Herschel Walker should come out of hiding and answer questions about the issues and his own past...[and if you think Georgia Republicans deserve to see their candidates debate, then I need you to SIGN this petition right now.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/72ca72868d82c78b/54039b331267e149c3d6b838967d376c/37793)** Too much is at stake in November for an unproven candidate who refuses to even take the field.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/72ca72868d82c78b/589aba52e4465ce2c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**TELL HERSCHEL TO DEBATE »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/72ca72868d82c78b/678c56454cf8b9e4c3d6b838967d376c/37793)

---
_**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.

clean_body: | | | Friend — Herschel Walker has spent decades telling anyone who’d listen that he loves competition... So why is he refusing to debate? Don’t take my word for it. See the headlines for yourself. | When Herschel announced he was running for Senate, he said "I can't sit on the sidelines anymore." Well now, he's hiding out in the locker room. Why is Herschel scared? What’s Herschel hiding? How does Herschel square saying he loves competition with hiding out in his Texas home and avoiding tough questions? If you think Herschel Walker should come out of hiding and answer questions about the issues and his own past... Too much is at stake in November for an unproven candidate who refuses to even take the field. Gary Black | | Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary: I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why. Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts. With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below. We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeff?=
subject: It's Time To Begin Calling!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress
body:
Together, We Are Making A Difference! | | | |
---
|
# **Phone Call Training**
---
| | |
##
8 March 22
**Phone Call Training**
Beginning THIS week, the campaign will begin training volunteers to use our online system to call voters. If you enjoy talking with strangers, you’ll love this. If you don’t like talking to strangers, you’ll love this. Why? Many people don’t answer their phones. If the call goes to voicemail, you can simply click a button that leaves a pre-recorded personal message from Jeff Warner to the voter. In our beta test, under 5% of voters answer the call. This means 95 times out of a hundred, you will leave Jeff Warner’s voicemail on their phone.

Please email the campaign at [info@JeffWarnerForCongress.com](mailto:info@JeffWarnerForCongress.com) if you’re interested in getting trained and we'll email you our short quick-start guide. The training session lasts less than 30 minutes. The system is really user friendly. _You can live anywhere in America and assist the campaign since the phone calling is all web-based._

**Training Date _Options_** \- **Only One Training Session Is Needed**
(All training is by zoom-contact the campaign for zoom login info):
Tuesday, March 8, 10a-10:30a
Wednesday, March 9, 7p-7:30p
Thursday, March 10, 7p-7:30p
Friday, March 11, Noon-12:30p

**Details:**
* Phone calls are audio only, no video.
* A sample script is provided.
* The system is all online. Anyone in the USA can assist.
* Serve from home (or anyplace you'd like). There is no call center.
* Your phone and phone number are not used.

Thank You for your support. The campaign continues to make and break records. Come and be a part of amazing team. Imagine how good it will be to say you were part of this team in November as we celebrate our historic victory!

[**Donate Here**](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=33077087f1&e=12a37459a2)

Remember, Jeff Warner is standing with you and for you. Enough is Enough! Together, "We The People" can make a real difference. Now is our time to act. There is hope.

Standing with you,

Jeff

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Geoff Diehl calls for temporary suspension of state gas tax and motor vehicle excise tax
body:
Please join Geoff's campaign to make Massachusetts more affordable!
| | | |
---
| PRESS RELEASE March 8, 2022
DIEHL CALLS UPON STATE LEGISLATORS TO USE SUPPLEMENTAL SPENDING BILL TO FUND SUSPENSION OF MOTOR VEHICLE GAS TAX AND EXCISE TAX BOSTON, Mass. - Geoff Diehl, Republican candidate for Governor of Massachusetts, issued a statement today calling for state lawmakers to use a pending supplemental spending bill as a vehicle to suspend the state's gas tax and motor vehicle excise tax through at least the end of June: "Today, I'm calling on members of the Massachusetts Legislature to support Massachusetts residents coping with price shocks at the gas pumps by using a supplemental spending bill as a vehicle to immediately suspend collection of our state gas tax. We should also suspend the motor vehicle excise tax. "The Committee on Ways and Means in the Massachusetts House of Representatives released a bill (H. 4532) today calling for $1.6 billion of supplemental spending. The proposed spending includes $433 million for expanded COVID testing, and $125 million for the 'vaccination workforce,' among other proposals. Even after federal reimbursement, the projected cost to the state for this spending eclipses $800 million. "Lawmakers are able to propose this spending because of surplus tax revenues now on-hand. But, are these the right spending priorities for the present day? What Massachusetts residents need most right now is protection from the shock of rapidly-rising costs, and in particular gas prices. Our state could immediately act to blunt the effects of these rising costs by suspending collection of the $0.24 per gallon state gas tax. "Therefore, I encourage members of the Legislature to reallocate a portion of available revenue to suspend the state gas tax for the remainder of this fiscal year (through June 30). The best use for surplus tax revenues is to restore it into the pockets of taxpayers who were overcharged in the first place, and this is one way to do it. "We should also suspend the motor vehicle excise tax, while making appropriate backfill provisions to make sure cities and towns are held harmless from any loss of revenue. High excise taxes discourage people from purchasing more energy-efficient vehicles, which could actually take pressure off demand for fuels in the present day. "I hope lawmakers will additionally consider further extending a gas tax suspension if needed, along with making other tax cuts and supporting enhanced Local Aid payments for cities and towns, into next fiscal year as part of their FY2023 budget debate next month. We need to make Massachusetts a more affordable place to live." Diehl has consistently fought for the rights of Massachusetts taxpayers. In 2014, he led a successful ballot campaign to reject legislative proposals for automatic increases in the state gas tax, which were set to be indexed to the rate of inflation. ###
---

name: Steven Olikara
subject: Special Invite: Join Larry Diamond & Steven Olikara on 3/16
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Olikara for Senate
body:
Image of Olikara campaign logo with photo of Steven Olikara and link to campaign website:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/OfS%20logo%20w%20headshot.png]
[https://www.stevenolikara.com]

Dear Peter,

Democracy, both here and abroad, is facing some of its greatest threats in our lifetime. We have political incentives that are pitting us against each other and grinding our government to a halt, while autocrats exploit our divisions and disillusionment. This U.S. Senate race in Wisconsin, taking on the incumbent Ron Johnson, is central to countering these trends, and protecting and renewing our democracy.

Next week on March 16th, we are honored to have a leading voice nationally on democracy, Stanford Professor and author Larry Diamond, join us for a virtual fundraiser to support our campaign. Diamond has recognized the importance of this race and believes in our campaign's fight for an inclusive, responsive political system. He knows our campaign is the only one that will successfully replace Ron Johnson’s divisive politics and attract a new coalition for democracy in Wisconsin and in the U.S. Senate.

Photo of Steven Olikara and Larry Diamond:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/olikara-democracy?refcode=email]

Revitalizing an American Democracy That Delivers for the People
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/olikara-democracy?refcode=email]
A virtual fundraiser for Steven Olikara, candidate for the U.S. Senate.

Wednesday, March 16th
5:00pm PT / 7:00pm CT / 8:00pm ET
Zoom link provided after registration*

Button that say "RSVP Today"
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/olikara-democracy?refcode=email]

At the event, we will also unveil our agenda to change the business model of politics — that includes our plan to actually pass this legislation through Congress.

Yours,
Steven

*If you would like to attend but have already donated the maximum to our campaign or cannot afford the cost of a ticket, please reply here.*

Full-length dividing line

This is a movement to build a more inclusive, honest, and kind form of politics, and we need your help to continue reaching more voters in Wisconsin.

Button that says,"DONATE NOW" with link to campaign donation page: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0308email]

Facebook logo with link to Steven Olikara's Facebook profile: [https://www.facebook.com/olikaraforsenate]
Twitter logo with link to Steven Olikara's Twitter profile: [https://twitter.com/stevenolikara]
Instagram logo with link to Steven Olikara's Instagram profile: [https://www.instagram.com/stevenolikara/]
TikTok logo with link to Steven Olikara's TikTok profile: [https://www.tiktok.com/@stevenolikara]

Paid for by Olikara for Senate
P.O. Box 510216
Milwaukee, WI 53203
United States

Dear friend,
We’ll start this update with good news from last week: Lizzie won the primary election!
Lizzie was at the polls Tuesday visiting with volunteers and voters — something we will keep doing until November (and beyond)!
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/52364164626E4E462B76532F412B6262683578396C744A722F53432F58384A4678484E324843526F73737A50785556383741626D67723368516F544A48395145/editor_images/3%3A8%20lizzie%201.jpeg] [https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/52364164626E4E462B76532F412B6262683578396C744A722F53432F58384A4678484E324843526F73737A50785556383741626D67723368516F544A48395145/editor_images/3%3A8%20lizzie%202.jpeg]
We don’t know yet who will challenge Lizzie because there is a runoff in the Republican primary for TX-07, but we will know after the runoff election. And we know whoever it is will fight hard. For more than a year, we have seen national groups attacking Lizzie, and we are still seeing new attacks this week.
We are unafraid and undeterred. And we are wasting no time in shifting our focus to the general election in November so we can send Lizzie back to the House and help elect Democrats up and down the ballot in Texas.
Early returns and information from the Tuesday election show us that we can win in November, but we have to do the work to get the results we want. We have a lot of voters to talk to, to persuade, and to turn out. And we will need your help in doing it. Watch this space for ways you can help!
As always, thank you for being a part of our team,
Team Lizzie
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220308wu?refcode=lpfe220308wu_m]
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Lizzie Fletcher for Congress
3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636
Houston, TX 77098
United States

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: I want to know your priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
I hope you’ll share what matters most to you. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42731978/334101533/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220308_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzcyMTA1Yi0xYTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C6FT4tX2k7UHynRI7PRAgxptXKcbm5H9CsHiHzn6MnQ=&emci=e88e71db-159f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=7372105b-1a9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=252045)
---
Folks — Everything I do is rooted in improving the lives of New Mexicans and people across the country. Recently, I traveled around New Mexico to celebrate our wins — like the new Outdoor Equity Initiative at Doña Ana Village that gives more kids opportunities to get outside, and the grand opening of the clean power Western Spirit Wind Project in Central New Mexico. I discussed ways we can make our state and country better, too — talking with New Mexico educators about how we can take a two-generation approach to help children and families living in poverty succeed in education and have more economic opportunities, and learning from the research and advancements in preventing pollution at the University of New Mexico to build on my national efforts to cut methane, one of the biggest drivers of the climate crisis. I’m also hard at work to continue the successes President Biden touched on during his first State of the Union address — from record job creation to the fastest economic growth we’ve seen in decades. We have the once-in-a-generation opportunity to take action to address climate change and cut down everyday costs like household energy, healthcare, childcare, and more — and I look forward to working with my colleagues and President Biden to make that happen. [_**But I want to make sure I hear all of your priorities for the months ahead, too. Can you take just a few minutes to share what’s on your mind? You can take our campaign’s priorities survey below:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42731980/334101536/619711663?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220308_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzcyMTA1Yi0xYTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C6FT4tX2k7UHynRI7PRAgxptXKcbm5H9CsHiHzn6MnQ=&emci=e88e71db-159f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=7372105b-1a9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=252045) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42731984/334101538/619711663?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220308_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzcyMTA1Yi0xYTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C6FT4tX2k7UHynRI7PRAgxptXKcbm5H9CsHiHzn6MnQ=&emci=e88e71db-159f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=7372105b-1a9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=252045)

Thank you for taking the time to share what matters most to you.
— Martin

name: Great America Update
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6724%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=5oTJPwTjK5y6kaYmnl%2b2RA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69235%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yXc%2fdIu1x3HU4%2bbK1mcG2w&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69236%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LX7KetzFt8FmGBk3%2bt73dg&sysid=1) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation--a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery--not freedom--is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans --and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs--which I will outline fo**r you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this [RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69237%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bSHEpL9gLcGRsP6IgFcqEw&sysid=1)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again--Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation’s youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69238%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=i%2ft99KJFZSyS92sj4cwRkA&sysid=1)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69238%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=i%2ft99KJFZSyS92sj4cwRkA&sysid=1)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU--your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69239%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FSUAi8Wi9K3PXOX%2fuvB6tQ&sysid=1) today.** When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69230%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q4%2f1eGBQxswEjqhnX%2fCFIw&sysid=1)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6724%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=5oTJPwTjK5y6kaYmnl%2b2RA&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6724%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=5oTJPwTjK5y6kaYmnl%2b2RA&sysid=1)

subject: Are you vaxed?
body:

clean_body: | | | | Liz Cheney needs to know. | Peter, In 6 days, Liz Cheney, Mitt Romney, and the Washington, D.C. elites are meeting in Northern Virginia for a $1,000 and up-ticketed reception to raise money for Cheney’s re-election. To attend this event, not only do you need to be fully vaccinated but you need to submit your status before you show up at the door. Vaccine mandates anyone? Vaccine passports anyone? To combat the coastal liberals and the Washington D.C. Swamp, a month ago our fundraising team set a goal of $72,300 that we needed to raise by March 14. Our deadline is closing in and we are still short. We need to show how strong our Wyoming First movement is. , Carly Team Hageman | | | |

subject: Join Team Cole for March Madness!
body:
Get your tickets to our March Madness event on March 18th | | | **Join us for our March Madness Fundraiser**
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/44f7110f6a45/join-team-cole-for-march-madness?e=339f142c50)
---
| |
---
| |
# We're on the ballot, let's celebrate!
I am so happy to let you know that we are officially on the ballot! It has been a long journey, but so many people have shown up for for change, and are out there, making this movement possible every day. THANK YOU! [](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=f0ab1ef8b6&e=339f142c50) To celebrate how far we've come, we will be hosting a **[March Madness fundraiser](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=7e4fb2a2bf&e=339f142c50) on March 18th at 7pm**! Located at the Wilson Store downtown, we will **have the** **game on, live art, drinks and a raffle of some amazing items**. I hope you'll join me in honoring our volunteers, our team, and reminding ourselves of the change we're fighting for. I hope to see you there!
Yours in service,

Jahmal Cole

---
| | | Can't make it to the event? **[Make your contribution today](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=5764a30ea7&e=339f142c50)**! All donations help us get one step closer to putting the people in the First District 1st.

subject: The Mom Agenda
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO
body:
| | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNmbpMIJdFA9Jkb0nezSnL6H2Z3i8Ha8h4bk59zs9SPrEGX6I9iWoa4sm1Sd7XzqA3yGxdnsyDP6VSaa_unZ8JD9l4872kjkDIbg_A_gsuZ33Jj1TC5CA6yN6hfeWLO5C1arePk0PU7vNdLbZQ-3z2IlJs-uTqzV5Ia_p0YtDTf9AqOWaInepjsXtbPXctUUjnmpW07pyCxW1amJbmz8c4KfjbZqgA6-NjS2kXFjvU__xFNhIu0SG9kIL0Re2GeCsXX_i2WYHJT05mo_aJDxeNhG0L7JeySEfFvpBxS9g2XPd1pGVSeU25tIA2vl6ZX8ZHQ/3k6/g9mulTMgR1CxVqLcJZNTJw/h0/IxKktawNiNV04j-G1pcjbJeNHD9rb32z7wh-btZn7LU)

Happy International Women's Day, Peter Willis! Today (and every day), we’re here to remind you:
**Delivering for the American people means delivering for women, and delivering for moms especially. **
Melanie is a mom of three kids. She knows what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck, juggling childcare with multiple jobs so her kids are cared for, well-fed, and can sleep with a roof over their heads. She knows that our political system has taken women — and moms especially — for granted, despite the fact that they’re at the center of almost every policy issue.
Did you know that only 27% of Congress identify as women, and _only 5% are mo_ _ms?_
Read that again: **_Only 5% of the people in Congress are moms_**.
If we want a more equitable America that puts the safety and future of our families first, then **we need to elect more moms.** [Chip in today to send a Long Island Mom to Congress who will fight to pass policies that alleviate the social and economic burdens on moms and women everywhere.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNmbpMIJdFA9Jkb0nezSnL6H2Z3i8Ha8h4bk59zs9SPrEagFsm3Dz_uSRNDix3spXp-yl1wM4IcK5bA6ZciTe_B5rEOVcsVaNf7RU1DeB2pMvbgO-JT9FKxhTpRnlt1Rz8WjmCGAWRRwyuifNVy8qLZ9ZzfSp9qWFw4sNumvWaBLGabOo5xnq5hKG90VBlnSOVHm9tK1_-bh9AE0IMXauwxeIL5Dym3qtdDBcHrncArrbTxGgUbV-sux9DEavVtM7wlETeIMKIRd-uQHPv3OXcBRI6O-N0yFbcuAyY-6xHh_q-AUDhFvd_7YrkZTaffTBow/3k6/g9mulTMgR1CxVqLcJZNTJw/h1/OHmGwAKa6UfdyPwR0BSMXS2HM-Voja_SDy17_QA3oPQ)
[Donate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNmbpMIJdFA9Jkb0nezSnL6H2Z3i8Ha8h4bk59zs9SPrE4Vba8Fi2C_74NiHwlb7YOMPPbZtW1dsL27sQmK-ozWEikl_5nSjy1beXpwyZqDOUczfSk4Plbk_F4Patoxyq2OSF98-ZgEveVanYzcv6PLFH8mQHw0QAVl8UbPRu6jQc13NZUVXF2FE9kzWK_hFnQIFnw4rNVpnC-n4MCNR9qg81HU2m3SHu0Tzdj_QGvoqNNuvv5mPHfRYHP-IqTgxw8sFOCZuz3-DVg0vjzothkk8RTrwNentn_Am5ahzurrKkeTrXBA9OvcNN47rHDzJ4KQ/3k6/g9mulTMgR1CxVqLcJZNTJw/h2/0UbKodfmKDG2CC5r5oWlHBaQAqfJPN7IAjqy2l5SjBY)
---
The pandemic was a wake-up call for all the structural ways that moms have been left behind in this country.
During COVID-19-related school closures, the lack of affordable and accessible childcare forced many women to choose between caring for their kids or leaving them at home to collect a paycheck. What’s more, no universal paid leave meant that others struggled to balance the demands of work with also caring for kids full time. Because of a total lack of structural support on both of these issues, many were forced to leave the workforce entirely, undoing years of career-building and progress addressing the gender pay gap.
**Pandemic or not, no one should ever have to make those gut-wrenching decisions.**
This is a pivotal moment for our country and how we move forward matters. Right now, delivering for the American people means delivering for women, centering policies that alleviate the social and economic burdens on them to ensure their prosperity and equality. Melanie has a plan to address all of this: **The Mom Agenda**. Here’s what a platform that centers women, moms, and families looks like:
* * *
**The Mom Agenda**
1. **For Our Children** : Ending gun violence, improved education, universal childcare, universal paid leave, and protecting our children’s future with a Green New Deal.
2. **For Our Families** : Medicare for All to keep families physically and financially healthy, and creating a fair tax system that ensures the rich pay their fair share — just like millions of working families do every year.
3. **For Ourselves** : Closing the gender pay gap, ending workplace discrimination, protecting our reproductive rights, ending financial abuse against women, and addressing the appalling maternal mortality crisis.

_Read more here: https://darrigo2022.com/themomagenda_
* * *
Together, we can create a more equitable America that puts the safety and future of women and families first — that starts by electing Melanie to Congress. [Can you chip in whatever you’re able today to get this Long Island Mom to Washington?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuvrE3uYoMlSSKiL8kN3Dr3yfA7ihb9Mw70GAIEyAyNmbpMIJdFA9Jkb0nezSnL6H2Z3i8Ha8h4bk59zs9SPrE67YCEZeldyfhyipGnP99aOGeQRMzPFYk63PVwUgddBm-da0XYJAxFjs0yTxKqc-pYMREaNpCapQEE6-us-8daSLp0bzHcyW0C4HvdNvpiD5Xx9Fme-fQr9XaVu71cKEbIGyFqJ-Irad3ftkVEa4ijNeHLTrczo-cqefbf0ljdzq8KKQHCDzGrvuvM1WoT1x4FfIQYu3LT2MOAy6Vh-0UkFmvbRkXyjvirHyw9-YLNP5oe2NC-NPUum7YUCOJ-aNwTyFgaZP9YVsBRXO4LwUMdw/3k6/g9mulTMgR1CxVqLcJZNTJw/h3/6vdt4wXowlTx5QcCpD5usKAiPpmWrCVjDpwzFrAjsw0)

clean_body: | | | | Happy International Women's Day, Peter Willis! Today (and every day), we’re here to remind you: Delivering for the American people means delivering for women, and delivering for moms especially. Melanie is a mom of three kids. She knows what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck, juggling childcare with multiple jobs so her kids are cared for, well-fed, and can sleep with a roof over their heads. She knows that our political system has taken women — and moms especially — for granted, despite the fact that they’re at the center of almost every policy issue. Did you know that only 27% of Congress identify as women, and only 5% are mo ms? Read that again: Only 5% of the people in Congress are moms. If we want a more equitable America that puts the safety and future of our families first, then we need to elect more moms. The pandemic was a wake-up call for all the structural ways that moms have been left behind in this country. During COVID-19-related school closures, the lack of affordable and accessible childcare forced many women to choose between caring for their kids or leaving them at home to collect a paycheck. What’s more, no universal paid leave meant that others struggled to balance the demands of work with also caring for kids full time. Because of a total lack of structural support on both of these issues, many were forced to leave the workforce entirely, undoing years of career-building and progress addressing the gender pay gap. Pandemic or not, no one should ever have to make those gut-wrenching decisions. This is a pivotal moment for our country and how we move forward matters. Right now, delivering for the American people means delivering for women, centering policies that alleviate the social and economic burdens on them to ensure their prosperity and equality. Melanie has a plan to address all of this: The Mom Agenda. Here’s what a platform that centers women, moms, and families looks like: The Mom Agenda 1. For Our Children : Ending gun violence, improved education, universal childcare, universal paid leave, and protecting our children’s future with a Green New Deal. 2. For Our Families : Medicare for All to keep families physically and financially healthy, and creating a fair tax system that ensures the rich pay their fair share — just like millions of working families do every year. 3. For Ourselves : Closing the gender pay gap, ending workplace discrimination, protecting our reproductive rights, ending financial abuse against women, and addressing the appalling maternal mortality crisis. Read more here: Together, we can create a more equitable America that puts the safety and future of women and families first — that starts by electing Melanie to Congress. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Thanks for your support! Team Melanie Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO (not by corporations or lobbyists) Friends of Melanie D'Arrigo P.O. name: Victoria Virasingh
subject: International Women's Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Victoria for Congress
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_LOGO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_LOGO] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Today is International Women's Day, which recognizes and celebrates women and girls who are leading the charge for social, economic, cultural, and political change. This year’s theme is “Gender equality today for a sustainable tomorrow,” [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=iwd] which highlights how gender equality plays a pivotal role in climate change and in environmental and disaster risk reduction.
According to the United Nations, women constitute the majority of the world’s poor, and are more dependent on natural resources for their livelihoods. As a result, they are more vulnerable to climate change.
Climate change effects particularly reveal and exacerbate gender equalities when:
*
Traditional
food
sources
become
more
unpredictable
and
scarce,
and
a
resulting
increase
in
food
prices
makes
food
more
inaccessible
*
Women
in
rural
areas
or
with
limited
mobility
are
unable
to
access
climate
change
adaptation
technologies
Despite being disproportionately affected by climate change, women across the world, particularly in developing nations, have unequal access to the political, economic, and social decision-making process. Women’s responsibilities in households and communities often mean they are stewards of natural and household resources, using biomass as fuel for cooking, heating and lighting, fetching firewood, drawing water, and working the land. Their knowledge of their community’s and family’s natural resource needs means they are apt to contribute to making the decisions they are often excluded from.
One of the reasons I am running for office is to fight for climate change policy that works. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=iwd]
We must fight for a sustainable future, one in which inequities across gender, race, nationality, and income are acknowledged and encompassed in our climate change mitigation and adaptation policy decisions.

clean_body: [] [] [] Today is International Women's Day, which recognizes and celebrates women and girls who are leading the charge for social, economic, cultural, and political change. This year’s theme is “Gender equality today for a sustainable tomorrow,” [] which highlights how gender equality plays a pivotal role in climate change and in environmental and disaster risk reduction. According to the United Nations, women constitute the majority of the world’s poor, and are more dependent on natural resources for their livelihoods. As a result, they are more vulnerable to climate change. Climate change effects particularly reveal and exacerbate gender equalities when: Traditional food sources become more unpredictable and scarce, and a resulting increase in food prices makes food more inaccessible Women in rural areas or with limited mobility are unable to access climate change adaptation technologies Despite being disproportionately affected by climate change, women across the world, particularly in developing nations, have unequal access to the political, economic, and social decision-making process. Women’s responsibilities in households and communities often mean they are stewards of natural and household resources, using biomass as fuel for cooking, heating and lighting, fetching firewood, drawing water, and working the land. Their knowledge of their community’s and family’s natural resource needs means they are apt to contribute to making the decisions they are often excluded from. One of the reasons I am running for office is to fight for climate change policy that works. [] We must fight for a sustainable future, one in which inequities across gender, race, nationality, and income are acknowledged and encompassed in our climate change mitigation and adaptation policy decisions. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: sharing a photo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
When I meet with voters – especially future voters – it reminds me exactly why I'm running.
| |
Peter – I love this photo. Every time I meet with voters – especially future voters – it reminds me exactly why I'm running to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA): because public service and fighting for your community matter.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42732851/334106546/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk697-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGZiMmEyMi0xZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XQ43TSMHjz0kKYIua3LGn1GE87s7vTHcM8PtmIehojE=)
I don't come from a political dynasty, but my path to public service still starts with my family. My mom’s father served as a lieutenant in the Dubuque Fire Department, and my dad’s father earned a Purple Heart serving our country in World War II. My parents instilled that same sense of service in me while I was growing up. They taught me that when someone asks for your help because there is work to be done or a problem to solve, you say yes.
That's why, when I saw that my community needed someone to fight for them, I stepped up and ran for a seat in the Iowa House of Representatives, even though I was only 25 years old. It's why I ran for Congress against a man twice my age and won – even though plenty of folks said it wasn't my time.
It's why I'm going to defeat Sen. Grassley and become the youngest woman ever elected to the Senate. I know that unseating a seven-term incumbent doesn't happen overnight. But I also know that nobody will fight harder than I will to flip this seat and fight for Iowans.
Right now, Sen. Grassley is facing record-low approval ratings. Iowans are ready to show him the door, but I need your help to compete with GOP spending. You see, tonight, I'm still $8,372 short of my midnight goal, and there are just a few hours left until my 11:59 p.m. deadline.
**[So please, can you donate $5 right now to elect the youngest woman senator, give working families in Iowa a real leader in Washington and protect our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42732852/334106547/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk697-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGZiMmEyMi0xZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XQ43TSMHjz0kKYIua3LGn1GE87s7vTHcM8PtmIehojE=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42732853/334106548/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk697-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGZiMmEyMi0xZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XQ43TSMHjz0kKYIua3LGn1GE87s7vTHcM8PtmIehojE=)
---
With Senate control on the line here in Iowa, the GOP will do everything in their power to stop our campaign – and I'm counting on grassroots donors like you to stand with me and make up this gap tonight.
With gratitude,

Abby

** Would YOU like to attend the American Freedom Tour March 19th AND Help the Martz Campaign?
------------------------------------------------------------

Hello Fellow Patriot!

If you would like to attend the American Freedom Tour this Month (details below), the Melissa Martz Campaign will purchase a satellite ticket on your behalf. **Provided you are willing to help collect signatures while you are there. If you are able and willing, please reply to this email.

Details:

Saturday MARCH 19th, 2022

8:15am-5:00pm (get there when you can)

Speakers: President Trump, Trump Jr., Kimberly Guilfoyle, Dan Bongino, Sarah Sanders, and Candace Owens.

**
FLA Live Arena
------------------------------------------------------------

1 Panther Pkwy, Sunrise, FL 33323

*Please wear a Melissa Martz For Congress T-shirt and collect as many signatures from FL registered voters as you can!

Stay Free,

Melissa Martz Campaign

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42732932/334106915/69228752?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTE5NDg3Zi0xZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwlqUR0usx82NC590Go6n0HdjC8vhBjaO1uKpRNWZfA=&emci=33483d25-159f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=4919487f-1d9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15353729)
---
Hi Peter,

Happy International Women's Day to all the sheroes in our lives!

For me, I'm thinking of my first shero, **_my mom_**.

My mom used every opportunity to give back to our community, from volunteering in my elementary school library to staffing her polling station on Election Day. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42732933/334106916/214516087?refcode=em22_220308_intwomensday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTE5NDg3Zi0xZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwlqUR0usx82NC590Go6n0HdjC8vhBjaO1uKpRNWZfA=)
---
She taught me that women can do anything they put their minds to. She inspired my love for service and getting things done. And although she's no longer with us, I work hard every day to make her proud. She would have been thrilled to be on this journey with me.

**[Uplifting girls and women are crucial in nurturing their passions, accomplishments, and lives. Will you support me on this journey and help inspire other girls and women to be all they can be?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42732934/334106917/214516087?refcode=em22_220308_intwomensday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTE5NDg3Zi0xZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwlqUR0usx82NC590Go6n0HdjC8vhBjaO1uKpRNWZfA=)**

[JOIN ME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42732935/334106918/214516087?refcode=em22_220308_intwomensday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTE5NDg3Zi0xZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwlqUR0usx82NC590Go6n0HdjC8vhBjaO1uKpRNWZfA=)
The primary is only **70** days away. I promise to work hard to win this –- just like my mom inspired me to do. But I cannot do this alone, Peter

To become a candidate that is able to inspire and create change, we need to win this primary and get my name on the ballot in November. Having your support will allow me to do just that.

**[Can you rush a donation to support me, in honor of all of the amazing women in our lives?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42732936/334106919/214516087?refcode=em22_220308_intwomensday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTE5NDg3Zi0xZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwlqUR0usx82NC590Go6n0HdjC8vhBjaO1uKpRNWZfA=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42732937/334106920/214516087?refcode=em22_220308_intwomensday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTE5NDg3Zi0xZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwlqUR0usx82NC590Go6n0HdjC8vhBjaO1uKpRNWZfA=)
Your support has made this journey possible and I will always work to empower girls and women, no matter where they are.

Thank you,

Tina

# STATEMENT FROM SENATE REPUBLICAN LEADER ROB ORTT
---
|
---
| This shameful use of 9/11 imagery offends every New Yorker.
Senator Rachel May and Senator Robert Jackson today used a horrific attack on our nation to advance their political agenda.
It is even more disturbing to see a New York State Senator smiling behind a picture depicting the biggest terrorist attacks on our nation. Every member of the Senate Democratic Conference must immediately condemn this disgusting action.
###

name: Team Lamb
subject: Conor Lamb vs. Dr. Oz
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42733038/334107253/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWIyOTViMy0xZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y0R4xM6i64WVJLtszCOqIH01UhMnBiUbGgLY0bxQvh0=)

There are a _lot_ of differences between Conor Lamb and Dr. Oz, friend.

So far this year, Conor has helped bring over **$2.8 billion in investments for Pennsylvania's roads, bridges, infrastructure, and environment** through the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill. Conor is fighting for the passage of the _Equality Act_ to ensure fairness and equality for LGBTQ+ Americans. He's working to pass the _John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_ to fight racial discrimination at the polls and ensure voting access for all.

**He has been and will continue to be a _fierce_ advocate for equal rights and opportunities for everyone in our communities.**

**[Conor was born and raised in Pennsylvania, while Dr. Oz moved to PA THIS year. Conor is also NOT a millionaire (Dr. Oz has poured $5 million of his own money into this race), so he's counting on small-dollar donations from supporters like you.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42733039/334107254/-993140480?refcode=em22_220308_droz&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWIyOTViMy0xZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y0R4xM6i64WVJLtszCOqIH01UhMnBiUbGgLY0bxQvh0=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42733040/334107255/-993140480?refcode=em22_220308_droz&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWIyOTViMy0xZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y0R4xM6i64WVJLtszCOqIH01UhMnBiUbGgLY0bxQvh0=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42733041/334107256/-993140480?refcode=em22_220308_droz&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWIyOTViMy0xZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y0R4xM6i64WVJLtszCOqIH01UhMnBiUbGgLY0bxQvh0=)

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Just your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Friend,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Friend, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f0f9d542b62046ab82f375b0fd33409c&_e=qa-kh8aAxMrvE99fuW1omEawnwflZxZ3qvrV46hUjl9GRxIhF-MuNRIRTguF4b15yUT_5GkquHpHPDGr3X_7P-e0m-71EktynPMmEZBz850R_gs8gYK7co3yeYilSdZu2kE5I_ASt4JTA8F4fCPTnahZLV6HOCqAwk40GZKWeO1R8nm0cOOU-Fwm1MQwpXUZxoxedVszt99ApG8o8EdFbOImKVXMiSj0IGl9Or_iNeRgT_oZsKfwGOR-nYEO3zfBG5PtoaL304YKmYT4UH8iAe4bw8VLb7moU9XHaiKLWff0BOOF8BVUq8z0JwtURG3Ksaa5rpleBdHIISQb96DvSNL5jFxJbBKSWXPdDLFJHJT_fdUUuYkj66_7r5WrbXMLzuw2oGFloe_OMEwYjEj5YUDli5HIXUcp8ICeyHLNODy47F1a4ZZk_Wj0LS6AO7AtHsSbrVV2-D5Tv8BmLuynZ3vUnlJa0t7Uz7qgz9pm5TqMcQGbfKZsaKGzaJ9v9Z2L "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")
---
Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---
| |

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

name: Kyle via (Team Kaptur)
subject: Hey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress
body:
I recently joined the team, and I wanted to make sure we met.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42733363/334108730/1992726811?refcode=EM_FR_220308KyleIntro_N_KB_90DO_4_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTRkYTUwMC0xZjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2zpEw7oOGiWqaAMak395FyrozZB6sqkCNim-THvnBus=) Hi, we haven’t connected yet.

I recently joined the team, and I wanted to make sure I got a chance to introduce myself. I’m Kyle, and I’ll be managing Marcy’s re-election campaign.

Marcy has spent her entire career fighting for working families in northern Ohio. More and better job opportunities that pay enough to support a family are what drive Marcy Kaptur – and it’s my job to make sure each and every voter in this district knows what and who she is fighting for.

[**_Marcy has always had the backs of hard-working Ohioans, but now she needs us to have her back. Show Marcy that you’ve got her back. name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: the GOP wants to take away your health care – again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#
You read that right, Peter.
Republicans are at it again: they’re saying that if they get the Senate majority, “Obamacare repeal” is back on the table.
You know what that means. Families paying more for health care, or losing coverage altogether. People under age 26 kicked off their families’ plans. Protections for pre-existing conditions in jeopardy.
**[We’ve got to defend and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate this year because families’ health care is–once again–on the line. Will you chip in $5 now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42733401/334108882/-1063162638?refcode=pm_em_220308_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWM3NTMzZS0xZjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tl-Sdo2lafQm0MdMM9p-wDH0E1F_Uwcbl07JctDXh_Q=)**
I fought to defeat the last attempt to spike families’ health care prices on the Senate floor. But now, we’ve got to defeat it at the ballot box**.**
**[There is so much at stake in this election. Will you stand with me now by donating $5 to help keep this Senate seat blue and make sure we don’t give the GOP another chance to take away families’ health care? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42733402/334108883/-1063162638?refcode=pm_em_220308_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWM3NTMzZS0xZjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tl-Sdo2lafQm0MdMM9p-wDH0E1F_Uwcbl07JctDXh_Q=)**
Thank you,
Patty

name: Giffords.org
subject: A heartbreaking California shooting that didn’t have to happen
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We want to share a story about a real world application of our work, and then we are going to ask you to make a contribution to support it.
#

Friends -
We want to share a story about a real world application of our work, and then we are going to ask you to make a contribution to support it.
_* Warning: Sensitive Material About Gun Violence *_
Last week in California, a man shot and killed his three children, himself, and the person who was overseeing the supervised parental visit because of a restraining order.
He wasn’t able to legally buy or own a weapon.
But he used a “ghost gun” – a weapon made by unregulated parts anyone can easily obtain on the internet without a background check.
There are two serious issues here:
First, the Biden administration must take immediate action to ban ghost guns.
The ATF is currently considering a rule to ban ghost guns. We drove thousands of public comments to the ATF, but it’s been months—now it’s time for action.
Additionally, all across America, these supervised visitations don’t happen in secure settings where there are security checks in place to ensure no weapons are present.
The funding isn’t there.
In California, the entire state receives less than $700,000 from the federal government to support and facilitate these visits. It’s not enough. Clearly.
Victims of domestic abuse should have the option of secure, government-funded locations for parental visits.
That is the kind of work we fight for that few ever see. But we can’t do it without your help:
[**Can you please make a contribution—$3 or whatever you can afford—to help Giffords continue our fight to make families and communities safer from gun violence?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?refcode=em220308-1-30&t=1&refcode2=1658_3935704_xSSchG&akid=1658%2E3935704%2ExSSchG)

Victims of domestic abuse should have the option of secure, government-funded locations for parental visits. That is the kind of work we fight for that few ever see. But we can’t do it without your help: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you for reading, and for your help. The team at Giffords Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: Holly McCormack
subject: We are officially qualified!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42733676/334110137/1254848285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTVlNjJlNy0yMDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pxm-QkvMVq2Tht2S_na49pWMojz7hzXYffMb0JXDfoM=&emci=6fabea66-0e9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=495e62e7-209f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=23594672)
---
| | |
---
Peter, we have some exciting news! I have officially qualified to be on the ballot to represent Georgia 14. It’s an honor to be able to represent the hard-working folks of Northwest Georgia. I will always fight for our voices and stand up for our rural communities. We are ready for change, and I intend to spearhead the charge.
---
---
While celebrating a huge milestone in our campaign, we are also celebrating International Women's Day. It's humbling to remember the hard work and dedication of the countless women who have led us to this moment.
---
---
---
I am amazed by the courageous women who have fought for equal rights throughout the centuries. We have come a long way on the shoulders of the women before us –**but we still have a long way to go to achieve equality and representation. ** Today I am also reminded of the countless times Marjorie Taylor Greene has diminished that hard work, stood in the way of true equality, and has continuously made it harder to break through the bias. I'm running against her not only to bring real representation to Northwest Georgia, **but to make sure that women and girls have a representative they can look up to and be proud of.** One thing has been obvious throughout this race – the people are ready for change and we need to bring that change to them. When I’m out talking to folks in GA-14, they’re impressed by our work and they are fired up. We need your help to continue our efforts, our conversations, our field program. **[Which is exactly why we have set a goal to raise $5000 by the end of the day. Chip in today, and help us make this qualifying even more meaningful.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42733677/334110138/1995286606?refcode=em0308&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTVlNjJlNy0yMDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pxm-QkvMVq2Tht2S_na49pWMojz7hzXYffMb0JXDfoM=) ** Our work has just begun, and we aren’t going anywhere. We will continue to uplift the voices of the forgotten, while also working to be a leader our children are proud of. One that fights for equality and the dreams of girls everywhere. Happy International Women’s Day,Holly McCormack
---
| | |
---

body:
A day for everyone.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42721262/334051442/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.9cc924ed-f79e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.9cc924ed-f79e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2M5MjRlZC1mNzllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RK-G9sA6xh3EXmk1e3lTmDzAnesCLVtzm_c38oq7F-c=) **[Peter, I have some thoughts to share on International Women’s Day, but if you don’t have time to read all the way to the end, please take a moment to sign on in support of policies that advance equality for American women>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42721268/334051448/-2026835326?refcode=ea.9cc924ed-f79e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.9cc924ed-f79e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2M5MjRlZC1mNzllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RK-G9sA6xh3EXmk1e3lTmDzAnesCLVtzm_c38oq7F-c=&emci=2f0596a5-bc9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9cc924ed-f79e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=5944225)** | ****[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42721281/334051452/-2026835326?refcode=ea.9cc924ed-f79e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.9cc924ed-f79e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2M5MjRlZC1mNzllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RK-G9sA6xh3EXmk1e3lTmDzAnesCLVtzm_c38oq7F-c=&emci=2f0596a5-bc9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9cc924ed-f79e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=5944225)****

* * *
Peter,

I am grateful to have been born an American and for the sacrifices previous generations made to secure our rights and freedoms.

**But there is yet work to be done in order to create a better future for us all.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42721288/334051456/-2026835326?refcode=ea.9cc924ed-f79e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.9cc924ed-f79e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2M5MjRlZC1mNzllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RK-G9sA6xh3EXmk1e3lTmDzAnesCLVtzm_c38oq7F-c=&emci=2f0596a5-bc9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9cc924ed-f79e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=5944225)
During Women’s History Month, and especially today — International Women’s Day — I ask you to consider the impediments to true equality that women face here and around the world.

From politicians dictating our medical choices to pay disparity in the workplace, there are too many ways American women face discrimination. This impacts women of color and low-income women even more.

A few points to highlight:
* American women are paid just **82 cents for every dollar** a man earns, on average. And, the majority of people who exited their jobs because of the COVID-19 pandemic were women.

* When a couple chooses to start a family, **women who work see their pay drop** on average. The same isn’t true for men. Meanwhile, the burdens of parenthood disproportionately fall on moms.

* We may have had the vote for a century, but women are still acutely underrepresented in our government. Women are 51% of the United States population, but make up **less than 30% of our representation in Congress.** Just 58 women have _ever_ served in the United States Senate, and no woman has broken the highest glass ceiling to become president.

* No woman has ever served Wisconsin’s 3rd district in the House of Representatives.

It’s long past time to change all that.

**[In Congress, I will advocate for policies that advance women’s rights. Please, sign on now to signal you stand with me in the fight for a more equitable society for America’s women>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42721291/334051461/-2026835326?refcode=ea.9cc924ed-f79e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.9cc924ed-f79e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2M5MjRlZC1mNzllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RK-G9sA6xh3EXmk1e3lTmDzAnesCLVtzm_c38oq7F-c=&emci=2f0596a5-bc9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9cc924ed-f79e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=5944225)**

Thank you,

Deb
| **Deb McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity.**

Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. Renew your membership today!

Dear Friend,

body:
Oregon’s next Congresswoman

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/704b571eb354/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-6796533?e=c87c5d8d97)
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/es-endorsement-0308?utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=es0308

Friend,

Have you heard the news?

I am proud to announce that I am endorsing Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Oregon's 5th Congressional District.
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/es-endorsement-0308?utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=es0308

I am endorsing Lori because she is an America First Patriot who has what it takes to beat the Radical Left. Lori will be a voice for all Oregonians and will build a conservative future for her state.

Lori’s opponent Kurt Schrader is an extreme Far-Left Democrat who has never put Oregon first; which is why I’m asking you to donate, $10, $25, or even $50 to Lori’s cause and help her fight to RESTORE an American First Agenda in Oregon.>>>

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/es-endorsement-0308?utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=es0308?amount=100

2022 is the year the Red Wave sweeps across our country, and Lori Chavez-DeRemer is the one who will bring it to Oregon.

Join me in endorsing Lori today by chipping in to help her campaign DEFEAT the Radical Left so we can FIRE Pelosi and TAKE BACK our country!>>>

Thank you,

Elise Stefanik

Congresswoman

House Republican Conference Chair

disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
