To comply with Federal election law and the regulations of the Federal Election Commission, we are required to do our best to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 per election cycle. Generally, contributions are non-refundable. Should you choose to contribute, you will receive an e-mail confirmation of your contribution. C. Information You Choose to Provide to Us. We collect any information you provide to us on or through the services or in any other way. For example, we collect any information you provide when you update your user account and profile ("User Account"); participate in contests, surveys, and other promotions; and sign up to receive newsletters and other communications. In addition, the Services may include features that rely on the use of information stored on, or made available through, your mobile device. We may also ask to collect or use the specific location of your mobile device (e.g., by accessing your Device's GPS). If you agree to allow access to your location, you agree that we and our service providers may collect such location-based information from your device. We may also collect other information based on your location and your device's proximity to "beacons" and other similar proximity systems, including, for example, the strength of the signal between the beacon and your device and the duration that your device is near the beacon. The type of location data we collect depends on several factors, including the type of device you are using (e.g., laptop, smartphone, tablet) and the type of connection enabled on your device (e.g., wifi, Bluetooth, broadband cable). Our Apps or other services features may rely on this location information to provide certain location-based services, such as our promotional offers, merchandise offers, event information, or other Save America-related content that may be of interest to you. We may also use location information to improve the functionality of our Apps and our other applications and services. If you do not wish to have this location information collected and used by us, you may opt out by disabling the location and Bluetooth features on your device and/or in our Apps. As a general note, you may choose not to provide certain information, but you may not be able to access certain content or take advantage of certain features of the Services. Depending on your device, we may use third-party services to provide mapping services. For example, we may use Google maps on specific devices. You can learn more about the information that Google collects through its mapping services at . D. User Submissions. You may have the ability to use the Services to communicate with other users of the Services and post comments to or otherwise interact with certain aspects of the Services that are available to the public and/or other users. We may collect any information you submit, post, or provide in such activities and reserve the right to store any information about the people you contact via the Services. PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER FRIENDS OF DR. BOB POX 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States

name: Team Welch
subject: The next GOP target?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Rick Scott thinks Republicans can win Vermont’s Senate seat.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=126%2E61531%2ElWT6KE)
Hello,
Take a look at this headline:
[](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1487?t=3&akid=126%2E61531%2ElWT6KE)
The National Republican Senatorial Committee is planning to move “beyond the handful of already established battlegrounds” and target “states currently considered safe for Democrats.”
The chair of the committee, Rick Scott—who suggested raising income taxes on millions of lower-income Americans, while threatening to end Medicare and Social Security, if Republicans retake control—said this: “I think we’re going to have some sleepers, where people are going to say, boy, we didn’t anticipate that one.” Specifically, “he pointed to Colorado, Washington and **Vermont**.”
Those aren’t empty words—Senate Republicans have tens of millions of dollars in the bank, ready to spend on races they think they can win. This comes after a GOP Trump appointee, hand-picked by national Republicans, announced a campaign for U.S. Senate in Vermont. Now, Republicans are eyeing races like ours to flip.
If we’re going to keep the Democratic Senate majority, we need to win here in Vermont and elect Peter Welch—a strong progressive who delivers results.
[**Let’s show the national Republicans that we’re ready for whatever they throw at us. Will you chip in whatever you can to help ensure Vermont—and the Senate—stays blue?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1487?t=4&akid=126%2E61531%2ElWT6KE)
Everything—from lowering prescription drug costs to protecting our democracy—is on the line in this election.
Republican strategists are calling this a “sleeper race” because they don’t think we’re paying attention. But they’ve got another thing coming. Peter is working hard to earn every vote, he's ready to fight on Day One to deliver real change, and we’re not taking anything for granted in a state that just reelected a Republican governor.
But we’ve got to win this together. The Senate hangs in the balance—and Republicans are looking to Vermont.
[**That’s why we’re asking: Can you chip in $5 now to help Peter win in Vermont? Winning this race is crucial to keeping the Senate blue.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1487?t=5&akid=126%2E61531%2ElWT6KE)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

Peter,
Today, on International Women’s Day, and throughout Women’s History Month, it’s critical that we remember the many ways women in America and around the world still face gender-based discrimination.
>From closing the gender pay gap to ending intimate-partner violence, we still have work to do to ensure that women are treated equally in our society.
One concrete action we can and must take is securing women’s right to make their own medical decisions. **Reproductive freedom is essential: The ability to decide if and when to have a child gives women the agency they deserve to set the course of their lives.**
**[I will always defend reproductive rights in North Carolina, Peter, but with _Roe v. Wade_ under threat like never before, it’s crucial that we all join together to show our support for defending the right to safe, accessible abortion care. Please, add your name beside mine now >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42727889/334080878/948483429?refcode=ea.6ab54796-099f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.6ab54796-099f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWI1NDc5Ni0wOTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fvfQqzHoDNuoJSQl1jPFBoh74Wks_jJpxUBTSkGTCC4=&emci=f51703a5-569e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=6ab54796-099f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=1049176)**

Roy Cooper

name: Team Seth
subject: We need to codify Roe
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42727986/334081244/-1862136002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODNjM2EwMC0wYTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I_lGK9mddV1qXLgqSbhgcFIZ_CMO1HGj6Eef3zpiu60=&emci=23627dae-f99e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=283c3a00-0a9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15384964)
Peter,

Today is International Women's Day, an important reminder that we still have so much work ahead of us to achieve equality for women.

Reproductive rights are under attack in our country right now. Republican-led states across the country have passed extreme abortion bans, and the Supreme Court could soon roll back decades of progress on reproductive rights.

In response to these attacks, the House passed the Women's Health Protection Act to protect reproductive rights, which Seth strongly supports. But the Senate has still failed to advance this important legislation.

We can't wait any longer to act on codifying _Roe v. Wade_ and guaranteeing access to reproductive health care for all. [**Will you help us recognize International Women's Day by calling on the Senate to pass the Women's Health Protection Act? Sign on now >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42727987/334081245/-349241716?ms=em22_220308_WHPA_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em22_220308_WHPA_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em22_220308_WHPA_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220308_WHPA_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=wLFmbLc/o/iPKEvv/iAZOVdRCSBy9otThM+rnm8XKnVobzJ+SzIg2fFJ+1LO5cdhnsYVVi7cy46ihjCXqnOYAg5SR6tYUhuNBFG1lpwJVfw5YRE+wVuWYUzlmwyuzEoxZUbae4HlcX/vrwrUeYnMQBQ4nGeSZagGL8pX9y+cVAA=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODNjM2EwMC0wYTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I_lGK9mddV1qXLgqSbhgcFIZ_CMO1HGj6Eef3zpiu60=&emci=23627dae-f99e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=283c3a00-0a9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15384964)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42727988/334081246/-349241716?ms=em22_220308_WHPA_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em22_220308_WHPA_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em22_220308_WHPA_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220308_WHPA_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=wLFmbLc/o/iPKEvv/iAZOVdRCSBy9otThM+rnm8XKnVobzJ+SzIg2fFJ+1LO5cdhnsYVVi7cy46ihjCXqnOYAg5SR6tYUhuNBFG1lpwJVfw5YRE+wVuWYUzlmwyuzEoxZUbae4HlcX/vrwrUeYnMQBQ4nGeSZagGL8pX9y+cVAA=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODNjM2EwMC0wYTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I_lGK9mddV1qXLgqSbhgcFIZ_CMO1HGj6Eef3zpiu60=&emci=23627dae-f99e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=283c3a00-0a9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15384964)
---
There is no such thing as equality for women without reproductive freedom for all. Seth will always fight for the right to choose. That's why he helped pass the Reproductive Privacy Act, which will ensure Rhode Islanders' access to abortion through state law.

In Congress, Seth's ready to keep standing up for reproductive rights. But he wants to know if you're with him.

clean_body: Peter, Today is International Women's Day, an important reminder that we still have so much work ahead of us to achieve equality for women. Reproductive rights are under attack in our country right now. Republican-led states across the country have passed extreme abortion bans, and the Supreme Court could soon roll back decades of progress on reproductive rights. In response to these attacks, the House passed the Women's Health Protection Act to protect reproductive rights, which Seth strongly supports. But the Senate has still failed to advance this important legislation. We can't wait any longer to act on codifying Roe v. Wade and guaranteeing access to reproductive health care for all. There is no such thing as equality for women without reproductive freedom for all. Seth will always fight for the right to choose. That's why he helped pass the Reproductive Privacy Act, which will ensure Rhode Islanders' access to abortion through state law. In Congress, Seth's ready to keep standing up for reproductive rights. But he wants to know if you're with him. Thank you, Team Seth = | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS VICTORIA ALMEIDA, TREASURER Magaziner for Congress Victoria Almeida, Treasurer PO Box 40993 Providence, RI 02940 United States

body:
This is critical news for our democracy, friend.
| | |
---
This is critical news for our democracy, friend:

The House committee investigating the Jan. 6 insurrection just released _major_ findings alleging that Donald Trump and his allies engaged in a "criminal conspiracy" by trying to obstruct Congress from certifying the results of the 2020 election.

**In other words, Trump could finally be criminally charged for spreading dangerous lies about election fraud, attempting to overturn the presidential election, and inciting a deadly insurrection.**
As the GOP works overtime to shield Trump and his cronies from any and all accountability, Democrats are fighting tirelessly to secure our democracy in the face of these attacks – but we need to know where _you_ stand.
**We're looking for 5,000 folks to speak out before midnight tonight, and we're counting on you to be one of them, friend. If you're with us in the fight for accountability and justice, please answer now:**

clean_body: This is critical news for our democracy, friend. | | | This is critical news for our democracy, friend: The House committee investigating the Jan. 6 insurrection just released major findings alleging that Donald Trump and his allies engaged in a "criminal conspiracy" by trying to obstruct Congress from certifying the results of the 2020 election. In other words, Trump could finally be criminally charged for spreading dangerous lies about election fraud, attempting to overturn the presidential election, and inciting a deadly insurrection. As the GOP works overtime to shield Trump and his cronies from any and all accountability, Democrats are fighting tirelessly to secure our democracy in the face of these attacks – but we need to know where you stand. We're looking for 5,000 folks to speak out before midnight tonight, and we're counting on you to be one of them, friend. If you're with us in the fight for accountability and justice, please answer now: | | Should Donald Trump be held accountable for his role in the Jan. 6 insurrection? | | | | Responses submitted after 11:59 p.m. tonight will not be considered. | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. The two things that matter most in my life. **All I want for my birthday is a life free of the constant trauma of gun violence, neighborhoods with easy access to grocery stores, and a representative in Congress who won’t rest till their community is remembered, protected, and supported.** Team, you can help me win this fight. **[Donate $31 today, on my birthday, and let's win on June 28th!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESCgWlXetd-FsItHmnQUYqtbhso-pS2mK4cHCcIkLYQyp0R-u_f05MMPvtQa7JlIwzgTIuVoYKp2z3Am6Xnp4P5RSRgAOzqLmbu2D8WoAd5PlGmB3tPntXZLh0TZUoRTKvLq833uTQ5jac5a1zbOR3lDAaffWMgbkcEST6lDQ09Hdz60EmDbGBUZGtlrByhTLx2fgtM7oZWparhdmO8M0D5HNIhgJdBJf0UzsNby_vug-7iuzuVRE0oTyTWwAJpqS664mrpI7_zmHoImO0i5_kDKb1TpTqJGmqxSLumyCFRMeryJ3SjgOoIyAu8HnkRiML/3k6/0-ro8N8DQdSSWQ_1x7gchQ/h1/8i5xfbZZt3565AdSDQJ_ZfRjaXnqim0QTr9QseNEX4Q)** [Donate $31 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESf06V2-hBIYHQZ4SYK7udNYO71MVCVUg_EEGZfKcSW7e2yspq_3ptCk_tQXg_L7F8uqlCmovpZRwibW33d1Rhn656eln87H6tI59_0MtserWGO9UgjDGGBu9-A0OyUccz5vUkWRbLEjJnb-v5-asciIMmBcHTLfUWYahBFdk8foLRa_eLp4YbsbuODLmFDK97HGSenHYPpTr7_K3plT0D_turcA747RXeeXBKVHBguNjo59eVzdlPzdAmQiE3hZHNrn9mUtwt2mHLXFiIgvvu-4yoayc2IJWSlVCM7IJXjIH4tSEiLYdXZMALM1MJk9Eb/3k6/0-ro8N8DQdSSWQ_1x7gchQ/h2/AbWgo644_-g3NcSJ0Fg6xSF70vVgru-_fztOzL5_KRc) As I turn 31, it is hard not to think about how Congressman Danny Davis has been in office almost my entire life, 25 years. I know our community is grateful to Rep Davis, for his legacy, and for his decision to dedicate his life to our district. **But the people closest to the pain should be closest to the power, and after 25 years in Washington, 80% of my life, Danny Davis is out of touch with the community I’ve built my life around. It is time for Rep Davis to step back and let a new generation of leaders come forward.** [**If you agree, help make this happen by chipping in to support this campaign.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESWLwwulq9pdn3nLgQ0krIWIlLT6FseozN9iAgiPRAOJcjfhhLjZPBxJEyjqq_5DKERZSm6YqsUJUvbhomWh_sfQvvTnDrGgAXmXjuHCjfXnlj3kfHmdJxYOYLwPB0PXE7YLRGk5_tmEt7zF9L93MLjYDxl43wJ5lLcP8H250HUklKmKOrZOohWxo0uL2NxKFGfgz5cRWu0tpp-o8UYLkZ3fFbMnpyXG4nYz5xDhyhFliH-_tVCYtvt7CBkCH4HolOnUbfdsSfjFjXJLZPcdos7uSrqbZ-OhppgrGohIvax8Ql7lafWmQRNOVFdkc7RNEo/3k6/0-ro8N8DQdSSWQ_1x7gchQ/h3/osfi_90xUAuLskn9bhurcprcRiHJaHe6HafGrsSIVZU) I would also like to recognize that today is International Women’s Day. I’ve been fighting for women’s rights since long before I ever considered running for office. We can't talk about the issues women face as if they are in the past. We're still fighting the same fights our foremothers fought. Abortion access. Voting rights. Civil rights. They're all under assault. I know our community is grateful to Rep Davis, for his legacy, and for his decision to dedicate his life to our district. name: Blake Masters for Senate
subject: Masters: The Rundown 3/8
body:
Update from the Masters campaign trail
---
| | | | | | Blake Masters for Senate | March 8, 2022
---
|
---
| The Rundown
---
| Welcome to The Rundown! Here's your monthly update from Blake Masters' campaign & a roundup of our national media coverage.
Counting down: We're exactly eight months out from the General Election.
---
| | | [Visit our Website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Sp5GIgJdzbP_2Ku683W0gd6xW2TLjXlMK0nlEBDlYher4CebfprSqFtSWKBei6b9l7ozaBDNDo7x1usvUcU12kYyM1f60PhXr8yjcHfQYG-rRgJBOUETHeLTOr3xuj72mzZXQ1BjjDM7teP7CoVENA==&c=nQ9_HGDgW-KpAJ57KNlLlcli-sb5PkpKBNdDhnNZZIV02s-yqlyjNg==&ch=BXgnPeBWobWowEuT-EGUuv7nFRifV16llqbSmtdThy5NaZLJ6b3jzw==)
---
| | |
---
| From the Trail
---
Blake has continued to speak at dozens of rallies, clubs, and private living room meet-and-greets across Arizona. Blake's campaign is generating excitement and momentum as he meets with supporters throughout the state.
---
| | |
---
Blake speaking at the AZFRW Convention candidate happy hour.
---
---
Blake addressing the Pinal County GOP.
---
| | |
---
Blake with the hosts of a great campaign event in Marana.
---
---
Packed crowd in Cornville.
---
| | |
---
| New Video: America isn't just an idea
Blake released a new video arguing, "America isn't just an idea. We're a country. We're a people, with a history and a culture."
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Sp5GIgJdzbP_2Ku683W0gd6xW2TLjXlMK0nlEBDlYher4CebfprSqJIUY6EeEuxib4-dcwufHxXBeJoGgHWbxXaCRIJiTrUO0bfcMnKATWTvsP2qRymwzOVzmWAXqg78s1a3Z3bw3k3e039xLFKhIR46BMoa9LPGNs_pbMh-GHIbKkH3i-5n9f57a6I2dXpGnc-bwIPbFHgzWph3NetnHU1ODZ0VGFda&c=nQ9_HGDgW-KpAJ57KNlLlcli-sb5PkpKBNdDhnNZZIV02s-yqlyjNg==&ch=BXgnPeBWobWowEuT-EGUuv7nFRifV16llqbSmtdThy5NaZLJ6b3jzw==)
---
|
---
| Major Media
Blake joined [One America News' Christina Bobb](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Sp5GIgJdzbP_2Ku683W0gd6xW2TLjXlMK0nlEBDlYher4CebfprSqJIUY6EeEuxi0sGrBJUzM-hCczhC4Th-F26f-tqirKKu5MdOIZ6Qk-SlA_Y4jhIxXIlTjXhDR1F1b91H2vxeef1K89Afw3XpD6Grn0mT53A00VXCjZK3S4LPHmV9U6mQW5h23SZpE-cK7_XlPh-H1YVQSgNtApB_jKt9rL4NjWvCjqNZlOYTNdulPQwWwmBUmg==&c=nQ9_HGDgW-KpAJ57KNlLlcli-sb5PkpKBNdDhnNZZIV02s-yqlyjNg==&ch=BXgnPeBWobWowEuT-EGUuv7nFRifV16llqbSmtdThy5NaZLJ6b3jzw==) to discuss Biden's disastrous policies and the steps we have to take to regain energy independence
Blake went on the [Hugh Hewitt Show](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Sp5GIgJdzbP_2Ku683W0gd6xW2TLjXlMK0nlEBDlYher4CebfprSqJIUY6EeEuxiM4FHExQTeZfCW0-DaglFXy-o3sMf8or4pTudWMMZkUcX3UrxLyJcPF4TeG1XaQpKKxVngkSZHefmC7oDIozMelWq5sz5Q0p-PFfImv98e1kQ_PRHwM-JskOIp1fZ5Rmx3ypusl0_WLhMw-SoNfom8tVaWfxVnQv6wR0zcubVz1bZcVBx1jK-sw==&c=nQ9_HGDgW-KpAJ57KNlLlcli-sb5PkpKBNdDhnNZZIV02s-yqlyjNg==&ch=BXgnPeBWobWowEuT-EGUuv7nFRifV16llqbSmtdThy5NaZLJ6b3jzw==). They covered his race for the U.S. Senate and the ongoing situation in Ukraine.
On [The Morning Ritual with Garret Lewis](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Sp5GIgJdzbP_2Ku683W0gd6xW2TLjXlMK0nlEBDlYher4CebfprSqJIUY6EeEuximKfnmqs2SePTyFeMiWoosLNqIrBDsEE9hwGFjGMGMz5F311xNBYISVQsJ28OQKC07VVifrrA1jBBvzK4H79t3erDBkyRDFQBilatY6_wwBjLHV2RE-SvILb7QddVekoBigWgeFu0uaApfkMMFi_Y9u1863BaFIBk4BD7RclWNQ_7EnE9DVb6MeIXtZftZH6JKCnqzruakW9nUpKY4TEG7w==&c=nQ9_HGDgW-KpAJ57KNlLlcli-sb5PkpKBNdDhnNZZIV02s-yqlyjNg==&ch=BXgnPeBWobWowEuT-EGUuv7nFRifV16llqbSmtdThy5NaZLJ6b3jzw==), Blake and Garret spoke about Durham's report, Canadian truckers, Ukraine, and Mark Kelly.
Blake joined [Straight Talk Sedona](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Sp5GIgJdzbP_2Ku683W0gd6xW2TLjXlMK0nlEBDlYher4CebfprSqJIUY6EeEuxiOqlyeptIX7YcaLR8Y0Gt4qRE5fZgU5llM_SkDa19cgxoeyHVE-m8z39jo4Vv4wJ28WC9_CJThM3fFGI54hhzLGRlU8VY7PqjLXvUWTFuXhEqIQBH0lL1q0p4270_uPai1-H7bYagFXY_hEiViuvgew==&c=nQ9_HGDgW-KpAJ57KNlLlcli-sb5PkpKBNdDhnNZZIV02s-yqlyjNg==&ch=BXgnPeBWobWowEuT-EGUuv7nFRifV16llqbSmtdThy5NaZLJ6b3jzw==), where they talked about Blake's experience in Silicon Valley, Big Tech, and everyday problems facing Arizonans.
On KAAA Radio, Blake joined Dr. Larry Schiff to discuss the state of the race, the ongoing situation in Ukraine, vaccine mandates, and much more.
Recent Headlines
Blake's video on the Ukraine-Russia conflict was [featured](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Sp5GIgJdzbP_2Ku683W0gd6xW2TLjXlMK0nlEBDlYher4CebfprSqJIUY6EeEuxi8l_DB5nY1qKaj9uCtsqK-V1lKglxkZwXPk81nvEV_plUPx6vypVJLa7G-8WcZbKq5NUkWfnCjYNLU_g3mJ7C284v0jjsu3q9N66DgnSPZuHLvRcaK-eK90D_omFo9eIkd3LKOiQ7z1Sf73I352EtKmmfhANCedLEX0DZjZzHQoO090hsD_P49v2wEqwQQMkIxRtJTNk0fpDeRtSSzUbWYw1C7Lh0IX6-jiSPHBksenJyLGpa5XxLmDf67SW6JXnuGiyIP3ecloI=&c=nQ9_HGDgW-KpAJ57KNlLlcli-sb5PkpKBNdDhnNZZIV02s-yqlyjNg==&ch=BXgnPeBWobWowEuT-EGUuv7nFRifV16llqbSmtdThy5NaZLJ6b3jzw==) in RealClearPolitics.

name: Michele Rayner
subject: I won’t “wait my turn”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michele Rayner for Florida P
body:
Our community can’t wait for change, so I won’t wait either.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42729178/334086736/-742096553?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWIzMDdjNi0wZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7mqtQ9I1UydKJDWo_Q1zAus6-bhm8iOs-3LByxmbXf4=)
---
I’m no stranger to making history, Peter.

In 2020, I was the first openly queer Black woman elected to Florida’s state legislature. And when our team is successful in November – I’ll be the first Black person to represent Florida’s 13th congressional district.

My career, my advocacy, and my record of public service have all been rooted by my lived experience as a Black woman. I’m proud to be a leader in our community, and advocating for change as my authentic self.

**But I’ll level with you – it’s far from easy running for office while being Black, queer, and a woman. I’ve heard it all too often from people in charge:** _“Now’s not the right time for you.”
“You don’t have what it takes to win.”
**“Michele, you need to wait your turn.”**_ Well, Peter, our community can’t wait for change, so I won’t wait either.

[I’m not running for office just to make history – I’m running because I want to make a difference for people. name: Ben Samuels
subject: International Women’s Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Team,
Today is International Women's Day, and I’d like to spotlight a CRUCIAL issue here in St. Louis. One of the greatest threats to freedom here in America is the assault on reproductive justice and the human right to maintain autonomy over one's body.
Here in Missouri and across the United States, women are being denied the reproductive healthcare services they need, whether it be birth control access, abortion services, or neonatal care.
Republican politicians are dead set on restricting reproductive care and sending us all back to the 1950s. We cannot and will not let that happen. We need more people in every position of power who know that freedom belongs to everyone and that includes women. This International Women's Day, I will not be shy about my beliefs.
Missouri needs more, not fewer, abortion providers. America needs less government oversight over personal medical decisions, and the world needs more respect for women's autonomy.
Reproductive justice is a human right.
Thank you,
Ben Samuels
Ben Samuels is a businessperson, an economic policy expert, and a bipartisan problem-solver running for Congress in Missouri’s 2nd Congressional District to bring jobs and opportunities back to the St. Louis area.

Here in Missouri and across the United States, women are being denied the reproductive healthcare services they need, whether it be birth control access, abortion services, or neonatal care. Republican politicians are dead set on restricting reproductive care and sending us all back to the 1950s. We cannot and will not let that happen. We need more people in every position of power who know that freedom belongs to everyone and that includes women. This International Women's Day, I will not be shy about my beliefs. Missouri needs more, not fewer, abortion providers. America needs less government oversight over personal medical decisions, and the world needs more respect for women's autonomy. Reproductive justice is a human right. Thank you, Ben Samuels Ben Samuels is a businessperson, an economic policy expert, and a bipartisan problem-solver running for Congress in Missouri’s 2nd Congressional District to bring jobs and opportunities back to the St. Louis area. CONTRIBUTE $25 >>> [] CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY >>> [ FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS Ben Samuels for Congress 9621 Olive Blvd. P.O. Box 8484 Saint Louis, MO 63132-9998 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ee9f47d4c251/ive-officially-qualified-as-a-candidate-for-the-us-senate?e=7bbb93570f)

| |

| | Friend,

It's official! Today, I formally qualified as a candidate for U.S. Senate in the May Republican Primary. This campaign has been busy in the 11 months since we announced. We've visited all 159 counties, organized the entire state, and will hit our 300th public appearance this evening!

---
|
---
|
---
| But we still have so much left to do! [_Will you help us?_](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=37e282e299&e=7bbb93570f)

Republicans have the opportunity to take back control of the U.S. Senate and put an end to the Democrats' efforts to destroy the American Dream. As a graduate of the United States Air Force Academy, a proud veteran, and the owner of a successful construction company - I believe I am the best candidate to defeat Warnock in November and ensure Georgia has a Senator who represents our conservative values in Washington.

We are determined to be the hardest-working and most accessible campaign in this race, but we can't do it without your support. [_I ask that you please consider supporting my campaign with a contribution of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or any amount you can do._](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=9b7ab0b748&e=7bbb93570f)

Together, we can win for Georgia and #WinforAmerica!

Respectfully,

Hello,
It was Ben Franklin who, when asked what form of government the constitutional convention had produced, said: “A republic, if you can keep it.”
Donald Trump’s election sealed the deal for me to retire after nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. Having been in uniform for every President since Jimmy Carter, I showed my respect for Mr. Trump with my feet. I was done. It was apparent that the next four years would not go well.
Unfortunately, putting himself before his country culminated when Trump and his fellow Republicans planned, cajoled accomplices, then launched a domestic insurrection on the U.S. Capitol. Five lives were lost, and the nation’s innocence, as well. And it ain’t over.
January 6th set a precedent that leadership in a political party will condone political violence. **To this day, GOP members who continue to perpetuate the Big Lie are a direct threat to our democracy.** An opportunity to come clean for my opponent, Senator Chuck Grassley, who voted against Trump’s impeachment and blocked a bipartisan commission to investigate the attack, still has yet to occur.
The Republican party needs to cull its ranks of the active insurrectionists. Every single person involved in the January 6 attack needs to be held accountable for their actions, including sitting members of Congress who participated in the planning and execution of the insurrection.
**I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Senator Chuck Grassley because I place nation over baseless insurrection. It is a decision not entirely unlike the time of Lincoln. One does not serve the nation in military service to watch idly while it is dismembered by the likes of Donald Trump and his accomplices, to include Chuck Grassley.**
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are raising boatloads to spend against me. I am the ultimate “hard target” for the Republicans, but to get elected, **I need your help. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs – instead, I’m relying entirely on grassroots donors _like you_.**
[**Please, if you can afford to, donate $5 or more to my campaign right now – every dollar you can before midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42739496/334137759/-42398318?refcode=em20220308pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDQzNThlMS0zYjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3WrWz5IuiXAz0-iFKHr8XIUDUr4usb_-eqGyJfEnS90=)

clean_body: Hello, It was Ben Franklin who, when asked what form of government the constitutional convention had produced, said: “A republic, if you can keep it.” Donald Trump’s election sealed the deal for me to retire after nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. Having been in uniform for every President since Jimmy Carter, I showed my respect for Mr. Trump with my feet. I was done. It was apparent that the next four years would not go well. Unfortunately, putting himself before his country culminated when Trump and his fellow Republicans planned, cajoled accomplices, then launched a domestic insurrection on the U.S. Capitol. Five lives were lost, and the nation’s innocence, as well. And it ain’t over. January 6th set a precedent that leadership in a political party will condone political violence. To this day, GOP members who continue to perpetuate the Big Lie are a direct threat to our democracy. An opportunity to come clean for my opponent, Senator Chuck Grassley, who voted against Trump’s impeachment and blocked a bipartisan commission to investigate the attack, still has yet to occur. The Republican party needs to cull its ranks of the active insurrectionists. Every single person involved in the January 6 attack needs to be held accountable for their actions, including sitting members of Congress who participated in the planning and execution of the insurrection. I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Senator Chuck Grassley because I place nation over baseless insurrection. It is a decision not entirely unlike the time of Lincoln. One does not serve the nation in military service to watch idly while it is dismembered by the likes of Donald Trump and his accomplices, to include Chuck Grassley. Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are raising boatloads to spend against me. I am the ultimate “hard target” for the Republicans, but to get elected, I need your help. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs – instead, I’m relying entirely on grassroots donors like you. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We can – and we must – protect our democracy. Thank you for always being a part of the team, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) name: Ralph Rebandt For Governor
subject: Important! The Final Push To Be On The Ballot!
body:
Update from Adam Rebandt

| [ ](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=adam_signature_ask&n=1)
---
Friend -- This may be the most important, and urgent request we have had yet. We have 30 days to gear up and finish the petitions for Ralph to be on the ballot. Many of you have petitions in hand, and we are receiving mail almost daily with finished petitions, thank you! However, **we have only 11,500 in hand**. **That's why we need you!** In addition to everything that the team is doing, we need 100 people to obtain 50 signatures in the next two weeks, by **3/25/2022.** Does it sound hard? It is not, but we need **YOU**. This work of getting Ralph on the ballot can only be done with **YOUR** help. Here is how we will accomplish this. **** **1) You, along with 99 others, will obtain 50 signatures for a total of 5,000 signatures by 3/25** **2) Location** \- There are over 100 Secretary of State offices in Michigan, and over 800 Post Offices in Michigan, and you are allowed to stand outside and collect signatures. One volunteer, Jerry, obtained 51 signatures, two consecutive days after work, by going to SOS offices. He said the **key to his success was beginning the sales pitch as people were walking to the door, so by the time they were near him they knew what he was all about.** This is just to get Ralph on the ballot, **we are under a time constraint,** we love Ralph, Ralph supports youth and youth sports, he is endorsed by Southeastern MI Chiefs of Police, he has pastored for 35 years, his love runs deep for the family unit, when God is first everything else will fall in place behind, he is ProLife, etc.......Ask for the signature! I stood out at a Post Office for 2 hours and obtained 32 signatures. **We need You to help get Ralph on the ballot, we can not do it without you.** **3) Commit to 50, LET ME KNOW via EMAIL that you are committed, including your PHONE NUMBER so we can follow up with you and all stay accountable, and then ask 1 person you know to do the same and we will be well over 15,000.[adamrebandt@gmail.com](mailto:adamrebandt@gmail.com) or _[adam@ralphrebandtforgovernor.com](mailto:adam@ralphrebandtforgovernor.com)_ ASAP****** **** **The** **faster** **we get Your commitment, and the other 99, the sooner we get Ralph on the ballot we then focus on getting out the message and his name.** **Volunteers have put in THOUSANDS of hours, and we need your help to push us OVER THE TOP. It is VOLUNTEERS that get the desired candidates on the BALLOT.****** **** Thank you! **_Adam Rebandt,_** son of the next Governor of Michigan, Ralph Rebandt **248-761-8342** Ralph Rebandt For Governor
[](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=adam_signature_ask&n=2)[http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=adam_signature_ask&n=3)
Ralph Rebandt For Governor · MI 48094, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/unsubscribe?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=adam_signature_ask&n=4).
You can also keep up with Ralph Rebandt For Governor on [Twitter](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNOLWyCuYNiwV9ZFyY__b-ZA&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=adam_signature_ask&n=5) or [Facebook](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6uhbeqVmbeXGs-kYC9NuYd-tJTgdOC5xFCeUG_TRnUZF&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=adam_signature_ask&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=adam_signature_ask&n=7), software for leaders.

name: Christy Smith
subject: Today we honor women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42739641/334138480/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjQzNThlMS0zYjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7o08hXdcDDU9-si2t0LkPD_7Q5mGbXtxeyualqGIg3k=&emci=a1201492-619e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=5b4358e1-3b9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

Today is International Women's Day, a day where the world collectively honors and uplifts the political, economic, scientific, and creative achievements of women across the world and across cultures.

It's a day to celebrate.**But this celebration was born out of struggle, and today I want to talk about that struggle because it's just as relevant now as it was then.**

**[In honor of International Women's Day, I'm asking you to chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to have a representative in CA-27 who will fight for women's empowerment every single day, always.>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42739642/334138481/946308265?refcode=em22_220308_IWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjQzNThlMS0zYjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7o08hXdcDDU9-si2t0LkPD_7Q5mGbXtxeyualqGIg3k=)**

The idea for International Women's Day was inspired by protest when 15,000 women workers – mostly immigrants – marched through New York City demanding shorter working hours, better pay, an end to child labor, and the right to vote.

This protest was inspired by another protest 50 years earlier when thousands of women textile workers marched through the streets of New York demanding better working conditions in the factories.

I want to honor these struggles, and pay respects to the bold women who paved the way because this struggle is not over.

We see it in the ongoing fight for equal pay and higher wages for jobs disproportionately done by women, including caregivers, teachers, and nurses.

It's in the fight for LGBTQ+ equality, as our country still has yet to protect folks from workplace and housing discrimination simply for loving who they love.

It's in the ongoing struggle for reproductive justice and to protect the fundamental right to abortion, as the Supreme Court threatens to tear it down.

We still see it in the fight for universal pre-K and affordable childcare. Women, even as they are expected to work full-time, are still overwhelmingly doing the job of raising children. Universal pre-K and access to affordable childcare are critical to level the playing field.

We see the women's struggle in voting rights, as state legislatures across the country place egregious obstacles on exercising the right to vote. Women – especially women of color – are the ones who've been on the front lines demanding equitable access to the ballot box.

**That's why today, on International Women's Day, I am doubling-down on my commitment to fight for these policies in Congress. I am doubling-down on my commitment to women, LGBTQ+, non-binary, and women-identifying folks everywhere.

[Join me and donate $5 or whatever you can afford to be in this fight with me. We cannot stop until equity and justice prevail. >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42739646/334138484/946308265?refcode=em22_220308_IWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjQzNThlMS0zYjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7o08hXdcDDU9-si2t0LkPD_7Q5mGbXtxeyualqGIg3k=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42739649/334138490/946308265?refcode=em22_220308_IWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjQzNThlMS0zYjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7o08hXdcDDU9-si2t0LkPD_7Q5mGbXtxeyualqGIg3k=) [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42739650/334138493/946308265?refcode=em22_220308_IWD&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjQzNThlMS0zYjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7o08hXdcDDU9-si2t0LkPD_7Q5mGbXtxeyualqGIg3k=) Thank you for being in this struggle with me.

Christy

If you no longer wish to hear from us you can [unsubscribe here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/a1201492-619e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/5b4358e1-3b9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjQzNThlMS0zYjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7o08hXdcDDU9-si2t0LkPD_7Q5mGbXtxeyualqGIg3k=&id=113000550). name: Team Ehasz
subject: 9 out of 10 Americans worried about youth mental health
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42730315/334091929/-1832414505?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220308mentalhealth_te_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmExM2Y3My0xMjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f595a9SUNViexB1lmvY-L6P-tiXiTVLXubckK6dd7U4=)
---
Folks, As a child, Ashley felt firsthand the struggles of financial insecurity and substance abuse issues in her family — a lack of access to good-paying jobs, mental health services, substance abuse treatment, and affordable education impacted her family in the same way that it holds many in our community back. Ashley is running for Congress to flip the script on how leaders in Washington, D.C. address mental health and substance abuse. In office, Ashley will push for compassionate, practical policies that provide access and opportunities for middle-class and working families to thrive, and if they need it, get help. Ashley has lost too many of her family members and soldiers to the effects of mental health and substance abuse to not fight for improved resources. | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42730316/334091930/-1832414505?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220308mentalhealth_te_full_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmExM2Y3My0xMjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f595a9SUNViexB1lmvY-L6P-tiXiTVLXubckK6dd7U4=)
---
**Additionally, a recent [report](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42730317/334091931/1196199266?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmExM2Y3My0xMjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f595a9SUNViexB1lmvY-L6P-tiXiTVLXubckK6dd7U4=&emci=b90ffb6c-129f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=82a13f73-129f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=5643323) shows that nearly 9 out of 10 Americans are concerned about the mental health toll the pandemic’s impact has on our youth.**
The reality of the pandemic’s impact is overwhelming young people in ways that negatively affect their overall well-being — from school closings, lack of supportive resources, job layoffs, poverty, and parents juggling between jobs to support their children.
**It’s clear that Congress needs to do more to address the issues young people are dealing with so they have the resources needed to thrive.**
Ashley is no stranger to putting up a fight because she’s overcome one obstacle from another. That’s why Ashley is running for Congress — to fight for policies that will put families in need first. We need leaders with the courage to fight for the services that lift up our communities now more than ever.
**[Families in Bucks and Montco deserve better. Pitch in $10 or more today to our people-powered team to hold the House majority, flip PA-01 blue, and elect Ashley:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42730318/334091932/-1832414505?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220308mentalhealth_te_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmExM2Y3My0xMjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f595a9SUNViexB1lmvY-L6P-tiXiTVLXubckK6dd7U4=)**

clean_body: | = Folks, As a child, Ashley felt firsthand the struggles of financial insecurity and substance abuse issues in her family — a lack of access to good-paying jobs, mental health services, substance abuse treatment, and affordable education impacted her family in the same way that it holds many in our community back. Ashley is running for Congress to flip the script on how leaders in Washington, D.C. address mental health and substance abuse. In office, Ashley will push for compassionate, practical policies that provide access and opportunities for middle-class and working families to thrive, and if they need it, get help. Ashley has lost too many of her family members and soldiers to the effects of mental health and substance abuse to not fight for improved resources. | = Additionally, a recent shows that nearly 9 out of 10 Americans are concerned about the mental health toll the pandemic’s impact has on our youth. The reality of the pandemic’s impact is overwhelming young people in ways that negatively affect their overall well-being — from school closings, lack of supportive resources, job layoffs, poverty, and parents juggling between jobs to support their children. It’s clear that Congress needs to do more to address the issues young people are dealing with so they have the resources needed to thrive. Ashley is no stranger to putting up a fight because she’s overcome one obstacle from another. That’s why Ashley is running for Congress — to fight for policies that will put families in need first. We need leaders with the courage to fight for the services that lift up our communities now more than ever. = ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = ** **= ** **** | **= = ** | **= = Thanks for being a critical part of our team. name: Team Abby
subject: sharing this photo album with you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
We wanted to reach out to wish you a happy International Women's Day!
| | |
---
Hi there, Peter. We wanted to reach out to wish you a happy International Women's Day from all of us here at Team Abby!
Today – and all throughout Women's History Month – we're celebrating the trailblazing women who dedicated their lives to fighting for the rights we hold dearly and who made history.
**We’re also celebrating the next wave of women who are running for office to shape the future of Iowa and our country: women like Abby.**
Right now, she's on the brink of shattering another glass ceiling here in Iowa. **If Abby defeats Sen. Grassley (R-IA), she'll become the youngest woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate.**
This isn't the first glass ceiling that Abby's shattered. At only 25, she won a seat in the Iowa State House and then, just four years later, **became the youngest woman to flip a U.S. House seat from red to blue.** Not to mention, within just two weeks of being in office, she also became the youngest woman to pass a bill through the U.S. House.

All along the way, she's fought for women's rights and equality – defending our right to choose, pushing for equal pay and doubling funding for endometriosis, a condition that affects 1 in 10 women.
**So, to celebrate Women's History Month and the historic nature of Abby's campaign, our team put together a special Women's History Month Photo Album.[Can you take a moment to click through our album and celebrate Women's History Month with us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42739842/334140351/-985941504?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk721-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDM4MTM5NC0zYzlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lK9u8Bpx4HTWCvAw7eVnaLR0Mcy4x5YMuiwwsYHbxjw=&emci=d5cf0dc2-9b9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=ad381394-3c9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=13784334)**
Thank you for believing in Abby's campaign and helping us make history. None of this would be possible without your support.

– Team Abby

To receive fewer emails, please click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42739843/334140352/496662621?code=jtk721-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDM4MTM5NC0zYzlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lK9u8Bpx4HTWCvAw7eVnaLR0Mcy4x5YMuiwwsYHbxjw=&emci=d5cf0dc2-9b9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=ad381394-3c9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=13784334#!).

Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. And he's running for Congress in California. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy.

**Happy International Women's Day!**

We hope that you will take today as a time to celebrate and honor the women in your lives.

One day is certainly not enough, but still, we must take the time out to honor and celebrate women's social, economic, and political achievements.
| **_"There is no limit to what we, as women, can accomplish"_** \- Michelle Obama

These are demanding roles that many women fill every day, often without pay (or enough pay), or without support.

International Women's Day serves as a reminder that achieving gender equality is still a long way away, but women like Ann help us envision a better tomorrow.

subject: It's time

body:
For over a year the Biden administration has crippled American energy by implementing Green New Deal regulations and increasing reliance on foreign im | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3e1fc7bae0c6/its-time?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=a73de44751&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
| ,

We're about to reach a breaking point.

For over a year, Joe Biden has done everything in his power to cripple America's energy production -- and it's driving the cost of gas higher every day.

Green New Deal regulations have prevented our producers from capitalizing on the resources that we have right here, within the United States.

Instead, Biden has forced us to rely on foreign imports... and now it's costing us. Instability overseas has caused the price of gasoline to skyrocket, and Biden doesn't have a plan. If we don't change course soon, I'm terrified to see how far the costs will rise.

**We need new leadership** to change the course of our country and adopt energy policy that will stop skyrocketing gas prices.

I'm running for Congress to reverse Biden's destructive energy policy and lower the cost of gas at the pump. We don't have much time, and ensuring a Republican majority in the 2022 elections will be critical.

[Will you consider making a small donation of $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 to my campaign to help me reclaim a Republican majority and change the course of America's energy policy before it's too late?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=1f71df5509&e=fc83fb200d)

---
| [Contribute $10](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=30b9d98c3a&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $10")

clean_body: For over a year the Biden administration has crippled American energy by implementing Green New Deal regulations and increasing reliance on foreign im | | | | | | | "Donate" | , We're about to reach a breaking point. For over a year, Joe Biden has done everything in his power to cripple America's energy production -- and it's driving the cost of gas higher every day. Green New Deal regulations have prevented our producers from capitalizing on the resources that we have right here, within the United States. Instead, Biden has forced us to rely on foreign imports... and now it's costing us. Instability overseas has caused the price of gasoline to skyrocket, and Biden doesn't have a plan. If we don't change course soon, I'm terrified to see how far the costs will rise. We need new leadership to change the course of our country and adopt energy policy that will stop skyrocketing gas prices. I'm running for Congress to reverse Biden's destructive energy policy and lower the cost of gas at the pump. We don't have much time, and ensuring a Republican majority in the 2022 elections will be critical. | "Contribute $10" | "Contribute $25" | "Contribute $50" | "Contribute $100" | "Contribute any amount" | Thank you for your support. body:
Right now, without a doubt, Kyrsten Sinema is the biggest roadblock to the Biden agenda. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q_JQMLl_IVyCGI5gFPnln6YblDgB54RQJDHjZdn7qHUWOFP79n1bCoiluJ788QY5AFeq71N8-IbswDDhHigDR0B4qRU8EU21JbguoLPYzTMvWHWRNYxVi2IKRsuj4x3NdgTjWF9nFjknax74FBhW1rl6k6n5hLErqZ7oMOK7riTo4y0YVGlZ3oDqPwZTU77tgR34sV70Ruqvn_4txKS992aKb0QsEmYtL4HuX38O3pdqeGhI9zH397PymI2jHnDqys/3k6/6q9mABWDSnqUR7snIs-8Qg/h0/mIe5SYa24UVJ4GIsmqivFUIQW6KcPEFUTLhbIeIgqi8)
Peter, if you ask people who the biggest roadblock in the Democratic party is, a lot of people might say Joe Manchin. **It’s a good answer. But Kyrsten Sinema is actually an even bigger roadblock than Manchin right now. And we’ll prove it.** Take a look at this headline today from Business Insider, for example: [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSr89P9TdMztwbaA4tPagW5mXaaglXp2Pj1HG2rcNRHNniT2tTwPMzSXsOriJbfkeud1heGQUjEOrHAr7iuhkK1kO2UPhIg0W8UBN4FAiav4kvDHqGO2aIB4X5sQ2uoa2LvJ5wNxtm_an6CkwPht7w1U1mn1MnirkbSzc2D4SjWgVzHkB6RZnGn68TNwxNkxH6Qt427IOwyhu0eoU6H8BztUN9vRYqX7dK8Z4vxB6xRz6HO-A--3tpuBrzKvzpXF3PNWHOfdclxSmA7dgVZWPk9zAShikKAEtWYKyIJkgtJU5-0HKKnPf_CjYV5etk2Aw88ZwtzoUBXBMVZ6fGVXt6_hH5r3XQlrLk9UeGmk2IfaQ/3k6/6q9mABWDSnqUR7snIs-8Qg/h1/NZUcMmWZiPIDXJcOwzIkNKsdQt1ZQ9xBkqbK632WGRQ) Now, look a little deeper into the same story: [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSr89P9TdMztwbaA4tPagW5mXaaglXp2Pj1HG2rcNRHNnKco9ayDDRHf7F_jq5C5rufHOWZRFfRmdNX64gm6qr1aoa3mOj6Nk2raXwlM5YxOAGToT1d_fgPXIeK9Si_R3rV29WGSmIMYO6ZfndtKmOdWi788jKI3XqA7I0XK1WqDNApYDoYnrAzV0ZLz_wCbPNC77rcCi17fUoPuGrywS1APJO7tCyYxb5IpP_b8hkyeEnJIVefpwcSJh0nQXSiIxMzp-2dpiLBZv24dTfeQ-4W8lTb9YWz00lwwZlqvuDwpuAZXBr-Y6vIcAnDgk6AigwkQGv-m99iaRpwveCRDWco8-VFiVA2yv-TU9z0H2HUdQ/3k6/6q9mABWDSnqUR7snIs-8Qg/h2/gE_TlSMvtBPUbCl37fAA2Kxa5ANe-w6qVD_19aXd2uM) That’s right. Joe Manchin is willing to come back to the table on some of President Biden’s biggest priorities. But in order to get him on board, we need to raise taxes on corporations. **Meanwhile, Kyrsten Sinema remains fully committed to the Trump Tax Scam:** she refuses to raise taxes on corporations or billionaires, even back to their pre-Trump levels. name: Cheri Beasley for Senate
subject: McConnell wants to buy a loyal foot soldier.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
He is 100% committed to spending whatever it takes to elect one of these guys
#

Remember Mitch? Well, he and his super PAC buddies may seem quiet – but they actually just raised a record $94 million.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220308-1-t1&refcode2=508.357359.7m04Sw&t=1&akid=508%2E357359%2E7m04Sw)
Why?
So, they can flood races like ours with negative attack ads and take back the Senate.
See, what he really wants is a loyal foot soldier in his effort to take our country backward, not forward. Mitch doesn’t care which Republican wins the primary. He just wants to spend whatever it takes to elect one of these guys:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220308-1-t1&refcode2=508.357359.7m04Sw&t=2&akid=508%2E357359%2E7m04Sw)
_Budd Photo Credit: NC Public Radio_
And the truth is, McCrory or Budd will fall right in line with McConnell’s dangerous agenda. And they’ll make sure that nothing gets done in Washington that could help North Carolina families.
Our country and our democracy can’t afford any more obstruction. We need to elect Cheri Beasley to be a voice and fighter for us.
[**Make a $3 donation to fight back against McConnell and Republicans’ super PACs. They’ll spend tens of millions of dollars to buy this seat and obstruct any hope of progress, so we need a massive movement of grassroots support to defeat their dark money and flip this seat.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220308-1-t1&refcode2=508.357359.7m04Sw&t=3&akid=508%2E357359%2E7m04Sw)

Friend, the U.S. Postal Service is an important public service that delivers lifesaving prescriptions, mail-in ballots, Social Security checks and more. **But Postmaster General – and Trump megadonor – Louis DeJoy is pushing Trump's disastrous agenda to obstruct and upend the USPS.**
In spite of DeJoy and the GOP’s efforts to slash funding, the USPS is working overtime to deliver its services to people across the country. body:
I'm giving a fundraising update tomorrow
| | |
---
Friend, I'm about to give Senator Hassan a fundraising update. And as of 5:00 p.m., we're falling about $2,750 short of what we need to raise every single day to win and reelect Senator Hassan.
Here's why it's critical that we close this fundraising gap: Mitch McConnell and the GOP have funneled more than $7.5 MILLION into attack ads against Maggie — more than they've spent against any other vulnerable Democrat.
And the attack ads are starting to break through. In the past few weeks, political experts called Senator Hassan's race a toss-up, and polls are showing her statistically tied with her opponent. **But with Senate control on the line, we cannot afford to fall short of our goals and hand over this seat to the GOP. **

Senator Hassan's last race was decided by just 1,017 votes, so she's no stranger to tough fights. **But I'd like to give the good news tomorrow that supporters from across the country are chipping in to ensure she keeps her seat.**

clean_body: I'm giving a fundraising update tomorrow | | | Friend, I'm about to give Senator Hassan a fundraising update. And as of 5:00 p.m., we're falling about $2,750 short of what we need to raise every single day to win and reelect Senator Hassan. Here's why it's critical that we close this fundraising gap: Mitch McConnell and the GOP have funneled more than $7.5 MILLION into attack ads against Maggie — more than they've spent against any other vulnerable Democrat. And the attack ads are starting to break through. In the past few weeks, political experts called Senator Hassan's race a toss-up, and polls are showing her statistically tied with her opponent. But with Senate control on the line, we cannot afford to fall short of our goals and hand over this seat to the GOP. Senator Hassan's last race was decided by just 1,017 votes, so she's no stranger to tough fights. But I'd like to give the good news tomorrow that supporters from across the country are chipping in to ensure she keeps her seat. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for chipping in when it matters most. subject: Nancy Pelosi is supporting Karen's historic campaign for L.A. mayor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
"It is my honor and privilege to support my outstanding colleague and friend — the next mayor of L.A."

Team —

Speaker Nancy Pelosi just endorsed Karen Bass' historic campaign for Los Angeles mayor!
"Karen Bass is masterful at bringing people together to work on big problems by staying focused on shared values. **It is my honor and privilege to support my outstanding colleague and friend — the next mayor of L.A.** "
— Speaker Nancy Pelosi
Speaker Pelosi is joining leaders and activists from all walks of life and all backgrounds who are fired up about Karen's historic campaign for mayor.

As a U.S. congresswoman, former state representative, and community organizer, Karen has a proven track record of serving and empowering families and communities. She's ready to make the hard, necessary decisions to put Angelenos first, and Speaker Pelosi's endorsement proves momentum is on our side.

This grassroots team has gotten us this far. Now we need to pull together to make history by electing Karen as L.A.'s next mayor.

**[Join Speaker Pelosi in supporting Karen's historic campaign for mayor. She's ready to make the hard, necessary decisions to put Angelenos first, and Speaker Pelosi's endorsement proves momentum is on our side. This grassroots team has gotten us this far. Now we need to pull together to make history by electing Karen as L.A.'s next mayor. In solidarity, Team Bass Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328) Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 777 S Figueroa St STE 4050 Los Angeles, CA 90017 United States Additional information is available at . | | ---|---|--- We rely on this email to communicate with this grassroots team, but if you no longer want to receive our emails, please .

body:
We have it at home. Why do we need to rely on others? | [](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=70fc1d937238410a85ee97f647199e6a&_e=N01f4C7dz91OJTpFslqEqeBwd8TL5qHTGwzUr_1HkEXzBFX4630jd6btqielQhwn-vtSEhJEx9KZoz5eJpkT-XVeCFGRB9MccNBYZj1agWyC7pbYWFC08ogOmFNMmjI4AwQufUtAcBbQUoEEf2uiqhP0gDMtqTGYw37zDl0f01xY8m7KbVkp55CvEgewIWTKzSOGbNqbw2O1nR9zZP29vY5h1ymSsWVxXiuM1qaFienlQhtSlvKS9qBTDa9ZjGjHZDoFGITC5izDglmcvot186lUhNgPzVbbsU-GMiP0yt-OVzAwXqLoXFWPqqJykfQEYhvxYYI0dTWrH1cuilaE7scnpnFW8e5lwA2U-xNc7dwyYke57qEQCtGjQmrXNbXOHdapUojvNTjXgeB2ZjAIn2MnnnfKAL94FwwKSZOYbmSvfBULqG2ReEXUcqIOq5JJ)

Peter -

It's been rumored that the Biden administration has asked for a private meeting with the King of Saudi Arabia to convince the kingdom to pump out more oil!

I have an idea that will save Biden and his advisors millions in taxpayer dollars and keep them from having to take an 18+ hour flight.

Jump on an 8 hour Alaska Airlines flight to Anchorage and restart American oil production now!

[** ****UNLEASH AMERICAN ENERGY**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=70fc1d937238410a85ee97f647199e6a&_e=N01f4C7dz91OJTpFslqEqeBwd8TL5qHTGwzUr_1HkEXzBFX4630jd6btqielQhwn-vtSEhJEx9KZoz5eJpkT-XVeCFGRB9MccNBYZj1agWyC7pbYWFC08ogOmFNMmjI4AwQufUtAcBbQUoEEf2uiqhP0gDMtqTGYw37zDl0f01xY8m7KbVkp55CvEgewIWTKzSOGbNqbw2O1nR9zZP29vY5h1ymSsWVxXiuM1qaFienp45WYmZU3bxgTTwC2m0OkwArZK9NIzvRcSAYJO0Csnbfs6jBBs7iIbWI2CeqgbeCw6UR6-UIVwO_Oh8W_siiWTvYrye8OMyLWzgJDdXALM-E4XTcErPE9Z0eKmr8t4I8rQC38RkNsVsaxlL-RNPXu25YCOrnoves_KyQWilto6HwmbHstD29ghIWsKjhNITvyhKfe8Sndmneanq9JF5KL)
We are already too reliant on our questionable relationship with Russia; **why push for another toxic partnership to buy something we can source right here at home?**

We have oil in our county, we have the resources and the labor to pull it out of the ground, and before Joe Biden took office, we had a pipeline in progress to efficiently transport the oil all around the country. But on day one of his Presidency, Biden revoked the Keystone XL Pipeline permit.

**Now we are dependent on foreign oil, facing escalating costs, and helping to fund Putin's war in Ukraine.**

Russian, Venezuelan, Saudi, or Iranian oil isn't cleaner or safer than American oil. So why are we relying on them to bring us what we already have?

I support American energy independence and will make restoring American energy production one of my top priorities when I make it to Congress. [**But I need your help to make sure Republicans take back the House majority.**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=70fc1d937238410a85ee97f647199e6a&_e=N01f4C7dz91OJTpFslqEqeBwd8TL5qHTGwzUr_1HkEXzBFX4630jd6btqielQhwn-vtSEhJEx9KZoz5eJpkT-XVeCFGRB9MccNBYZj1agWyC7pbYWFC08ogOmFNMmjI4AwQufUtAcBbQUoEEf2uiqhP0gDMtqTGYw37zDl0f01xY8m7KbVkp55CvEgewIWTKzSOGbNqbw2O1nR9zZP29vY5h1ymSsWVxXiuM1qaFienJYsMvIM__5H2QDYrx-S2SlRXkwxHOk5j2pODDY4z4ZKxM0JimjWqhF6zQSOXHMJ38w3TbpTQHPEEsrOnDnAaONYL9TxNc7LGr-wVccYZJBMb__O1jusjFNm2Vxe0GxhQEXPazjj5LBpZsTKnKagTTUm6hHWYGbOrINAK2MIhFk4Tsc1rVGYXs2KCWHMNZVsXSV0VrFPbbwJQQ4jQAn0Sq)

[** ****UNLEASH AMERICAN ENERGY**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=70fc1d937238410a85ee97f647199e6a&_e=N01f4C7dz91OJTpFslqEqeBwd8TL5qHTGwzUr_1HkEXzBFX4630jd6btqielQhwn-vtSEhJEx9KZoz5eJpkT-XVeCFGRB9MccNBYZj1agWyC7pbYWFC08ogOmFNMmjI4AwQufUtAcBbQUoEEf2uiqhP0gDMtqTGYw37zDl0f01xY8m7KbVkp55CvEgewIWTKzSOGbNqbw2O1nR9zZP29vY5h1ymSsWVxXiuM1qaFielrP5pRNisMkRyPjMbdsQA7_CEHAOgyZ_s5TijrmQeN8-YEoclHavh9ohOE0k3AiR9F7mMxRxg-eyny2KmkrsHfMkjizv6HqixHJvHSBMFkAicBv-NVvPqwVPkaFQ9OURKH_pWkTWh40XRhS8AVw5CbUcRR5LMo3oDPNy5STkVb4oWBabIMVkrkFrbudopVVON3VHedJP6tkffPer5kvC_M)
[**Can you help my campaign for Florida's 13th congressional district by making a $5 contribution today?**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=70fc1d937238410a85ee97f647199e6a&_e=N01f4C7dz91OJTpFslqEqeBwd8TL5qHTGwzUr_1HkEXzBFX4630jd6btqielQhwn-vtSEhJEx9KZoz5eJpkT-XVeCFGRB9MccNBYZj1agWyC7pbYWFC08ogOmFNMmjI4AwQufUtAcBbQUoEEf2uiqhP0gDMtqTGYw37zDl0f01xY8m7KbVkp55CvEgewIWTKzSOGbNqbw2O1nR9zZP29vY5h1ymSsWVxXiuM1qaFiemDR1M4V4FMnCbjYjbVt4IbXollpYABpx9NfnFj1Kfz9b-MW7mlFrqXJuihohHEkF2t-QUSDsrlrNeePN45Sk_29UvLklIqPy3Tqap-PHAy6M60LKo9frZCu2XZXKX9ZyFnv3rKCqHjyKedxsw-u18h976g4popPts7dQZZHTVJoSMpXSIA2nkyYj_N0mdhPk1ibFtPZmR79DrcyRsk6aag)

All domestic oil-producing measures must be on the table, including reopening the Keystone XL to restore America's energy independence! We have it at home. Why do we need to rely on others?
clean_body: We have it at home. Why do we need to rely on others? | Peter - It's been rumored that the Biden administration has asked for a private meeting with the King of Saudi Arabia to convince the kingdom to pump out more oil! I have an idea that will save Biden and his advisors millions in taxpayer dollars and keep them from having to take an 18+ hour flight. Jump on an 8 hour Alaska Airlines flight to Anchorage and restart American oil production now! We are already too reliant on our questionable relationship with Russia; why push for another toxic partnership to buy something we can source right here at home? We have oil in our county, we have the resources and the labor to pull it out of the ground, and before Joe Biden took office, we had a pipeline in progress to efficiently transport the oil all around the country. But on day one of his Presidency, Biden revoked the Keystone XL Pipeline permit. Now we are dependent on foreign oil, facing escalating costs, and helping to fund Putin's war in Ukraine. Russian, Venezuelan, Saudi, or Iranian oil isn't cleaner or safer than American oil. So why are we relying on them to bring us what we already have? I support American energy independence and will make restoring American energy production one of my top priorities when I make it to Congress. All domestic oil-producing measures must be on the table, including reopening the Keystone XL to restore America's energy independence! Thank you, Amanda Makki Conservative Republican for FL-13 | | Amanda Makki is an America First candidate for Congress in Florida's 13th District. A legal immigrant, attorney, and conservative national commentator, Amanda is a strong conservative with a proven record of fighting for the values and principles that made America the greatest country in the world! ---|--- | Paid for by Amanda Makki For Congress Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but . We have it at home. Why do we need to rely on others?

| | Peter, International Women's Day is a day to honor the achievements of women. It's also an important reminder that women everywhere are subject to harassment, discrimination, and barriers to equality every single day in ways both big and small. And of course, those barriers extend to our representation in Congress. A record number of women serve in the House of Representatives: 123. That's progress. _But not enough progress._ Women still make up less than one-third of the House. **And, this district has never elected a woman to Congress.** We have the power to change that this year. Peter, it isn't enough to just elect women. We also need to elect women with proven track records of _fighting for women_. And that's exactly what I've done my entire career– from fighting for paid family leave, to ending workplace discrimination, and protecting a woman's right to choose**.** That's the reason why EMILY's List and the National Organization for Women endorse my candidacy. And I'm proud to have earned the support of local women leaders like Eugene Mayor Lucy Vinis and Lane County Commissioners Heather Buch and Laurie Trieger, among many others. When I served in the legislature, I was proud to serve with strong leaders like Tina Kotek, Ginny Burdick and Diane Rosenbaum. name: Team MOORE ACTION
subject: We must make our voices heard #IWD
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
| | |
---
| | This International Women’s Day, our hearts are breaking as we witness the horrifying scenes of mothers and children fleeing for their lives in Ukraine, all because of one man’s terroristic mission to take over a democratic nation. Women in America are under a different kind of attack, with the fate of Roe v. Wade in peril. Again, at the hands of men attempting to take away women’s rights. And as we emerge from the COVID-19 pandemic, let us carry with us the lessons we learned. We must never allow women, especially women of color, to be so disproportionally burdened again. But most importantly, on this International Women’s Day, we must confront the war on women wherever they live in this world. At home we are confronting a war on our democracy, both attacking our constitutional right to make our voice heard at the ballot box and the right of women to choose an abortion. Both are unacceptable!
Show your power – make your voice heard and fight abortion bans. **[Stand with Gwen to push the Senate to send the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act to President Biden’s desk!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42733078/334107492/-1789690988?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTJmMzhkMS0xZDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-RtSjcLoLM6XaFGpYfEhk6n3bE_m6pqRWRDoHcUQi5I=&emci=0c2ccebd-1b9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=de2f38d1-1d9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=1486204)**

name: Team Mondaire
subject: We can share Mondaire's vision for only $8
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Hey team,
We built an incredible grassroots movement that sent Mondaire to Congress in 2020, and since then, he’s been advocating on behalf of working families across our nation — but our work isn’t over yet.
Mondaire is up for re-election this year, and as numerous challengers enter the race, we've been gathering the resources to protect his seat. Earlier this month, a conservative primary challenger announced his campaign to unseat Mondaire.
Friend, a lot can happen in eight months, so it’s imperative that we keep folks energized about our campaign and Mondaire’s work for New York’s 17th Congressional District.

clean_body: Hey team, We built an incredible grassroots movement that sent Mondaire to Congress in 2020, and since then, he’s been advocating on behalf of working families across our nation — but our work isn’t over yet. Mondaire is up for re-election this year, and as numerous challengers enter the race, we've been gathering the resources to protect his seat. Earlier this month, a conservative primary challenger announced his campaign to unseat Mondaire. Friend, a lot can happen in eight months, so it’s imperative that we keep folks energized about our campaign and Mondaire’s work for New York’s 17th Congressional District. = = Running a campaign is expensive, but $8 a month will help us travel farther around our district, welcome more volunteers onto our team, and share Mondaire's vision far and wide. With your support, we can ensure that by the time folks in NY-17 head out to the polls to make their voices heard in June and November, they will know Mondaire is the candidate who will never give up on defending our democracy and building a more equitable future. = Thank you for your unwavering support. — Team Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. name: Julia Letlow
subject: The stakes have never been higher
body:
Friends, This weekend, I had the privilege of speaking at the Republican National Committee’s Spring Retreat in New Orleans, LA. It wa

| | Friends, This weekend, I had the privilege of speaking at the Republican National Committee’s Spring Retreat in New Orleans, LA. It was a wonderful opportunity to talk with stakeholders and business leaders from across the country about the actual state of our union and what the future might hold. While we discussed a wide range of topics, the consensus was clear– President Biden and the Democrat's radical agenda has done decades' worth of damage to our country, and if we continue down this path, our country may never recover. Since taking control of the White House and both chambers of Congress, Democrats have crippled our oil and gas industry, caused an unprecedented crisis at our southern border, and resulted in the highest inflation rate in 40 years. The cost of gas, food, heating, and other basic necessities continues to skyrocket-- hurting hardworking families, farmers, and small businesses who cannot continue to shoulder the costs of the Democrats' failings. The stakes have never been higher-- which is why, now, more than ever, our party is motivated to fight against the failed policies of this Administration, put hardworking Americans first, and take back the House this November.
---
| |
---
| | [Chip in $10, $25, $50, or ANY AMOUNT right now to help put an end to the Democrats’ radical agenda.](https://www.julialetlow.com/so/34NzgpmUh/c?w=jpizyjH0YaCvNwjRCfEoYhCfsgw5I10SCKy39PsKXXM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9qdWxpYS1sZXRsb3ctZm9yLWNvbmdyZXNzL3RlYW1qdWxpYSIsInIiOiIwNGVhY2FmMy0yNTNhLTQ0NTEtNTA3Yi1hOWNmYzI5M2FjMWUiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJkMDU3MTViZS04ZDdlLTQwYmYtYTBmOS0zM2RhOWRlZWYyZjAifQ) Biden and the Democrats will continue to shift blame and create more problems for hardworking Americans if left unchecked. It’s time for accountability– on rising gas prices, out-of-control inflation, our Southern Border, Afghanistan, and so much more. With your support, not only will we take back the House this November and BLOCK the Democrat's destructive agenda, but we will move our country in the right direction again. Thank you for your support,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Julia Letlow, Ph.D.
Member of Congress
Fifth District of Louisiana

clean_body: Friends, This weekend, I had the privilege of speaking at the Republican National Committee’s Spring Retreat in New Orleans, LA. It wa | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | | | Friends, This weekend, I had the privilege of speaking at the Republican National Committee’s Spring Retreat in New Orleans, LA. It was a wonderful opportunity to talk with stakeholders and business leaders from across the country about the actual state of our union and what the future might hold. While we discussed a wide range of topics, the consensus was clear– President Biden and the Democrat's radical agenda has done decades' worth of damage to our country, and if we continue down this path, our country may never recover. Since taking control of the White House and both chambers of Congress, Democrats have crippled our oil and gas industry, caused an unprecedented crisis at our southern border, and resulted in the highest inflation rate in 40 years. The cost of gas, food, heating, and other basic necessities continues to skyrocket-- hurting hardworking families, farmers, and small businesses who cannot continue to shoulder the costs of the Democrats' failings. The stakes have never been higher-- which is why, now, more than ever, our party is motivated to fight against the failed policies of this Administration, put hardworking Americans first, and take back the House this November. | | | | Biden and the Democrats will continue to shift blame and create more problems for hardworking Americans if left unchecked. It’s time for accountability– on rising gas prices, out-of-control inflation, our Southern Border, Afghanistan, and so much more. With your support, not only will we take back the House this November and BLOCK the Democrat's destructive agenda, but we will move our country in the right direction again. Thank you for your support, | | | | | Julia Letlow, Ph.D. Member of Congress Fifth District of Louisiana | | | | | | | | | | | | | Julia Letlow for CongressP.O.
