name: Erica Smith HQ
subject: This International Women’s Day…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Hi,

This International Women’s Day, we have some exciting news: Higher Heights
for America PAC endorsed Erica Smith for Congress!

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/43660?t=1001&akid=968%2E3698%2Ey7nzcO ][IMG]

Higher Heights is an organization dedicated electing more progressive
Black women at the state, federal, and local levels — and Erica is joining
a slate that includes Cheri Beasley and Val Demmings just to name a few.

According to the Center for Responsive Politics, Black women candidates
raise on average HALF of what white candidates raise. It’s that much
harder to run for politics as a Black woman. And right now there are only
26 Black women serving in the U.S. House. That’s why this endorsement is
so important.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/43660?t=1002&akid=968%2E3698%2Ey7nzcO ]Higher Heights sees that Erica Smith is the progressive champion that
will fight for working families. Will you chip in $5 today
to help us build off this endorsement and send Erica to Congress to fight
for all of us?

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/43666?refcode=em20220308-968&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=968%2E3698%2Ey7nzcO ]Donate $5

We’ve already collected critical endorsements from Democracy for America —
founded by former DNC chair Howard Dean — to the Working Families Party
and 20+ local elected officials, including mayors, school board members,
and county commissioners.

Our momentum keeps building! ✨

This is Erica’s home district and she knows exactly what her community
needs — postal banking, paved roads, universal broadband, economic and
reproductive justice, Medicare for All, and more.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/43660?t=1022&akid=968%2E3698%2Ey7nzcO ]Erica refuses to take corporate, super PAC, or fossil fuel donations
which means we rely on YOU to help us ramp up our campaign. Can we count
on you to donate $5 to build off our newest endorsement?

Together,

Erica Smith HQ

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220308-968-footer&t=1023&refcode2=968_3698_y7nzcO&akid=968%2E3698%2Ey7nzcO

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=968%2E3698%2Ey7nzcO

subject: The Power and Privilege I Am Fighting Against
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Neal Walia for Congress_
body:
You had to be there.... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/48168ebbed5a/your-help-is-needed-6783398?e=e67cbb3f92)
---
| [ ](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=28600c6d5f&e=e67cbb3f92)
---
| | **Hello Friend,** **The amount of support I have received on this campaign has been amazing, but every now and then I am reminded of the privilege and power that I am up against. Last week while I was making calls to raise money, I had a conversation with a white woman who is a player in the reproductive rights movement here in Colorado. She stated that she understood the need for people of color to run for office and the importance of them challenging the status quo. See below for what she stated next:**
[](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=c6892c248a&e=e67cbb3f92) **This statement made my jaw drop to the floor, but I know I shouldn’t be surprised by it. This is exactly what I am fighting against and why I am running for Congress.** [**Help me overcome the status quo that is actively working against candidates like me by donating $10, $25, $100, or $250 today. **](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=7578be4b35&e=e67cbb3f92) **Identifying systems of oppression without taking actions necessary to dismantle them is not enough anymore. Talk is cheap. We need action. Thank you for being in this fight with me to elect our district's first ever person of color to represent our communities in the halls of Congress.**
In Solidarity,
Neal Walia
Candidate, CO First Congressional District
www.nealwaliaforcongress.com

name: John + Gisele Fetterman
subject: !!! big news !!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Be like Kevin.
#
WOOOOOW, Derek. We just hit a big one. 🥳🤯
✅ 500,000 campaign contributions
✅ 76,213 PA donors from all 67 Counties
✅ 10,298 active monthly donors
**THANK. YOU. SO. MUCH.**
That’s right — yinz have chipped in over half a million donations to power John’s campaign for U.S. Senate.
We couldn’t be prouder or more grateful to hit this milestone, Derek. So we sat down with good bois Levi + Artie to pick up the phone + call the donor who made that 500,000th gift.
**[Click here to watch our convo with Kevin — then let’s carry this momentum to the finish line, Derek. It would mean so much to us if you could pitch in $5 right now to be part of our NEXT 500,000 grassroots donations!](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45163?refcode=em20220308-4888&t=1&akid=4888%2E434096%2E6PnAD-)**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45163?refcode=em20220308-4888&t=2&akid=4888%2E434096%2E6PnAD-)
**Not gonna lie...very few campaigns ever hit this milestone.** It’s wiiiildly expensive to run for Senate in a competitive state like PA — _especially_ when your opponents are dumping tens of millions of dollars into TV ads months before we’ve even reached the primary.
So we mean it when we say it’s truly incredible that we’re running this entire campaign on the power of $5, $10, and $25 donations alone.
**Our unprecedented grassroots power is how we’re going to beat self-funded Republican millionaires in November and secure our Democratic majority.****[Derek, if you’re ready to help us keep building, pitch in your first contribution to our campaign now.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45163?refcode=em20220308-4888&t=3&akid=4888%2E434096%2E6PnAD-)**
**[Chip in »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45163?amount=5&refcode=em20220308-4888&t=22&akid=4888%2E434096%2E6PnAD-)**
__
Thank you, thank you, thank you to Kevin + every single person who helped us hit this *amazing* milestone. We’re in this together, Derek.
With love + gratitude,
John + Gisele Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220308-4888-footer&t=23&refcode2=4888_434096_6PnAD-&akid=4888%2E434096%2E6PnAD-)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=4888%2E434096%2E6PnAD-)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=4888%2E434096%2E6PnAD-)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

subject: Judge Brown Jackson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Maggie_
body:
In honor of International Women’s Day...

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42734019/334111985/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220308SCOTUS_H_MTO_90DO_4_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDc5NTdiNy0yMjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ekr5Ke0H02apuPwcvWd2BNdNUulMO0XPNGJWtsjMxmM=)
On International Women’s Day, I want to honor Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson, President Biden’s historic pick as the first Black woman ever nominated to the Supreme Court. I cannot think of a more important woman to celebrate at this moment that we’re living in. It’s been 55 years since the first Black man was appointed to the Supreme Court – as the first Black female nominee, her stamp is now firmly emblazoned in our history books.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42734020/334111986/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220308SCOTUS_H_MTO_90DO_4_G_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDc5NTdiNy0yMjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ekr5Ke0H02apuPwcvWd2BNdNUulMO0XPNGJWtsjMxmM=)
She serves as a powerful reminder of why free, fair, transparent, and secure elections are vital to our democracy. That’s why I’m working so hard to defend our New Mexican voting rights here in Santa Fe. [**Defender of voting rights, will you be one of the 100 grassroots donors we need to make a $15 contribution by midnight tonight to help me win re-election?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42734021/334111989/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220308SCOTUS_H_MTO_90DO_4_G_N_L1&t;amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDc5NTdiNy0yMjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ekr5Ke0H02apuPwcvWd2BNdNUulMO0XPNGJWtsjMxmM=)

As a former public defender, Judge Brown Jackson will bring a critical perspective to the Supreme Court – and she will be a fierce defender of voting rights under the law in the highest court of the land.
[**I share the same values of equality Judge Brown Jackson holds, and I’m proud to honor her. clean_body: In honor of International Women’s Day... = On International Women’s Day, I want to honor Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson, President Biden’s historic pick as the first Black woman ever nominated to the Supreme Court. I cannot think of a more important woman to celebrate at this moment that we’re living in. It’s been 55 years since the first Black man was appointed to the Supreme Court – as the first Black female nominee, her stamp is now firmly emblazoned in our history books. = She serves as a powerful reminder of why free, fair, transparent, and secure elections are vital to our democracy. That’s why I’m working so hard to defend our New Mexican voting rights here in Santa Fe. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = As a former public defender, Judge Brown Jackson will bring a critical perspective to the Supreme Court – and she will be a fierce defender of voting rights under the law in the highest court of the land. = = = Thank you, Maggie Toulouse Oliver = Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence. She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! Make a contribution today >> _____= Friends of Maggie PO Box 473 Albuquerque, NM 87103 United States | Paid for by Friends of Maggie Contributions or gifts to Friends of Maggie are not tax deductible. _

**_Check out the news:_**

| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTAxNjkzNDQxMjA5ODAwNzY1JmM9eDF3NCZlPTAmYj05Mzc2MTAyODImZD14MGc0dzB3.YWdkADFmLdNSNRYnMPmzkLiyEcO3-tIQxC0vRBWcuHc)

---
| | | **_
Learn More About Chuck_**

---
---
| | | Family, hard work and community. These are the things that have defined me as a person more than anything else and are the things that make New Hampshire a special place. Several local Salem community leaders became role models and mentors and got me involved with helping our community. With their encouragement, I ran for Salem Selectman and won. I ran for Town Moderator and won. Then I ran for State Representative and served for two terms from 1998-2002. I was elected to the State Senate in 2002 and was appointed to the Finance Committee. My experience running a business, meeting a payroll, and keeping a conservative budget helped prepare me for the challenges of crafting a balanced state budget. I quickly became known as one of the state’s leaders in budgeting and tax policy. I took a step back from politics in 2006. My daughter was starting her junior year in high school and Susan and I spent most of the next few years traveling to her field hockey and basketball games. We were her biggest fans. In 2010, I was reelected to the Senate. When I returned to the Finance Committee, I found the financial mess that the Democrats had put our state in. The state had an $800 million deficit. We quickly turned that around and put the state’s finances back on a sustainable path. For my work, colleagues gave me the greatest honor of my life — electing me the Senate President in 2013. In 2020, I led Republican efforts to retake the majority in the State Senate. New Hampshire was the only state in the country that was able to flip a blue state legislature to red and it was largely due to our strong fight against the Democrats’ proposed state income tax. Last year, we passed one of the most conservative and fiscally responsible budgets that New Hampshire has ever seen. It is balanced, cuts taxes for small businesses, provides more than $300 million in property tax relief, bans late-term abortions, and prohibits the use of discriminatory teaching in our schools. It puts New Hampshire on a path to long-term prosperity. The work ethic, commitment to family and sense of community that I learned at a young age have stuck with me as an adult and drive everything I do. I still wake up at 4am every morning to work at our business before going to Concord to do the people’s business. More often than not, I still take my first phone calls of the day while driving a tractor. Washington, D.C. has enough silver-spoon, Ivy League lawyers. I believe that I am a product of all the best parts of New Hampshire — the spirit of freedom, sense of volunteerism and responsibility of giving back to the community that has helped shape me into the person I am today. I want to bring New Hampshire to Washington and makes sure our voices are heard. I want to bring New Hampshire values to a place that needs them now more than ever. I want to work for you and I hope you will consider electing me to represent you in the U.S. Senate.

---

We expect Ducey to start dumping millions into this race soon, and we want to make sure we can fight back. We need to continue to hire organizers and make sure we have the budget to respond to future attacks.

**[Team, the polling and experts both say this is going to be a close race. We’re going to need to start investing right now to remain competitive. body:
Bill McSwain sat down with host Joel Smith for a special episode of Face the State. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/icymi-bill-mcswain-joins-cbs-21-for-a-special-episode-of-face-the-state?e=b1ec95759b)

| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**March 8, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# ICYMI: Bill McSwain on 'Face the State'
**West Chester, Pa.** **\-- ** Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor, joined CBS 21 for a special episode of 'Face the State'. Speaking with host Joel Smith, McSwain discussed his vision for Pennsylvania, his promise to restore law and order across the Commonwealth, and his plan to reduce state spending and limit the size of government so that hard-working families can thrive.

McSwain also explained his plan to introduce a constitutional amendment which would allow the Governor to appoint the Philadelphia District Attorney. This amendment, McSwain explained, would allow voters to contribute to the reduction of crime across the Commonwealth and rid Philadelphia of DA Larry Krasner.

Watch the full discussion below:

---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **

Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=4c458c1f4c&e=b1ec95759b)

name: Kevin Ralph, Fundraising Director
subject: By the numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Let’s talk about our average donation last month.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220308-762-footer-ak&t=2&akid=762%2E90090%2E41EXNr)
Hey, it’s nice to meet you! 👋 My name is Kevin, and I’m the Fundraising Director for Morgan Harper’s campaign.
I’m a numbers guy and I think it’s important to take a look at the facts and figures that make our campaign so special:
**We’re showing that a grassroots-funded campaign can WIN in Ohio. Last month we had over 2,000 email donors from across the country, and our average email donation was just $33!**
We’re just over a week into March, and it’s critical that we keep our fundraising steady. Morgan isn’t like her opponents — she isn’t corporate-backed and she doesn’t take a dime of fossil fuel or super PAC money. **Our entire operation, and all the budgets I’m keeping track of, are *literally* powered by small-dollar donations.**
That’s why I have to ask: [**_Can you donate $33 to help us keep pace with our far-right and wishy-washy moderate opponents? They may have the big bucks on their side, but we have the people!_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29341?t=3&akid=762%2E90090%2E41EXNr)
**[Contribute $33](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29341?t=4&akid=762%2E90090%2E41EXNr)**
March is the final month before the end of the quarter, and it’s critical we set the tone with fundraising from the very start of the month.
And your $33 donation will help us:
* Purchase PPE, campaign literature, clipboards, pens, and more supplies so that our in-person events can take place safely. 📋
* Fund ads, texts, and social media outreach so that we can keep supporters informed. 📢
* Afford the gas it takes to travel across the state and spread the word about our campaign for Senate. 🚗
* Hire and train more organizers so we can reach more Ohio voters. 🗳
* **And so much more!**

[**_Can your first donation be $33 today? Your contribution could be the one that puts us over the line when we crunch our end-of-quarter numbers._**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29341?t=5&akid=762%2E90090%2E41EXNr)****
**[Contribute $33](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29341?t=6&akid=762%2E90090%2E41EXNr)**
Thank you for all you do,
Kevin
Fundraising Director
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220308-762-footer&t=7&refcode2=762_90090_41EXNr&akid=762%2E90090%2E41EXNr)**

name: Marisa Wood
subject: disgusted
body:
He backed Trump’s plan to withhold support from Ukraine. And he did it because it meant digging up dirt on Joe Biden. | _We are alerting Democrats about Marisa Wood -- a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. To support Marisa Wood's campaign,[chip in here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42741981/334171072/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmU2MmY4Yi01MDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cCqxhPPXu_LkXHhos_iPeDI0K7qE7m25w0Lr8__HN9Y=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/784cdbda-4e9f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/92e62f8b-509f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmU2MmY4Yi01MDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cCqxhPPXu_LkXHhos_iPeDI0K7qE7m25w0Lr8__HN9Y=&id=124172018)._
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42741982/334171073/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmU2MmY4Yi01MDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cCqxhPPXu_LkXHhos_iPeDI0K7qE7m25w0Lr8__HN9Y=)
I've never been so disgusted, friend.

Last night, my opponent Kevin McCarthy pointed the finger at the United States for "not supplying Ukraine with weapons sooner" as they confront the Russian invasion.

Here's what he failed to mention: The reason Ukraine didn't get weapons earlier is because Donald Trump threatened to withhold $391 million in military aid unless Ukraine investigated his political rival -- Joe Biden.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42741983/334171074/-217444029?refcode=em-3.8.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmU2MmY4Yi01MDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cCqxhPPXu_LkXHhos_iPeDI0K7qE7m25w0Lr8__HN9Y=)
I'm not surprised McCarthy would use the suffering Ukrainians to make a political point, but I’m sickened by the complete cynicism on display here. He backed Trump’s plan to withhold support from Ukraine. And he did it because it meant digging up dirt on Joe Biden.

name: Max Steiner
subject: International Women’s Day
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42734990/334116364/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTk5ZTZiOC0yNzlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-o0BPaQOvr-2XtZwuVkOgc-CbcZGTqfVJ5Qf-gkKkFo=)
Friend, Today is International Women's Day. It’s a day we recognize the value that women contribute to our society and the challenges that they still face -- from workplace discrimination, to hostile laws, and cultural bias. We have made great progress on gender equality in the past 100 years -- remember that the 19th Amendment, which gave women the right to vote, was only ratified in 1920. **We are not done yet.** When I joined the Army in 2005, women were still restricted from serving in Combat Arms units -- infantry, armor, and artillery. The justification -- that women were physically unfit to serve -- always struck me as absurd when my infantry unit had its share of out-of-shape soldiers. Those restrictions finally ended in 2020, and the Army continues to make progress on changing the culture that has impeded female promotions at higher levels. My Reserve Battalion is led by women: both the Battalion Commander and Battalion Sergeant Major are female soldiers. That is sadly not the norm, of the 976 general officers in the military, only 69 are women. Things are better for women in the State Department. The days of women being forced to leave the diplomatic service (this was a real restriction until 1970!) when they got married are thankfully long past. **As your Congressman, I will fight for women’s rights. I will vote to protect women’s rights to control their own bodies. I will vote to ensure that women’s health issues are covered by insurance plans. I also look forward to writing Congressional Letters of Recommendation to Military Service Academies for aspiring female service members in our district.** LaMalfa has bragged about trying to revoke women’s constitutional right to an abortion and voted against the Violence Against Women Act. He does not belong in Congress, and I need your help to give him the boot. Thanks in advance for your support, Max Steiner | **[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42734991/334116365/360059203?refcode=em-3.8.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTk5ZTZiOC0yNzlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-o0BPaQOvr-2XtZwuVkOgc-CbcZGTqfVJ5Qf-gkKkFo=)**

clean_body: | = Friend, Today is International Women's Day. It’s a day we recognize the value that women contribute to our society and the challenges that they still face -- from workplace discrimination, to hostile laws, and cultural bias. We have made great progress on gender equality in the past 100 years -- remember that the 19th Amendment, which gave women the right to vote, was only ratified in 1920. We are not done yet. When I joined the Army in 2005, women were still restricted from serving in Combat Arms units -- infantry, armor, and artillery. The justification -- that women were physically unfit to serve -- always struck me as absurd when my infantry unit had its share of out-of-shape soldiers. Those restrictions finally ended in 2020, and the Army continues to make progress on changing the culture that has impeded female promotions at higher levels. My Reserve Battalion is led by women: both the Battalion Commander and Battalion Sergeant Major are female soldiers. That is sadly not the norm, of the 976 general officers in the military, only 69 are women. Things are better for women in the State Department. The days of women being forced to leave the diplomatic service (this was a real restriction until 1970!) when they got married are thankfully long past. As your Congressman, I will fight for women’s rights. I will vote to protect women’s rights to control their own bodies. I will vote to ensure that women’s health issues are covered by insurance plans. I also look forward to writing Congressional Letters of Recommendation to Military Service Academies for aspiring female service members in our district. LaMalfa has bragged about trying to revoke women’s constitutional right to an abortion and voted against the Violence Against Women Act. He does not belong in Congress, and I need your help to give him the boot. Thanks in advance for your support, Max Steiner | = | = Max Steiner is a combat veteran, foreign service officer, and Democrat running to flip California's 1st District from red to blue. Consider supporting Max's campaign by = If you'd like to receive less email, add your name We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Max Steiner is a combat veteran of the Iraq War and Sergeant First Class in the Army Reserves. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense. Max Steiner for Congress 2485 Notre Dame Blvd, Ste 370 #194 Chico, CA 95928 United States

Bennet only cares about **attending cocktail parties** , **collecting lobbyist money** , and **furthering his career aspirations. ** Colorado, we have the opportunity to put an end to this type of political thinking. Fellow patriot,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better.

Now, we’re seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what’s on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs.

Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz knows that, too. In 2020, **Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 100 years**. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Hispanic Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas.

Monica has set a personal goal of raising $15,000 before March 15th, and I’ve pledged to do all that I can to help her realize her goal. **[Will you chip-in $100, $50, or even $3 to help send a Hispanic Republican to Congress?](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=76dc32867cf54487b99db81affe1c19f&_e=UTaAIjhWMEQLZtxXpLk3hOqqnv682LVggE-ObsgC0vlvxv9e9scZRrBmBd0qMkTtSp4_TPocJHq1yf7n31iXmhRtf2cyTpnFRqoWNL3fTLC-oq6v3FTsmKfLNNjuzjYcdc3CirIAJms3H3uF_XibUHQLAdr3n75rN9pfEV4WLHq5NkRn7sCJZ-8rBnEMSRtcGaVTyW4M1cr3HAdl6FkcO9NbduxtZmJknzV0w1xFY2C5AN50hZV3k4i-A0DydJyYc6iZ1wwWLNuRbiNqoIZzBNVYCW5fCX60E3W2aVfam-sA863l7KgEF7Hu59-_GEb3PXE8n01xCaUuxf166Xf7yqHkJ_vQCM-9ujKi0toV7KyIrUAQjOoB_WU5XeQeKLIgO1Ppj4Ov7pF-udmkuBi_g220cKSHo8W05mHuRuxjXln--6XgIc9yqZF8wCdAQlcd5USN2EEtpqj68BsVWDIPv5fHyJfXNn_9F9Nt9EDCt5ptrDCNMDa6CuklHmlKu09R)**

[ HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=76dc32867cf54487b99db81affe1c19f&_e=UTaAIjhWMEQLZtxXpLk3hOqqnv682LVggE-ObsgC0vlvxv9e9scZRrBmBd0qMkTtSp4_TPocJHq1yf7n31iXmhRtf2cyTpnFRqoWNL3fTLC-oq6v3FTsmKfLNNjuzjYcdc3CirIAJms3H3uF_XibUHQLAdr3n75rN9pfEV4WLHq5NkRn7sCJZ-8rBnEMSRtcGaVTyW4M1cr3HAdl6FkcO9NbduxtZmJknzV0w1xFY2C5AN50hZV3k4i-A0DydJyYc6iZ1wwWLNuRbiNqoIZzBNVYCW5fCX60E3W2aVfam-vXkRYKLauT07mjRuMY4c5-kmPaKDHCbweuQpdaz2QYUbcT3-of-6051QGx1EhZPjcxqOZXJufzDxWMd7dPwuqSqcfMTzNBO_RVEhjife9Rh7m4rizodoqi2ZGj2tPRqjYIMwqv62W8M7wa6iOXI5KOVQve6xp4qDZQmlEbMBMShd9lMuGnrmsCQqHPZOZpP61dmhhfyA9Cocq7It8--kBN)
We need more people like Monica in Congress; she is living proof of the American Dream. She knows that in America, when you set your mind to something you can achieve it. **She was raised by a single mother in a Texas border town, despite the hardships, Monica struck out on her own to realize her own American Dream**. Armed with her faith and support from her Mother, Monica grew up to become one of the top insurance agents in South Texas.

We need people like Monica in Congress. A woman who knows what hard work is; a woman who has the perseverance and grit to deliver for her community.

**Republicans only need to pick up FIVE seats next year to win back the House, and I can tell you that Monica’s race is one of the best chances we have at flipping a BLUE seat RED!**

On behalf of my friend Monica, **[I’m asking you to give generously](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=76dc32867cf54487b99db81affe1c19f&_e=UTaAIjhWMEQLZtxXpLk3hOqqnv682LVggE-ObsgC0vlvxv9e9scZRrBmBd0qMkTtSp4_TPocJHq1yf7n31iXmhRtf2cyTpnFRqoWNL3fTLC-oq6v3FTsmKfLNNjuzjYcdc3CirIAJms3H3uF_XibUHQLAdr3n75rN9pfEV4WLHq5NkRn7sCJZ-8rBnEMSRtcGaVTyW4M1cr3HAdl6FkcO9NbduxtZmJknzV0w1xFY2C5AN50hZV3k4i-A0DydJyYc6iZ1wwWLNuRbiNqoIZzBNVYCW5fCX60E3W2aVfam-u-kjrKOOEs2yLHr6xzvC98CpW4AfQrcAkM6_nCm01MSXreEskD-pUvlgyAcdZaNx7UcnnMEqEQxkUxPSMu_KffwXCZXPGdb5fWvvulLW4NSyLZqbldpxsyQmSlUFuux-zgXxfsuoOIreoNFAn4szipCrxemvcsFa32cmwiFRELuPtBpyXyqbvwOKvXJrP-_sTW2oyfUFHf2CJMrb9IDyyp)** – whatever that means to you. Monica will represent our entire Party in the House, and she’ll make us all proud.

[ HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=76dc32867cf54487b99db81affe1c19f&_e=UTaAIjhWMEQLZtxXpLk3hOqqnv682LVggE-ObsgC0vlvxv9e9scZRrBmBd0qMkTtSp4_TPocJHq1yf7n31iXmhRtf2cyTpnFRqoWNL3fTLC-oq6v3FTsmKfLNNjuzjYcdc3CirIAJms3H3uF_XibUHQLAdr3n75rN9pfEV4WLHq5NkRn7sCJZ-8rBnEMSRtcGaVTyW4M1cr3HAdl6FkcO9NbduxtZmJknzV0w1xFY2C5AN50hZV3k4i-A0DydJyYc6iZ1wwWLNuRbiNqoIZzBNVYCW5fCX60E3W2aVfam-tGjSNaMOYg83BZNlFsOErgehqifvW_0hZ8u0iibI_35BVDjbvmnougRCvhKIbs23UEJ38IdP5Z5nPDreXOYMfT1_xKFTk1dtt_opfPqXgR5GfGQKOQ-dfev8eEzpH0hYVonmUO7PklS1SMW8ZwfbwKsztJl9SKoT9A6Oi5v8Q3mi5aUEN-fwii14qVecAjOa7WjM7AxZ5JWYaIq2QQzWj9)

clean_body: Would you kindly do me a favor and open this note before March 15th? | Fellow patriot, Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked. But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better. Now, we’re seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what’s on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs. Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz knows that, too. In 2020, Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 100 years. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Hispanic Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas. Will you please to help me end 120 years of Democrats holding the congressional seat she's currently running for? I encouraged Monica to try again – a 6,000 vote deficit is easily overcome with the right message and enough support. . Monica has set a personal goal of raising $15,000 before March 15th, and I’ve pledged to do all that I can to help her realize her goal. name: Alex Padilla
subject: Good news
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
My team and I are doing everything we can to get the word out before the primary on June 7.
#

We have some good news to share today.
**The California Democratic Party voted by a _nearly unanimous_ margin to endorse our campaign for U.S. Senate.**
It’s been over a year since Governor Newsom appointed me to fill the Senate seat vacated by Vice-President Harris. And since entering Congress in January, I’ve pushed for greater access to the ballot box for all Americans, fought for desperately needed immigration reform, and prioritized the most pressing issue for mankind: the responsibility to address climate change.
There’s a long way to go on these issues, and I’m not giving up. That’s why I’m running to stay in the Senate in 2022.
And with the candidate filing deadline on Friday, now feels like a good time to let you know that I will actually be on the ballot twice — once to fulfill the remainder of Vice-President Harris’s original term, and once for the full, six-year term.
**These elections will be held at the same time, and I need to win both to stay in the Senate.**
So my team and I are doing everything we can to get the word out before the June 7 primary. **Right now, voter confusion poses a big risk to our campaign.**
[**So if you can afford it, please make a contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate today and we’ll put it immediately to work raising awareness about the Special Election.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-mar22?refcode=em220308-1-60&t=1&refcode2=676_159979_27UJdM&akid=676%2E159979%2E27UJdM)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

I’m incredibly grateful to be able to count on you to help move our country forward.
Thank you, as always, for your support.
\- Alex Padilla

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Odessa Kelly is running in TN-07
body:
We’re counting on 500 grassroots supporters to help Odessa successfully relaunch her campaign.
#
We have some exciting news to share, Peter. Odessa Kelly is relaunching her campaign for Congress, and is now running in Tennessee's 7th District.
Earlier this year, congressional maps were redrawn to break up the progressive stronghold of Nashville in order to form house districts that favor Republicans. We won’t sugarcoat it, this race will be tougher by design. But Odessa won’t back down from a challenge, and neither will we.
We’ve set a goal of 500 individual grassroots contributions before the day is over to support Odessa’s relaunch.[ Can we count on you to split a contribution today between Odessa Kelly’s campaign for Congress and Justice Democrats? ](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97114?refcode=em20220308-22315&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=22315%2E1203867%2EwAQpzq)
**[Contribute now »](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97114?refcode=em20220308-22315&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=22315%2E1203867%2EwAQpzq)**
Racist politicians use gerrymandering to institutionally disenfranchise Black, brown, and low-income voters, and ensure their interests aren’t represented in Congress. **Nashville voters need a fighter more than ever, which is why Odessa is relaunching her Congressional campaign in TN-07.**
At this moment, we need our movement to stand with Odessa as she relaunches her campaign in a new district. A new district means reaching new voters, and Odessa needs your support to quickly scale up the organizing and campaign infrastructure needed to win this race.
[Will you help us back Odessa in this fight? Your contributions help Odessa reach more voters in this new district and Justice Democrats grow the Squad!**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97114?refcode=em20220308-22315&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=22315%2E1203867%2EwAQpzq)
**[Contribute now »](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97114?refcode=em20220308-22315&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=22315%2E1203867%2EwAQpzq)**
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=23&akid=22315%2E1203867%2EwAQpzq) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=24&akid=22315%2E1203867%2EwAQpzq) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220308-22315-footer&t=25&refcode2=22315_1203867_wAQpzq&akid=22315%2E1203867%2EwAQpzq)**
---

Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Rest assured, my loyalty is to We the People of Illinois, not the corrupt political parties, the lobbyists or the donor-class, snake oil salesmen.

From: **Jo Ann Davidson**
Date: Tues, Mar 8, 2022
Subject: Matt will fight for Ohioans
To: < dpwillis67@gmail.com >

**March 8, 2022 **

One year ago, Senator Rob Portman announced that this term would be his last in the U.S. Senate. Having known Rob as a man of integrity, selflessness, and principle, I was disappointed in his decision. With the challenges confronting our nation at the present moment, we need public servants of conviction willing to put the needs of our state and nation above politics and personal ambition. Rob is one of those leaders and Ohio has benefited from his service.

Since Rob’s announcement a number of candidates have considered and launched campaigns to take his place. It isn’t often that one of these offices changes hands. There’s a gravity to this moment in that it will likely mark a new direction for our state. I have been asked regularly about my thoughts on the Republican Primary. Out of respect for the candidates, some of whom I know personally, I have declined to share my opinions publicly. And yet, in recent weeks, I have come to see the tone and tenor of the contest shift. In these moments, like many Ohio Republicans, I ask myself what kind of public servant this moment requires. **I now say, without reservation, that I strongly believe that leader to be Matt Dolan.**

Our nation is on a calamitous path. One in which families are struggling under the crushing weight of rising prices. The rule of law is breaking down inside our local communities, and we lack a concrete policy agenda and clear vision for moving the nation forward. Overseas, we find America’s allies and interests under attack. We have abdicated leadership in regions of the world that carry tremendous weight and influence in our own affairs. It’s clear we need not only a change of direction, but also the personification of skill and values sets capable of meeting these challenges.

Matt Dolan is a lifelong Ohioan who, from the moment he entered this race, has carried the banner of the Republican Party with pride and honor. He has run a campaign that is squarely focused on Ohio’s needs and has offered conservative solutions to the multitude of challenges presently confronting our businesses, families, farmers and workers. What’s perhaps most impressive about Matt is his preparedness to serve. As a former prosecutor, Assistant Attorney General, State Representative and current State Senator, Matt Dolan has worked to make our state a better place for men and women to live, work and raise a family. For Matt, this race is personal because he has a vested interest in seeing Ohio grow and become stronger. This simple truth shines through in both his campaign and conduct.

Some will say this endorsement is a slight on others. It’s nothing of the sort. As has always been the case, I speak for myself and only myself. But I must say that all Ohioans also have an inherent responsibility to ask themselves what kind of person they want representing them in the U.S. Senate. This was a seat once occupied by the names Taft, Glenn and Voinovich, yet it has always and will forever belong to the people of Ohio. I have been around politicians much of my life, far too many to count, and most often I have found that how one acts in a campaign often closely resembles how they will govern. **If that’s the yardstick by which we will measure the next person who will become Ohio’s next U.S. Senator, then I am proud to give my support and my vote to Matt Dolan.**

Signed,

[Click here to unsubscribe.](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1c81ce1c3d21431991916d8f36be9e49&_s=b4cd8df27af64f5d99e7584f90c6f554&_t=z2Tyl5ceuo0VdJu6tyNjWetFoHYVwMHaaDaVoKT6L112eAI4lkqHhk9huvNOFXHXvv7tDE6_Vu_esPJFmPzdoov278Cgu5NE6Gc0OmKO18NLBZpBVcgEs61uPf5IDbeRxpSMIEmMDR26Sysb8XQuMmL1wNWBDDvuAit9w7DslTo%3D)

name: Team NRSC
subject: Democrats have tuned out Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Have you?
Peter

Recent polling is showing that Democrats are tuning out national news during the Biden era, and we want to make sure that Republicans aren’t doing the same thing. It is paramount to Republican success in the upcoming midterms that our voters understand the failings of the Leftist government that currently has a hold on Washington.

[**Can you confirm for us that you’re still paying attention to national news as we approach a very important midterm election? All you have to do is sign your name.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1e47207cf05540a9b29b8f5a6e9a5eda&_e=KC0lxoo-Tqr8oksKaTBVnA1e6DCY8srXXPl8iZC_0OK6ftLTeNeWRzf5fPJnRHrKR0niBDwTX5uQzckWjFiywUN-D_leNs9D_FwUXoS3bDDb4Agd9koBWeGTkZTOzUm-eqA19vqWvTZMTiuV70v-uGW62ipr0Db1qcrMq1_ZDN9pMOXfJvJ2NCh2m3-xo690nMTabwCUTteeA9M-oGnyuwOexYPi74YCpn9aYesGLENsLZ7FsuBq2htPtcNrmMaeaBguwT6jZovTa-_x18BfsmUjTtfhoMzRPI74433ehluRdgin2YCdArsLew76muEG8ObrlrGSZd3bwBBKbjHt43wwDZjNb1xilN7rDYKkRas5ZiwJ8_UH4XNduxwQWjhgx8EyjK246Ft3k_29AeVcqn9TYxoK0DQOkdsPt0mMBjwtFIuRLWyq91LTLTtuXUop)

People are upset with Biden and the Democrats in Washington so maybe that explains why they’ve decided to ignore their failings? Regardless, it’s more important than ever that we understand the state of our nation.

With President Biden’s approval ratings hovering around 39%, how is it that people don’t feel the need to pay attention to the national news? We all know that Biden is failing but in a government for the people, by the people, it’s the responsibility of the people to tune in to national news so that they are aware what we’re trying to fix in the midterm elections!

Luckily, initial data is showing that it’s Democrats who are failing to pay attention. Their attention has fallen about 50% from this time last year. But Peter, we want to make sure that Republicans don’t begin to slip into this same category.

[**Please Peter, take a minute to sign your name here and if you would like us to continue our efforts to engage Republican voters, please send in $5 or $10 to help us do so!**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1e47207cf05540a9b29b8f5a6e9a5eda&_e=KC0lxoo-Tqr8oksKaTBVnA1e6DCY8srXXPl8iZC_0OK6ftLTeNeWRzf5fPJnRHrKR0niBDwTX5uQzckWjFiywUN-D_leNs9D_FwUXoS3bDDb4Agd9koBWeGTkZTOzUm-eqA19vqWvTZMTiuV70v-uGW62ipr0Db1qcrMq1_ZDN9pMOXfJvJ2NCh2m3-xo690nMTabwCUTteeA9M-oGnyuwOexYPi74YCpn9aYesGLEMbU_2o_gFFOxYnJh9UjqmNNs5tc08It-I1z91Vp6v1QiCOs8xYn9kD_TKtm2U7Eh3sYM92nNdm1QPMZtleBWcGvF_DW-TcuH9G5yqFIbs1-1wp00HDUvFf-AQiCmqbMLtpqGiXoqpVkmx17kpZKF7cyy7lkmW6VlHbYsO13fFHHkoeGHrzec-T9NM_q3Dl_7S5RyWTInujKE4R5lG6Z2WS)

Team NRSC

name: Letitia James
subject: This International Women’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42736176/334122326/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk355-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2RjMDZkMC0yYjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EyYST26sfrSvG53DuyWaoelKeD5fRuNfs7l1Q-q_tIE=)
Peter, this International Women’s Day, I’m honored to announce that my run for re-election has been endorsed by SIX major women’s rights groups.

I have spent my entire career fighting to topple the barriers that women continue to face, and I will not rest until all people – especially women of color – have equal pay for equal work, reproductive freedom, and workplaces that are free of harassment.

**I’m honored to stand with some of the most influential women’s rights groups in the country to continue my battle for equality, but I need to know if you stand with me too, Peter. My team set a goal to celebrate these endorsements by raising $10,000 before International Women’s Day ends, so please:[Can I count on you to chip in $5 or more before midnight to keep up this critical fight for women’s rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42736177/334122327/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk355-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2RjMDZkMC0yYjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EyYST26sfrSvG53DuyWaoelKeD5fRuNfs7l1Q-q_tIE=)**
| | [Donate now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42736178/334122328/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk355-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2RjMDZkMC0yYjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EyYST26sfrSvG53DuyWaoelKeD5fRuNfs7l1Q-q_tIE=)
---
For far too long, New York was almost exclusively run by powerful and wealthy white men – but that all changed when I became the first Black woman ever elected to hold statewide office in 2018. And, since shattering this glass ceiling, I have spent every moment fighting to secure equality for women in the workplace, in politics, and in the doctor's office.

**Peter, the road to gender equality in New York and across the United States is a long one, but I vow to never give up the fight. Now I need to know – will you fight with me too?

[With reproductive rights currently under attack, we don’t have time to waste. Please, will you rush $5 or more this International Women’s Day to power my fight for equality?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42736179/334122329/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk355-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2RjMDZkMC0yYjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EyYST26sfrSvG53DuyWaoelKeD5fRuNfs7l1Q-q_tIE=)**
| | [Donate now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42736180/334122330/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk355-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2RjMDZkMC0yYjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EyYST26sfrSvG53DuyWaoelKeD5fRuNfs7l1Q-q_tIE=)

Thank you, and happy International Women’s Day!

Letitia

body:
The best way to truly support and represent women, to guarantee that our issues are brought to the forefront, and to ensure that we have a seat at the table is to elect women to office. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ye1S9nEDEpSa-nXaAdXqpk_sDSXVo6IsdH8HyVK6TrtvYGmATobGjOVdwRUAjLw6ShQBIGzwTCqmIP5FYtRv5bSapqULhCCwV_jaP3kgL4iA_1nQEAaYQuqY172LBjUQXxiPr8XekD0bBRVM7BaVATEY2nDwo82GKlzmcU5IEOB6RNd5-buUpRGhef7RtSSNVexD-Rg71G4ryE_JcWbYzVZVS_LZZaF7oQ-nRtjVUMmYYeXGeBFkR199-yCpuN1-0Bf2frh_fC8Ga593898JLSJc5fox4LXI1mpl7iqoaddPN6PDSaoyWDjWOcYuc67m1amzdh-7lHeHkoh_8Img6X/3k6/zWfzjd3rTh-PoAM66az0Rw/h0/IyDy3-Xur4bIyMbhbScP832LolAef_rbS2CPtmPF738)

Dear Friend -
---
My name is Heidi, and for the last seven months, I've been overseeing Mia's campaign efforts across the state. This is more than just a job for me- it's an opportunity to elect a woman who has a demonstrated track record of fighting to break down the barriers that still exist for women (especially Black women and other women of color), who recognizes that lifting women lifts everyone, and who understands women's struggles because she has lived them. ** ** There will be a lot of platitudes offered today--and all month long--in celebration of women. The best way to truly support and represent women, to guarantee that our issues are brought to the forefront, and to ensure that we have a seat at the table is to elect women to office. In this election, we have the opportunity to do just that.
But the reality that we are facing is the same reality that countless qualified women face when running for office: we lack the financial support needed. **[That's why I'm asking you to make a donation to support Mia's campaign today- in doing so, you will be taking action towards lifting women everywhere. ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ye1S9nEDEpSa-nXaAdXqpk_sDSXVo6IsdH8HyVK6TrtvGzvK9xvxpixfBJRrB3h9jho0mAXhVAkpZQJfcieiVsxUCWDkQXJV2mudaOz3f_1pcBF14k3ebdsPj-LEgMBAubUiIMmCV3Ogt12bSJklcdV7gBqNbuiPOjjjQaVVEPZoR8FSkZ3FaAO4JZL2jchE71-cD7ydaoNYp67jfniaxGSKK5OW7cq39TscCUJWhS4h02VEoDCEFud5D6z45KG-4EimhfCxH6h-0zD6IqWOk1FYPIkeIleVJPuoDlh8SjiBCTK3CU7mg6mNNteK9QG_JKvIjA-0Si1Q7wHsYMRwDT/3k6/zWfzjd3rTh-PoAM66az0Rw/h1/QM92OA43knOSEuVxq5gWvMVprtH_GwYbTLg2UajcWwY)**

Senator Mia McLeod's Support of SC Women:
Senator Mia McLeod has a strong record of standing up for South Carolina women. From fighting Republican attempts to restrict abortion access, working to close the pay gap, and so much more, Mia has been at the frontlines of the SC GOP's war against women. Senator Mia McLeod is a working mom, small business owner, and seventh-generation South Carolinian from Bennettsville, South Carolina. She is a former State Representative, current State Senator representing District 22, and is running as a Democratic candidate for Governor.

clean_body: The best way to truly support and represent women, to guarantee that our issues are brought to the forefront, and to ensure that we have a seat at the table is to elect women to office. | | Dear Friend - My name is Heidi, and for the last seven months, I've been overseeing Mia's campaign efforts across the state. This is more than just a job for me- it's an opportunity to elect a woman who has a demonstrated track record of fighting to break down the barriers that still exist for women (especially Black women and other women of color), who recognizes that lifting women lifts everyone, and who understands women's struggles because she has lived them. There will be a lot of platitudes offered today--and all month long--in celebration of women. The best way to truly support and represent women, to guarantee that our issues are brought to the forefront, and to ensure that we have a seat at the table is to elect women to office. In this election, we have the opportunity to do just that. But the reality that we are facing is the same reality that countless qualified women face when running for office: we lack the financial support needed. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Every day, Mia inspires me, and I know that's true for countless women and girls across South Carolina who see themselves reflected in her bold and fearless leadership. Thanks for joining me in supporting Mia. With gratitude, Heidi Mia for SC Senator Mia McLeod's Support of SC Women: Senator Mia McLeod has a strong record of standing up for South Carolina women. From fighting Republican attempts to restrict abortion access, working to close the pay gap, and so much more, Mia has been at the frontlines of the SC GOP's war against women. Senator Mia McLeod is a working mom, small business owner, and seventh-generation South Carolinian from Bennettsville, South Carolina. She is a former State Representative, current State Senator representing District 22, and is running as a Democratic candidate for Governor. | | | Please, disregard if you are a registered lobbyist. body:
| | | Hi there, [_I’m not a wealthy, self-funded candidate, which is why I appreciate every dollar given to my campaign. Please chip in here if you can, so I can keep growing my team and win this race._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42742244/334172114/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmNiN2Y3ZS01NjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x_2HogstvSuY5uPoh9WZ6PRYNsgJNaowvAGh3Ucizv4=) Filling up my gas tank this morning was painful. And as I filled up, I couldn’t help but think: for all the concern about the “labor shortage” and the rush to kick people off unemployment, there’s precious little concern about how we’re supposed to GET to work with these gas prices. For a family already struggling to pay their mortgage or rent, student debt payments, car payments, and childcare, having to gas up at $50+ a week is painful. Cuts in the family budget will be made, but where? The thing that’s outrageous about this suffering is that it’s completely unnecessary. We have the money to end poverty in this country. We have the money for universal pre-K. We have the money for free college and canceling student debt. [**I’m running for Congress to fight for housing, healthcare, jobs, and education for all. Will you send me a quick donation here to help me subject: One Less Trump Fanboy in Congress
body:
I don’t know about you, but when I was growing up, Members of Congress took their responsibility to their constituents and their country seriously. | |
---
| | | [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=6444ead7bf&e=4712f71bea)
---
|
---
| **Folks,

I don’t know about you, but when I was growing up, Members of Congress took their responsibility to their constituents and their country seriously. While they didn’t always agree with each other, they always treated one another with the respect necessary to do their job for the American people.

These days, Trump Fanboys like my opponent are running their side of the aisle like a fanatical beauty pageant to see who can most impress their Dear Leader! I mean, just look at his Tweets...**

[](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=ead25ec5ba&e=4712f71bea)

[](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=2926cfa85d&e=4712f71bea)

[](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=9a479defff&e=4712f71bea)
[](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=e8045d2180&e=4712f71bea)
---
| **Ronny Jackson doesn’t take this seriously. Every day he’s in Congress he betrays his duty to the Texas 13th district. We have REAL problems in our communities, we deserve a Representative that brings REAL Solutions to the table.

If elected, I promise I will fight every day to solve our nation's problems, but I need your help to get there.

[Can you chip $5 in to help me help my neighbors?](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=fcfa190270&e=4712f71bea)

It would mean a lot,

Kathleen Brown** **Democrat** **TX-13**

clean_body: I don’t know about you, but when I was growing up, Members of Congress took their responsibility to their constituents and their country seriously. | | | | | | | Folks, I don’t know about you, but when I was growing up, Members of Congress took their responsibility to their constituents and their country seriously. While they didn’t always agree with each other, they always treated one another with the respect necessary to do their job for the American people. These days, Trump Fanboys like my opponent are running their side of the aisle like a fanatical beauty pageant to see who can most impress their Dear Leader! I mean, just look at his Tweets... | Ronny Jackson doesn’t take this seriously. Every day he’s in Congress he betrays his duty to the Texas 13th district. We have REAL problems in our communities, we deserve a Representative that brings REAL Solutions to the table. If elected, I promise I will fight every day to solve our nation's problems, but I need your help to get there. It would mean a lot, Kathleen Brown Democrat TX-13 | "Chip in!" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © Kathleen for Congress, All rights reserved. body:

Peter,
---
Washington liberals are losing sight of what it is to be an American – and even worse, many of them seem to be ashamed of being Americans.
---
They’re trying to force radical, anti-American ideas like socialism and critical race theory on the American people. __If they’re successful, they’ll destroy the very fabric of our society.__
---
**As your next representative in Congress, I promise that I’ll lead the charge to defend America’s values and our Constitution for the next generation.**
---
But as I battle to win 1 of the 5 seats we need to FLIP the House, I need patriots like YOU to fight by my side.

As a first generation American whose parents gave up everything to come here, I simply can’t understand how anyone could hate this country.
---
Sure, it’s not perfect. Nothing ever is. But as a beneficiary of the American dream, I know firsthand just how special this country is.
---
That’s why I’m ready to take on the Washington establishment and fight for the following:
---
✅ I’ll support the 1st Amendment and free speech, not cancel culture.
✅ I’ll support the 2nd Amendment and the right to bear arms.
✅ I’ll support a comprehensive, all-of-the-above approach to securing our border.
✅ I’m proudly pro-life, and I believe we MUST protect the lives of unborn Americans.
✅ I’ll stand up to dangerous ideas like _Critical Race Theory._
✅ I’ll fight for lower taxes so that you keep more of your hard-earned money because you know how to spend it better than government bureaucrats.

---
These ideas aren’t radical. They’re supported by a vast majority of the American people. But for too long, out of touch liberals have ignored **__your__** voice.
---
I promise that will change the second I’m in office. I won’t rest until Washington D.C. works for you once again.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to help me bring conservative values back to Washington.**](https://links.ciscomaniforaz.com/u/click?_t=e146ab27d8454e4aa5fa55bf190d8558&_m=9e5ba76dfb7a47fc9e033d347239c94e&_e=raQS4JS3npXhybIFG7eMyjKsWoP8ekrIWs85kF9nJLV9bRXwdHi3infCKGDTGSTSOPwt3uDwynT3OTuqmhSFdb24YUZDs2wiEZb2TY_5nAocxW-oI_W4HErnUtuwLQJ_ox6IkjoLIdikWFjKRNjCdMpSJOqcujk3LMwgh33B5BiYuODBSlBidELNTqNZ7_bzwecLUSSZ8E1TxmeWNa09YIesH-HitZz2Mrq_pxPY9U77rYmV5jzvPOB2AGh6Wrq9Om_eo7XzM7uwqMYxHNhDSP187X2xGLgX6HXGNPVHHzGOL4T-gbSM0M3q6IwEgOltIsoUv6MWiQ6DrCDoYNLwE7Uf40z6IXb2udla8n8_T-QqX34Ome7DCDCbCGi3Gvv0lSStgxu_22ZlKLQJp8ShJnWGNBmHNj1vlb_Le7B-phwnJVjjkqBkXEToYR5ricVgvffoWdD-CfJEsFQcucxAYUH0PCwQymE1omVXVU2s3zhHnwZWv24IPzqP6K0GLtdecu69UrzE7W1cgDa--Dn65Q%3D%3D)

clean_body: They want to destroy the very fabric of our society. | Peter, Washington liberals are losing sight of what it is to be an American – and even worse, many of them seem to be ashamed of being Americans. They’re trying to force radical, anti-American ideas like socialism and critical race theory on the American people. If they’re successful, they’ll destroy the very fabric of our society. As your next representative in Congress, I promise that I’ll lead the charge to defend America’s values and our Constitution for the next generation. But as I battle to win 1 of the 5 seats we need to FLIP the House, I need patriots like YOU to fight by my side. As a first generation American whose parents gave up everything to come here, I simply can’t understand how anyone could hate this country. Sure, it’s not perfect. Nothing ever is. But as a beneficiary of the American dream, I know firsthand just how special this country is. That’s why I’m ready to take on the Washington establishment and fight for the following: ✅ I’ll support the 1st Amendment and free speech, not cancel culture. ✅ I’ll support the 2nd Amendment and the right to bear arms. ✅ I’ll support a comprehensive, all-of-the-above approach to securing our border. ✅ I’m proudly pro-life, and I believe we MUST protect the lives of unborn Americans. ✅ I’ll stand up to dangerous ideas like Critical Race Theory. ✅ I’ll fight for lower taxes so that you keep more of your hard-earned money because you know how to spend it better than government bureaucrats. These ideas aren’t radical. They’re supported by a vast majority of the American people. But for too long, out of touch liberals have ignored your voice. body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

If you haven’t already heard the news, I’m so excited to share with you that I have been officially endorsed by the California Democratic Party!

This one is a big deal, Peter.

As a lifelong Democrat and five-term Assemblymember fighting for our families, I’m honored to have the state party’s hugely influential vote of confidence.

The overwhelming 78% showing for our campaign in the pre-endorsement vote was an unmistakable signal that **[California Democrats believe without hesitation that I am the best choice to succeed the incomparable Rep. Jackie Speier in Congress.](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=2b345768ac&e=292fde286a)**

This game changing endorsement will turbocharge our campaign’s momentum, but I need you to help kickstart that momentum now...

Our message is resonating, and we need to raise the funds to reach and mobilize every single voter in this district, **[so I’m counting on you to pitch in now to keep this incredible Mull-mentum going.](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=de00dc0e3a&e=292fde286a) **

**[Click here to rush $25, $50, $75 or whatever you can give right now.](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=baf13374a6&e=292fde286a)**

Peter,

**This morning, I officially joined the race to be Nevada’s next Governor after speaking at the Back the Blue rally in Carson City.**

* Our police are tired of politicians throwing them under the bus.
* They’re tired of being framed as villains instead of heroes.
* They’re tired of Sisolak’s radical ‘defund the police’ agenda.

As Governor, I’ll take the handcuffs off our police and let them do their jobs again.

* I’ll defend your 2nd Amendment right to self defense.
* I’ll BAN sanctuary cities that defy law and order.
* I won’t take marching orders from Gavin Newsom.

**Steve Sisolak is a disaster for Nevada and I’m counting on patriots like you to help FIRE him this November. **

Happy International Women's Day, Peter! **8 months from today, we have a chance to make history and send _the first Latina to represent Coloradans_ to Congress. [Can you pitch $8 or more today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42736779/334125104/1600649787?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220308IWD_C4Cweb_allop_xx_l1&amount=8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmE3YzJiMS0yZjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U2uSbNi2rG08dFpAKPMXSYXoD-MgdJXGetQJplH0_EE=)** | [Give $8](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42736780/334125105/573003782?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220308IWD_C4Cweb_allop_xx_btn&amount=8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmE3YzJiMS0yZjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U2uSbNi2rG08dFpAKPMXSYXoD-MgdJXGetQJplH0_EE=)

It’s bad enough that only 27% of Congress identifies as women. But even more significantly, _less than 3% are Latina_.
After non-Hispanic whites, Latinas make up the largest group of women in the American workforce. But they’re barely represented in Congress, which means they have little say in the policies, tax codes, and legislation that have significant impact on their day-to-day lives.
That’s why electing Dr. Yadira Caraveo is so important. She will bring her unique perspective — as a woman, a doctor, and the daughter of Mexican immigrants — to the fight for reproductive rights, for paid family leave, for a fairer immigration system, and more.
**What’s more, Dr. Caraveo has the track record to prove it.** She’s spent the last three years in the Colorado statehouse fighting on behalf of women and families. Her legislation has moved the needle on critical issues like voting rights, lowering healthcare costs, and taking on corporate greed.
Now, we’re building a coalition to send her to Congress. We’ve got EMILY’s List, Latino Victory Fund, End Citizens United // Let America Vote, PODER PAC, and more than 40 elected Colorado officials all on board — and we’re asking you to join us.
**It’s long past time Colorado elected a Latina to federal office.**[Can you pitch in today to help Dr. Caraveo be the first?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42736781/334125106/1600649787?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220308IWD_C4Cweb_allop_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmE3YzJiMS0yZjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U2uSbNi2rG08dFpAKPMXSYXoD-MgdJXGetQJplH0_EE=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42736782/334125107/1600649787?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220308IWD_C4Cweb_allop_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmE3YzJiMS0yZjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U2uSbNi2rG08dFpAKPMXSYXoD-MgdJXGetQJplH0_EE=)

clean_body: | = Happy International Women's Day, Peter! 8 months from today, we have a chance to make history and send the first Latina to represent Coloradans to Congress. = | = It’s bad enough that only 27% of Congress identifies as women. But even more significantly, less than 3% are Latina. After non-Hispanic whites, Latinas make up the largest group of women in the American workforce. But they’re barely represented in Congress, which means they have little say in the policies, tax codes, and legislation that have significant impact on their day-to-day lives. That’s why electing Dr. Yadira Caraveo is so important. She will bring her unique perspective — as a woman, a doctor, and the daughter of Mexican immigrants — to the fight for reproductive rights, for paid family leave, for a fairer immigration system, and more. What’s more, Dr. Caraveo has the track record to prove it. She’s spent the last three years in the Colorado statehouse fighting on behalf of women and families. Her legislation has moved the needle on critical issues like voting rights, lowering healthcare costs, and taking on corporate greed. Now, we’re building a coalition to send her to Congress. We’ve got EMILY’s List, Latino Victory Fund, End Citizens United // Let America Vote, PODER PAC, and more than 40 elected Colorado officials all on board — and we’re asking you to join us. It’s long past time Colorado elected a Latina to federal office.= = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you for your support! **Vega Receives Critical Endorsement from United States Senator Ted Cruz**

**PRINCE WILLIAM COUNTY** – Today, Yesli Vega announced United States Senator Ted Cruz has endorsed her campaign for Virginia’s 7th Congressional District. Vega and Senator Cruz issued formal statements following the announcement:

“I’m proud to endorse Yesli Vega for Congress in Virginia’s 7th Congressional District. Yesli is a fighter who understands the importance of backing the blue, securing our Southern border, and protecting our 2nd Amendment. Yesli has a deep commitment to her community and I look forward to her serving the people of Virginia in Congress.” – **U.S. Senator Ted Cruz (R-TX)**

“It’s going to take a real conservative to win in the 7th District and I’m honored Senator Ted Cruz recognizes that I am that leader. Senator Cruz is a champion of the conservative movement and his endorsement reinforces the fact that I’m the only candidate in this race with a record who can defeat Abigail Spanberger. I’m excited to fight side by side to defend freedom and liberty in America with Senator Cruz when I’m elected to Congress this November.” - **Yesli Vega, Candidate for Virginia’s 7th Congressional District**

**Background:**

Senator Ted Cruz was the only federally elected official to endorse Governor Glenn Youngkin in the Republican convention in 2021.

clean_body: | Vega Receives Critical Endorsement from United States Senator Ted Cruz PRINCE WILLIAM COUNTY – Today, Yesli Vega announced United States Senator Ted Cruz has endorsed her campaign for Virginia’s 7th Congressional District. Vega and Senator Cruz issued formal statements following the announcement: “I’m proud to endorse Yesli Vega for Congress in Virginia’s 7th Congressional District. Yesli is a fighter who understands the importance of backing the blue, securing our Southern border, and protecting our 2nd Amendment. Yesli has a deep commitment to her community and I look forward to her serving the people of Virginia in Congress.” – U.S. Senator Ted Cruz (R-TX) “It’s going to take a real conservative to win in the 7th District and I’m honored Senator Ted Cruz recognizes that I am that leader. Senator Cruz is a champion of the conservative movement and his endorsement reinforces the fact that I’m the only candidate in this race with a record who can defeat Abigail Spanberger. I’m excited to fight side by side to defend freedom and liberty in America with Senator Cruz when I’m elected to Congress this November.” - Yesli Vega, Candidate for Virginia’s 7th Congressional District Background: Senator Ted Cruz was the only federally elected official to endorse Governor Glenn Youngkin in the Republican convention in 2021. , Vega announced her run for Congress in Virginia’s 7th District against Democrat Abigail Spanberger. | | Military Wife. Mother. Law Enforcement Officer. * | Paid for by Yesli Vega for Virginia Copyright © 2022 Yesli Vega for Virginia, All rights reserved.

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Add your name to demand reproductive freedom be the law of the land >>
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
For far too long, reproductive freedom has been used to divide us in this country.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42737326/334127464/396464211?refcode=em-logo&source=em220308-1-a&refcode2=95c8be82-329f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=GO/7zsktYOFMN0y1PiJMSZa+hIuN4q89AlGszaQTSHqqvLrEvlvBnCuvZ32bLYvk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWM4YmU4Mi0zMjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Vet-S_RTOQPAFujhoxtT4JAZ-MdJLraz9gHvsBfmMk=)
Friends,
For far too long, reproductive freedom has been used to divide us in this country. Many of the same states that want to secede from the union over the mask mandate are just fine working overtime to legislate women’s health care decisions for them. It’s nuts.
So, in honor of International Women's Day, I think we need to make it crystal clear that we are not backing down on making reproductive freedom the law of the land.
[**Will you join me? Add your name to demand the Senate take up the Women's Health Protection Act until it passes – and protect reproductive rights for all.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42737327/334127465/-1835681037?source=em220308-1-a&refcode2=95c8be82-329f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=GO/7zsktYOFMN0y1PiJMSZa+hIuN4q89AlGszaQTSHqqvLrEvlvBnCuvZ32bLYvk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWM4YmU4Mi0zMjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Vet-S_RTOQPAFujhoxtT4JAZ-MdJLraz9gHvsBfmMk=&emci=92c8be82-329f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=95c8be82-329f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=2216363)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42737328/334127466/-1835681037?source=em220308-1-a&refcode2=95c8be82-329f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=GO/7zsktYOFMN0y1PiJMSZa+hIuN4q89AlGszaQTSHqqvLrEvlvBnCuvZ32bLYvk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWM4YmU4Mi0zMjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Vet-S_RTOQPAFujhoxtT4JAZ-MdJLraz9gHvsBfmMk=&emci=92c8be82-329f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=95c8be82-329f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=2216363)**
I'm proud to say that my first campaign was on the ‘Choice team’ that defeated a state legislator who was opposed to reproductive freedom. I won that election and worked to pass the bill that successfully codified _Roe v. Wade_ in Maryland law.
From that time until today, I have worked to defend reproductive freedom and abortion access and have been proud to be recognized for my work by NARAL Pro-Choice America, National Organization for Women Political Action Committee (NOW PAC), and the Planned Parenthood Action Fund.
But too few states in our country took the action we took in Maryland. And with a conservative majority on the Supreme Court, women in states across the country will lose their rights under _Roe_ without national legislation to protect safe and legal abortion services for all – no matter what their zip code.
That's why it's more important than ever that we don’t let this slip to the back burner and don’t stop working to demand action.
[**Will you add your name today and demand that the Senate make it a priority to pass the Women's Health Protection Act?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42737329/334127467/-1835681037?source=em220308-1-a&refcode2=95c8be82-329f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=GO/7zsktYOFMN0y1PiJMSZa+hIuN4q89AlGszaQTSHqqvLrEvlvBnCuvZ32bLYvk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWM4YmU4Mi0zMjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Vet-S_RTOQPAFujhoxtT4JAZ-MdJLraz9gHvsBfmMk=&emci=92c8be82-329f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=95c8be82-329f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=2216363)
Thank you for standing up for reproductive freedom today. And, Happy International Women’s Day!
Onwards,
Chris
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42737330/334127469/-1835681037?source=em220308-1-a&refcode2=95c8be82-329f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=GO/7zsktYOFMN0y1PiJMSZa+hIuN4q89AlGszaQTSHqqvLrEvlvBnCuvZ32bLYvk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWM4YmU4Mi0zMjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Vet-S_RTOQPAFujhoxtT4JAZ-MdJLraz9gHvsBfmMk=&emci=92c8be82-329f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=95c8be82-329f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=2216363)**
