name: Alek
subject: President Biden’s Policies Have Fallen Short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alek for Oregon
body:
America Is Worse Off Today Than A Year Ago. Open to read my recent op-ed. Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_s=0a105b6c4d6649b9ad83d495142a11a0&_t=kqcGdFZH9cnmnrfSCpqgZmwtIgpxfp2iS6MBcr3j0Vw7keCKitGpWEYnYHYBfYkYnhXQXfpUX8pibsZdBHRMgPOJOUoVr1CpKGnp1U9i9EMUDq-BLyazOs4qDj_TvjyPglHSPCHRPYE8NVJEzrPoOLewsbjNecIPLQDGa57kZbQ%3D) | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=0a105b6c4d6649b9ad83d495142a11a0&_e=qllNtnvc8x1sLeJf7S69SAkbo43wFnYKT8mkC3JjTsXzRzv1MPXBZn_yNfYkHrtdRHHOIbVJHZRimLhdTVhy1ZUJuFY7_PIahW_hfWRjMDgk5dxUdCxN9-G00dEQLrPHyDYmflOB3M5xSp6AbqI9GZTnehhsMAwBcW_dGVLt6sMMhMLYyg0Gup7dPV-SczQ0A-mdx5v2iH2VyopYDYaYjC18pXffRki1YYr-KW8WLOuMn_41eX_zhxGc9onzaI-_6f4D574PVnbiEZcEsKmGEiwyP0Jwvbpbgd3vyz-XSfLQoBcDoVIpM3_42j4MIYavYitciBF2JMdfgaFvR_for6zEWhwyzfSktaFUkHGlq6wH-bSuojbYA7B8jXsiE-_jyv816frPm0dy6HqhFdTJglLsCQRLUH_Q4gc0EkgQfYO1-6pcRqP_J8ujUhofa0xCk_pA34Oe8p1zJtdWOwjUhj1hJMpcW-E7sY6tEVznF91UGga9UX98hXbIZntg21Yp)
---

**PRESIDENT BIDEN'S POLICIES HAVE FALLEN SHORT**
_America Is Worse Off Today Than A Year Ago_

President Joe Biden promised to unite the country and make our relationships with our world allies even stronger. After watching Biden’s address to Congress and reflecting on the past year, due to the decisions of his administration, it’s clear our country and the world are not better off today than a year ago.

How Biden left Afghanistan was a national embarrassment. When I served in Afghanistan, I never imagined that we would abandon our Afghan allies, leave over 900 Americans behind, and instantly give control of the country back to the Taliban.

It also pains me to know that because the Biden Administration outsourced the final security effort near the airport to the Taliban, an Islamic terrorist was able to move through the various checkpoints and set off a suicide bomb that killed 13 U.S. service members and injured many more.

If Afghanistan wasn’t bad enough, Biden told us that his sanctions would prevent Russian aggression. We now know that is untrue and that his sanctions were reactive to a ruthless dictator, Vladimir Putin. If the United States knew an attack was imminent, like the Biden Administration said, we should’ve been getting Ukraine weapons and supplies before Russia attack, instead of after their invasion.

On the home front, we have numerous problems. We have a crisis on our southern border where a record number of illegal immigrants are entering our country. While Oregon may feel along way away, these illegal immigrants are relocating across the country, and now every town is a border town. Meanwhile, in Portland, violent crime is going up, and last year set a new record for murders, all while some Democrats continue their push to defund the police.

It doesn’t stop there, inflation is out of control. Despite being warned by Democrat economist Larry Summers, Biden and the Democrats continued to spend money like a drunken sailor who made the situation worse. Inflation has been particularly hard on those on fixed incomes. Additionally, Biden’s decision to end domestic energy exploration has made heating bills and gas prices more expensive. In Oregon, we all know the average cost of a gallon of gas is now $4.08 and it’s not going down anytime soon.

Like many Americans, I hoped that Biden would succeed, that he would govern from the center, and our country would continue to be prosperous. Unfortunately, due to the policies of Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and the Democrats who run Washington, our country is in decline.

In the coming weeks and months, I will continue to offer solutions to hold Joe Biden accountable and reverse his disastrous policies that have made the world and our country less safe. |
---

Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

clean_body: America Is Worse Off Today Than A Year Ago. Open to read my recent op-ed. Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? | PRESIDENT BIDEN'S POLICIES HAVE FALLEN SHORT America Is Worse Off Today Than A Year Ago President Joe Biden promised to unite the country and make our relationships with our world allies even stronger. After watching Biden’s address to Congress and reflecting on the past year, due to the decisions of his administration, it’s clear our country and the world are not better off today than a year ago. How Biden left Afghanistan was a national embarrassment. When I served in Afghanistan, I never imagined that we would abandon our Afghan allies, leave over 900 Americans behind, and instantly give control of the country back to the Taliban. It also pains me to know that because the Biden Administration outsourced the final security effort near the airport to the Taliban, an Islamic terrorist was able to move through the various checkpoints and set off a suicide bomb that killed 13 U.S. service members and injured many more. If Afghanistan wasn’t bad enough, Biden told us that his sanctions would prevent Russian aggression. We now know that is untrue and that his sanctions were reactive to a ruthless dictator, Vladimir Putin. If the United States knew an attack was imminent, like the Biden Administration said, we should’ve been getting Ukraine weapons and supplies before Russia attack, instead of after their invasion. On the home front, we have numerous problems. We have a crisis on our southern border where a record number of illegal immigrants are entering our country. While Oregon may feel along way away, these illegal immigrants are relocating across the country, and now every town is a border town. Meanwhile, in Portland, violent crime is going up, and last year set a new record for murders, all while some Democrats continue their push to defund the police. It doesn’t stop there, inflation is out of control. Despite being warned by Democrat economist Larry Summers, Biden and the Democrats continued to spend money like a drunken sailor who made the situation worse. Inflation has been particularly hard on those on fixed incomes. Additionally, Biden’s decision to end domestic energy exploration has made heating bills and gas prices more expensive. In Oregon, we all know the average cost of a gallon of gas is now $4.08 and it’s not going down anytime soon. Like many Americans, I hoped that Biden would succeed, that he would govern from the center, and our country would continue to be prosperous. Unfortunately, due to the policies of Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and the Democrats who run Washington, our country is in decline. In the coming weeks and months, I will continue to offer solutions to hold Joe Biden accountable and reverse his disastrous policies that have made the world and our country less safe. | Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress Follow Alek On Social Media | ---|--- | Paid for by Alek for Oregon

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: I will never back down in the fight for reproductive freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
This International Women's Day, I’m asking you to join me in the urgent fight we have in front of us. The Senate recently failed to pass the Women's Health Protection Act — missing the chance to codify _Roe v. Wade_ and write reproductive freedom into federal law.

What did Ron Johnson do? He joined his Republican colleagues in voting against it. Just shameful — especially when we know Wisconsin has had an abortion ban on the books since 1849. If _Roe_ falls, the ban could go back into effect and abortion could be illegal in our state.

Look, we're facing the biggest crisis for reproductive justice in nearly 50 years because too many politicians consider it an afterthought. _I'm not that kind of politician._

I believe we need to fight like hell to defend our reproductive rights and get rid of the filibuster if that’s what it takes to get this done. When I’m in the Senate, I'll never back down in this fight — you have my word.

This International Women's Day, my team is sending a message to Ron Johnson and every single Republican who voted against the WHPA: **Protect our reproductive rights or we'll vote you out.**

[**Will you join us by adding your name today? Reproductive freedom is a fundamental right. It's time to elect a U.S. Senator who will make it a priority, but I need your support. If you're with me, sign your name right here:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42738155/334131196/-1366413675?ms=em22_220308_IWD_adv_gq_act___sg_ettx&refcode=em22_220308_IWD_adv_gq_act___sg_ettx&source=em22_220308_IWD_adv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220308_IWD_adv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=DHsD8QNtYDAOpdX2ScmmonZ2TejAOZrQNC7af8uk9x5CVJtRLvLTkiKQ+f+o6Kreo1xurJs6rc/Y+/u7hmLSYYe1Exjzki2hZkO0UoWZw/KVS2a+WUHpPxakyF4CpN0FF78zheHpSERY2LvOuft4pbAbk6qAHFTPTvs1EBlf1ls=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWQ2NDg1Mi0zNDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5vyNDbKqdRw5P0kmLaM89hkeT_7HVlc1tsCQSHzUfbI=&emci=e6da6d4d-289f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=2ed64852-349f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=18659593)

We know Ron Johnson won't do a damn thing to protect our reproductive rights. He made that very clear when he voted against the WHPA and called _Roe_ “a real tragedy.” I'm taking him on because it's time Wisconsinites had not just one — but two — champions fighting for reproductive justice in the Senate.

**Can I count on you to join me in demanding Congress take action to codify _Roe v. Wade_ before it's too late? Here's your personal link: **[**https://action.sarahforwisconsin.com/a/international-womens-day?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42738157/334131200/-1366413675?ms=em22_220308_IWD_adv_gq_act___sg_ettx&refcode=em22_220308_IWD_adv_gq_act___sg_ettx&source=em22_220308_IWD_adv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220308_IWD_adv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=DHsD8QNtYDAOpdX2ScmmonZ2TejAOZrQNC7af8uk9x5CVJtRLvLTkiKQ+f+o6Kreo1xurJs6rc/Y+/u7hmLSYYe1Exjzki2hZkO0UoWZw/KVS2a+WUHpPxakyF4CpN0FF78zheHpSERY2LvOuft4pbAbk6qAHFTPTvs1EBlf1ls=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWQ2NDg1Mi0zNDlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5vyNDbKqdRw5P0kmLaM89hkeT_7HVlc1tsCQSHzUfbI=&emci=e6da6d4d-289f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=2ed64852-349f-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=18659593)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42738486/334132546/27414565?refcode=em_fr_2022.03.08_b1_ca27wavtq_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzM5Y2Q0YS0zNjlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KcXNam5t42tG2iymst_aaOg9rtfpVUw_qZ3s0d6WwWs=) Team – Did you watch President Biden’s State of the Union address last week? We sure did. The President’s speech highlighted **the economic progress** of the American Rescue Plan – which, _no thanks to Mike Garcia_ , led to an economic recovery that has uplifted this district’s workers, families, and small businesses. Unlike Garcia, _who voted against this plan_ , Quaye understands the value small businesses bring to our communities. After business school at Stanford, he combined his military experience with his passion for giving back and started a small business whose mission is to grow other small businesses. **The difference is clear: While mom and pop shops struggled to keep their lights on, Republican Mike Garcia decided to give in to partisan politics instead of doing what’s right for his constituents. One Team. One Fight.

clean_body: = Team – Did you watch President Biden’s State of the Union address last week? We sure did. The President’s speech highlighted the economic progress of the American Rescue Plan – which, no thanks to Mike Garcia , led to an economic recovery that has uplifted this district’s workers, families, and small businesses. Unlike Garcia, who voted against this plan , Quaye understands the value small businesses bring to our communities. After business school at Stanford, he combined his military experience with his passion for giving back and started a small business whose mission is to grow other small businesses. The difference is clear: While mom and pop shops struggled to keep their lights on, Republican Mike Garcia decided to give in to partisan politics instead of doing what’s right for his constituents. = = | ****=** One Team. Peter,

It’s Dana Balter — and I have some exciting news to share with you! I’m endorsing Josh Riley for Congress in New York’s 22nd Congressional District, and I hope you’ll join me in supporting his grassroots campaign!

As the two-time Democratic nominee in this region, I know that Josh has the right combination of progressive values and practical experience to deliver results for working families in a divided Congress.

I wasn’t planning on endorsing anyone in this race, but Josh is an extraordinary candidate. His record of fighting for the things that matter most–from improving access to health care for children and people with mental health conditions to defending workers’ rights to a decent wage and family leave to protecting our freedom to vote–tells me that Josh is the champion we need in Congress.

Josh needs our help to win. Why? Because winning a Democratic primary here isn’t easy–trust me, I know! It takes a lot of effort, dedicated volunteers, and yes, _a lot of resources._

[_**That’s why I’m asking you to join me today in supporting Josh’s campaign. body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2672%2E3611125%2E87pomT ][IMG]

This is a doozy, folks.

To understand just how dangerous Tim’s Republican opponents are, you need
only look at the extremists endorsing them:

J.D. Vance has already been endorsed by Josh Hawley, Marjorie Taylor
Greene, and tech billionaire Peter Thiel.

Josh Mandel has secured endorsements from the likes of Madison Cawthorn
and Michael Flynn.

Even Kellyanne Conway and Corey Lewandowski have thrown their support
behind Jane Timken.

Here’s the bottom line: We can’t let any one of Tim’s GOP opponents win
this seat, because the last thing Ohio needs is a far-right puppet in the
Senate.

Tim has what it takes to go head-to-head with whichever extremist
millionaire wins the GOP primary, but it’s up to us to make sure he’s got
the resources to compete with their massive war chest.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8559?t=1008&amount=25&akid=2672%2E3611125%2E87pomT ]Can you chip in $25 (or more!) to give Tim the grassroots support he
needs to defeat the GOP and flip Ohio blue? We wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t
important.

---
|

"As someone who has fought for religious freedom around the world my entire career, I find it appalling to see it limited here at home. With such a rich history of defending religious freedom in Virginia where Thomas Jefferson wrote the historic Virginia Statute of Religious Freedom, which laid the groundwork for much of the First Amendment, it is astounding that Democrats in the Virginia Senate would try to exert such control over the freedom to worship here in the Commonwealth."

"I say often that there is no right more fundamental than the freedom of conscience. When our government is seeking to control whether, how, or when we can worship, it is an egregious infringement and exactly the type of thing I’m running for the Virginia Senate to fight against."

-Tina Ramirez

---

name: Imani Oakley
subject: In honor of International Women’s Day…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress Oakley for Congress
body:
| | | Will you support our pro-women progressive movement?
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42739080/334135014/-1216813799?refcode=iwd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTU0ZmVjMy0zOTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L1pRFKJ_ORg0fAwDw8ZkojgXDpqHU3LgNUppDtv4ItU=)
---
Peter, Today is International Women’s Day — a day when we celebrate the strength, resilience, and determination of women everywhere. And on this International Women’s Day, I’m proud to be an unapologetic voice for women’s rights. **I’m proud to be a fierce advocate for abortion rights. I’m proud that, as your next Congresswoman, I’ll be the FIRST Black woman (and woman) to represent NJ-10. And I’m proud that we’ve built a powerful pro-women progressive movement to defeat a do-nothing incumbent who’s mediocre at best when it comes to women’s rights.** [**And, in honor of International Women’s Day, I hope you’ll help us continue to grow our movement and elect a true champion for ALL women to fight for us in Congress. If you can, please click here to chip in $27 today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42739083/334135016/-1216813799?refcode=iwd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTU0ZmVjMy0zOTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L1pRFKJ_ORg0fAwDw8ZkojgXDpqHU3LgNUppDtv4ItU=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42739085/334135019/-1216813799?refcode=iwd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTU0ZmVjMy0zOTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L1pRFKJ_ORg0fAwDw8ZkojgXDpqHU3LgNUppDtv4ItU=)
---
For too long, women (and especially Black women) have been left out and left behind. We’ve had to deal with politicians like Rep. Donald Payne Jr., who would rather rake in corporate money and spur on his supporters’ sexist attacks against me than put up a real fight for women’s rights. **It’s time for us to stand up and demand better — to demand real representation and real action. ** [**That’s why I’m running for Congress, and that’s why I’m asking you to stand with me. If you’re ready to elect the FIRST woman and Black woman to represent NJ-10, click here to chip in $27 in honor of International Women’s Day. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42739087/334135021/-1216813799?refcode=iwd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTU0ZmVjMy0zOTlmLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L1pRFKJ_ORg0fAwDw8ZkojgXDpqHU3LgNUppDtv4ItU=) Thank you for your support. — Imani

clean_body: | | | Will you support our pro-women progressive movement? = Peter, Today is International Women’s Day — a day when we celebrate the strength, resilience, and determination of women everywhere. And on this International Women’s Day, I’m proud to be an unapologetic voice for women’s rights. I’m proud to be a fierce advocate for abortion rights. I’m proud that, as your next Congresswoman, I’ll be the FIRST Black woman (and woman) to represent NJ-10. And I’m proud that we’ve built a powerful pro-women progressive movement to defeat a do-nothing incumbent who’s mediocre at best when it comes to women’s rights. = = For too long, women (and especially Black women) have been left out and left behind. We’ve had to deal with politicians like Rep. Donald Payne Jr., who would rather rake in corporate money and spur on his supporters’ sexist attacks against me than put up a real fight for women’s rights. It’s time for us to stand up and demand better — to demand real representation and real action. = Thank you for your support. — Imani | | = | | Paid for by Oakley for Congress Oakley for Congress PO Box 1181 Montclair, NJ 07042 United States | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Charles Booker
subject: There’s no doubt that her sacrifice is why I’m here.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Happy International Women’s Day,
Peter.

I hope that today we can all share our love and appreciation for the women
in our lives and the women before us who made a lasting impact on our
families and communities.

I am reminded today that I owe everything I have to the strong women in my
life.

My mom raised me as a single parent and to be frank with you, life wasn’t
easy. There were times we didn’t have light or electricity. At one point,
we didn’t have a place to live because our house burned down.

I remember growing up, after doing my homework, mom would call me down for
dinner. Sometimes, she’d give me my plate and leave the kitchen. I noticed
she wasn’t eating, and asked her why.

After avoiding my question, she admitted she wasn’t eating to save food
for me. There’s no doubt that her sacrifice is why I’m here.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16982?refcode=em20220308-1637&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1637%2E346206%2EaS-L__ ][IMG]

But I know my story isn’t unique: there are tens of thousands of women in
Kentucky who are making painful sacrifices, working multiple jobs, and
still can’t make ends meet. That’s why I believe it’s time to write a new
kind of politics that works for families, not corporations. We need to
replace Rand Paul with a leader who understands the pain too many working
families and women in our country face.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16982?refcode=em20220308-1637&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1637%2E346206%2EaS-L__ ]If you’re ready to rise up with me in this work, will you make a
$5 donation to our people-powered campaign today?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16982?refcode=em20220308-1637&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1637%2E346206%2EaS-L__ ]Contribute $5

Today, my wife and I are parents to three incredible daughters.

Being a girl dad has been the greatest privilege and highest honor. My
daughters opened my eyes to my future, and showed me a level of love I
never knew existed.

They remind me everyday why we’re fighting to change our politics here in
Kentucky. I’ll do anything to make sure they grow up in a world where they
feel loved, safe, and secure.

That’s why I’m in this race and I know that together we can write a new
chapter in politics that celebrates the women in our lives and will ensure
a better future for all of our families. That’s why I’m in this race and I
know that together we can write a new chapter in politics that celebrates
the women in our lives and will ensure a better future for all of our
families.

Together,

Charles Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220308-1637-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1637_346206_aS-L__&akid=1637%2E346206%2EaS-L__

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1637%2E346206%2EaS-L__

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

An update on the state of our fundraising and why it’s important for us to fundraise as much as possible for the runoff. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQk56A38KwPLIJv7BQE-9SA1mnYXq2pkEVdtuPVFE39zlnVTa05W9DkmdVdjGGz3D4kqpUWAgnRSkhBjje0mcE38aDNeGdle5a3dERSsN-DeJ7IXDoQSgMdY8zduUIwROmnIyz8ddYhWQN67Ikp7Vl5KGOfoHKXnl8m5bEznAB_Y6r63ni48wpOVlwYKd1zia7B8wqg1ZHLDWYiGg_iq8D3m0DO1Ox26xcmR-K8Ve-pW6LaBi80kkV2zoWwaSRZY_f1EfiRaBHWm5ZZxQn8vBaaH/3k6/A_PkpvYwQjW6OIBAKFR_Mw/h0/xvVUF9WieU-2FfVdHLJhwsmCBbNy7_11W5kvIUpYnX4) Peter, it’s Jordan — Finance Director for Team Cisneros.

The runoff is now in full swing, and I want to give you an update. The momentum we’ve seen from grassroots donors since last Tuesday shows the true power of the progressive movement we’re building here in South Texas.

I just finished up a meeting with the team to plan out campaign finances for the next few months and we’re fired up to take this seat! That’s why we are working overtime to fundraise grassroots dollars in order to supercharge our plans for a massive voter contact program. And my job is to make sure our team has the resources it needs to run a competitive campaign.

[_**Today, I’m asking you directly: as one of our grassroots supporters, can you make a contribution to our campaign today? Our fundraising is powered by small-dollar donations from folks like you!**_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCGpyav7HV4ILuDHydmRCN1NtlJx3B7YqlH99QDZDNnrCVwyOGtsXJDmIc9DDc2gOrPdOmP4J-RyAuSSXMTM4NNRnAULA0Sj46jOAM9BB7TerCzU5fCzos-kiFgdG1rPxGtzl-BzKdrZZxdhvBNF6CgJlv8nDmqoUZ46mxY8Y6eRIhWzr8-di74FBVqo2IWlf2lUtuyd-ItaV2cMmOFUGi0hf6vQUrkg8y15lotjs7-vsazqvuS6r73sJBk6FCBal7cZ3IVzGQ08K9eQ0n7LEiQ28z84QYfrG4M-VOvZ72as05k3lMpLbOHPX-iikIHD7a/3k6/A_PkpvYwQjW6OIBAKFR_Mw/h1/u9gcNY-7Va_Dn7TDhwjSU87zyPIFoof42ZPXG0SCe44) [Contribute now »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCGpyav7HV4ILuDHydmRCN1NtlJx3B7YqlH99QDZDNnrAUtTXhQ-GPPQl-akR6463oNwZG7y87odZRXte-b1QHoHngmdRmAyadFMvKou_ZEmA3c_GwW9BstZImoMRFiQBoxT4N7Yuoh_1zXPDk3-6liq0fcDL-Uij2dlOcfDQRUczZjXbptUJqxpqQRASbhTrEeA2OqOO9i-5V01-bv7i_65iNwc_pD9DD94lJyIMp-S97ZvR9-LGkEI-B6r0CJHRvru_fKc7przMYxkXeX4uIg4eCaJE75roCSXXgGZH2FIXdXFfTstCuGWNgL20fU2dN/3k6/A_PkpvYwQjW6OIBAKFR_Mw/h2/oVpfL2N7feEQ1RlphA_52P9hMqiONyO-5pzTZIKynqY) Jessica is a progressive candidate that I am ecstatic to be working for — she’s a strong, unapologetic advocate who will fight hard for you and your family as a congresswoman.

clean_body: An update on the state of our fundraising and why it’s important for us to fundraise as much as possible for the runoff. | | | Peter, it’s Jordan — Finance Director for Team Cisneros. The runoff is now in full swing, and I want to give you an update. The momentum we’ve seen from grassroots donors since last Tuesday shows the true power of the progressive movement we’re building here in South Texas. I just finished up a meeting with the team to plan out campaign finances for the next few months and we’re fired up to take this seat! That’s why we are working overtime to fundraise grassroots dollars in order to supercharge our plans for a massive voter contact program. And my job is to make sure our team has the resources it needs to run a competitive campaign. Jessica is a progressive candidate that I am ecstatic to be working for — she’s a strong, unapologetic advocate who will fight hard for you and your family as a congresswoman. The movement we’re building together is already reshaping communities and will soon give South Texans true representation in Congress. I am thrilled to be a small part of it all. Jessica is dedicated to protecting and expanding the rights of working people in South Texas. That’s why we’re building a strong network of grassroots supporters and we need you in our corner. Thank you so much for standing with us, Jordan H. Finance Director, Jessica Cisneros for Congress | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

Breaking news: Beto is officially being
SUED by a billionaire Abbott donor for speaking the truth and fighting for
the people of Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53806?refcode=ema20220308-179543&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=179543%2E444211%2Euk4TtG ]Houston Chronicle Headline

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53806?refcode=ema20220308-179543&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=179543%2E444211%2Euk4TtG ]Abbott's top allies are directly attacking Beto in an effort to silence
him and stop our movement, but Beto will always put people over profits,
no matter the risk. Please, chip in now to have Beto's back.

During last year's preventable grid failure, energy corporations made $11
billion while hundreds died and millions of Texans suffered a tragedy of
their governor's making. Some of those top profiteers turned around and
gave Abbott $4.6 million, and they're not happy that Beto is exposing
their corrupt scheme.

First, Beto was directly threatened by oil tycoon, Kelcy Warren, who
demanded we stop telling the truth or there would be consequences.

Then, Beto chose not to back down and he continued spreading the facts,
demanding accountability, and fighting for justice for those affected by
Abbott's deadly grid collapse.

Now, Kelcy Warren is officially suing Beto to try and shut him up and shut
us down.

Abbott's big donors aren't backing down, so we can't either.
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53806?refcode=ema20220308-179543&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=179543%2E444211%2Euk4TtG ]Please, will you
donate $3 or more right now to help Beto fight back against
this attack and keep the focus on Abbott's corrupt actions?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53806?refcode=ema20220308-179543&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=179543%2E444211%2Euk4TtG ]Contribute $3

It's clear that Abbott and his mega-donors are scared of our movement.
Now, let's show them what we're really capable of.

Thank you,

— Beto HQ

clean_body: In the last few hours we’ve seen this. | | | Peter, wow! In the short few hours since we announced our campaign in the new Tennessee 7th District, the momentum we’re seeing is truly inspiring. We know that all across this state, from the city to the hollers, we’ve been ready for a movement of working class folks to come and shake up the status quo. And if we can show we raised a lot of money to run in this new district, we can force the GOP to take us seriously. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Running in this new district won’t be easy. The Tennessee GOP is eager to count us out, and we need to fight back against their racist gerrymandering. I don’t accept any money from corporate PACs, but I don’t need it when I have the backing of thousands of grassroots donors — folks like you, Peter. Let’s do this, good people! Odessa Kelly | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

name: BREAKING NEWS
subject: BREAKING: Senate passes MAJOR bill to save the USPS!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Democrats need your signature now!
| | |
---
**BREAKING:** The Senate just passed a MAJOR bill to save the U.S. Postal Service!
Democrats just scored a MAJOR win in the fight to save the USPS. We want to hear from you, but Democratic strategists have NO RECORD of where you stand!

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/6202?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220308-BreakingNews-USPSRR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220308-BreakingNews-USPSRR-Pros-sl1&akid=3282%2E9716520%2EZOidT0)

For years, Trump-era policies have done nothing but sabotage the U.S. Postal Service and hurt millions of Americans who rely on it.

But now, Democrats just scored a MAJOR win in the fight to save the USPS. A bill just passed in the Senate that will stabilize USPS finances, block service cuts, assist postal workers, and more.

**We need to know that Americans stand with the USPS in its most critical hour, so we've launched a petition opposing Trump's cronies' sabotage of the Postal Service.**

**But we’re falling short of our 100,000 signature goal and are still missing your response!**

Deadline | TONIGHT
---|---
Status | NOT SIGNED
